body:
14 years ago, I founded an organization from my parent's home with the intent of using undercover investigative journalism to expose the corrupt.

| | | | [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=fe809003ae2e4a6b8b00d8c89bf75bdc&_e=3J-GVRexxgFQZIHFSgfal_W5HfHWGuzcJRH-CliT-O2SmWVZV_dx_UwFF7S9pArIvqwxYN44rDD9H4_r-c-5rIK1rzGmshc-ScnXWpV8rtECkf_bJ5PqaOR8n5CzdNeo2zNoD7NP6sQeZyHpoQFztk5fWrsQ8zZxWsQEKng0QKhlXg3BsWL82aj290HHxEzsObcSj2a9hXgxymZwthJecUEFQa7Enn1EqWnre5DO_CYzH32X_5fI6jHJl02rxsp31z6idORYschVPvpV0MCHBri8Cmq_1G2wQ9Gl9nC2k3dvP70tEflR2wXNxHmstg0oDRWTd9P_3d9Tvfjdm-3k-MkLyFhs5yYb1zai9eYAGqJk3JdCSmVHgAAlfui38eLC)
[](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=fe809003ae2e4a6b8b00d8c89bf75bdc&_e=3J-GVRexxgFQZIHFSgfal_W5HfHWGuzcJRH-CliT-O2SmWVZV_dx_UwFF7S9pArIvqwxYN44rDD9H4_r-c-5rIK1rzGmshc-ScnXWpV8rtECkf_bJ5PqaOR8n5CzdNeo2zNoD7NP6sQeZyHpoQFztk5fWrsQ8zZxWsQEKng0QKhlXg3BsWL82aj290HHxEzsObcSj2a9hXgxymZwthJecQQjyWl3ozcDLrqXo4I2yOzmlViWDbOI8ZBhvxCjeVKnL471j6h5cooMV-mqHSq03SjPj0_B5mgTlIqwbFR0r8A5Ma__S8dK9co9ZDeCYXADbDIqg4K94KYq8iR-Tp3bFgmKmlCuWuHlzJ4ZAfZWIBDXTZM7-nug_w43fERO8QLQ)
Dear Friend,

Fourteen years ago, I founded an organization from my parent's home with the intent of using undercover investigative journalism to expose the corrupt.

You've seen my work. Most Americans have.

In February, after releasing a historic investigation on Pfizer, the Board of Directors of the organization I created from scratch, ousted me.

It was a blow, but things happen for a reason. Today, I'm unleashed to do my work through my new organization, OMG, without any obstruction and **no one to stop me.**

Since I was fired, I've chosen not to look back. I want to move forward with my work, with happiness and spirit. **And I move forward carrying with me the many lessons I learned.**

Those 14 years were formative.

When I started, my hands would tremble when I confronted a target of my investigations. It took time, but I overcame my fears of confrontation by grounding myself in principle.

I learned about trust, loyalty, and leadership.

Most importantly, I learned the hard way the true depth of Michael Jordan's quote on leadership: "Winning has a price. **And leadership has a price**."

I've been sued for exposing the truth more times than I can count. And, get this, **yesterday, I was sued in federal court by the very organization I founded.**

In my opinion, their intent is to shut me down now that they no longer have any control over me.

And this lawsuit is going to cost me a fortune! That's why I'm writing you today to **[ask for your support to my legal defense fund.](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=fe809003ae2e4a6b8b00d8c89bf75bdc&_e=3J-GVRexxgFQZIHFSgfal_W5HfHWGuzcJRH-CliT-O2SmWVZV_dx_UwFF7S9pArIvqwxYN44rDD9H4_r-c-5rIK1rzGmshc-ScnXWpV8rtECkf_bJ5PqaOR8n5CzdNeo2zNoD7NP6sQeZyHpoQFztk5fWrsQ8zZxWsQEKng0QKhlXg3BsWL82aj290HHxEzsObcSj2a9hXgxymZwthJecXQM5fJwGbU16i-2ShUX64W3MWpePTlSstNzp-mqoRHUPBLzyCXmY8csB8vzjkGZl3ZvlgQL4cMwh34AoTbe7qEypBIP9b8UY4lp-Li3FSmI4q28tOAyO2WhHTxN53upLXa1AxjxM-U4Pvw8XtsPoxwBtsk7ibJdaVWgHC82dgkB)**

My friends with the non-profit, Liberty Guard, have set up **[the fund to pay attorney costs](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=fe809003ae2e4a6b8b00d8c89bf75bdc&_e=3J-GVRexxgFQZIHFSgfal_W5HfHWGuzcJRH-CliT-O2SmWVZV_dx_UwFF7S9pArIvqwxYN44rDD9H4_r-c-5rIK1rzGmshc-ScnXWpV8rtECkf_bJ5PqaOR8n5CzdNeo2zNoD7NP6sQeZyHpoQFztk5fWrsQ8zZxWsQEKng0QKhlXg3BsWL82aj290HHxEzsObcSj2a9hXgxymZwthJecY2jewuYFZ6qY_bnWbUheKvHKJgcUKAv4g9TTlpN4oqDJtZ5WS-W9DcITAXppgT9HUrfBCeTFhfwQNCAkgnK5JNvpT0zGHdbzF6un2EIO9gaR8yOjdXqhRcletseC6mxRO_epA4yc-NtPYXRokFc2XjEvL0F6D8-7gMT8muWHYRO)** that will quickly pile up.

As I mentioned, this isn't my first rodeo so I know that **the cost will exceed $500,000**.

Good attorneys aren't cheap, and my pockets are not deep.

No one gets wealthy doing the work that I do. Trust me.

That's where you come in. **[Will you chip in and help me defend myself](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=fe809003ae2e4a6b8b00d8c89bf75bdc&_e=3J-GVRexxgFQZIHFSgfal_W5HfHWGuzcJRH-CliT-O2SmWVZV_dx_UwFF7S9pArIvqwxYN44rDD9H4_r-c-5rIK1rzGmshc-ScnXWpV8rtECkf_bJ5PqaOR8n5CzdNeo2zNoD7NP6sQeZyHpoQFztk5fWrsQ8zZxWsQEKng0QKhlXg3BsWL82aj290HHxEzsObcSj2a9hXgxymZwthJecQFBB2_9uFuv9f_JZgIKhAjqgk2hgUtj80Uk_anTyvCQ6_3PCdhBUOFBuIjoiaJn84ctFF88VHx1nDeIZcKIQJ3Wi9U3MCWeziOUHumavu-Cl6wzpju0OVz7s1wQJrgLxU_sHOoT4UzB_crjeaaNkbePqzbNSXUAYmY-em0REofk)?**

When you do, I'll be following up as the case progresses but I'll also keep you informed of the great work I'm doing at OMG . . . and it's exciting!

A fresh start, being forced to start over, I'll admit is thrilling. And I'm starting armed with all of the lessons I've learned to avoid the pitfalls I've experienced.

Me and my teams are more efficient, we're more productive, and our work hits like a sledgehammer.

But my work will be silenced if my former employer gets their way. Or the distractions of a court battle and its costs may become overwhelming.

**[I'm asking you to STAND UP FOR ME, so I can keep working](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=fe809003ae2e4a6b8b00d8c89bf75bdc&_e=3J-GVRexxgFQZIHFSgfal_W5HfHWGuzcJRH-CliT-O2SmWVZV_dx_UwFF7S9pArIvqwxYN44rDD9H4_r-c-5rIK1rzGmshc-ScnXWpV8rtECkf_bJ5PqaOR8n5CzdNeo2zNoD7NP6sQeZyHpoQFztk5fWrsQ8zZxWsQEKng0QKhlXg3BsWL82aj290HHxEzsObcSj2a9hXgxymZwthJecfo_2D8rLwKoj10ygB8Tp2S0tV7zeZRuY5yARSP6Srf4YxkwaBAGZ0YDGgWaj01zlxv10coP50XgXdCFtaqrcv7HTwb1l-Pb6Tt2sfelB0N6wF0nBTgYOnNgptz3w-6uvVqEy8hWhm7cdKdcgSKSd_-89IYTE_pFB1g_HoJZxgxZ)**. And I'll commit to you that **I will NOT let you down**.

So please, **[make a donation to my legal defense fund through Liberty Guard](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=fe809003ae2e4a6b8b00d8c89bf75bdc&_e=3J-GVRexxgFQZIHFSgfal_W5HfHWGuzcJRH-CliT-O2SmWVZV_dx_UwFF7S9pArIvqwxYN44rDD9H4_r-c-5rIK1rzGmshc-ScnXWpV8rtECkf_bJ5PqaOR8n5CzdNeo2zNoD7NP6sQeZyHpoQFztk5fWrsQ8zZxWsQEKng0QKhlXg3BsWL82aj290HHxEzsObcSj2a9hXgxymZwthJeccMObV24DB58jNsc0WX-DipVYvGqf9qSIhojuEuBjZkru0Vi6ps73IwreUf4YF5G1Y3UKo5mMpB2xq_s9gpUCH6sD4W6xFaohf1_ikKfXhxWuCVi1WC0H6l4oosuoNskXYgNAFzMGeV5Sw4WnWj3aOVm0-UGUzAFqXaFfMlXlmpk)**. We have a long way to do to hit our goal, so please, donate as much as you can.

Thank you for your direct or indirect support over the years. Your views, donations or simply talking about my work to friends and family has kept me going for 14 years . . . **and we cannot stop now!**

Respectfully,

James O'Keefe

P.S. I have 20 days to file my response to the lawsuit. I have to raise enough money to pay for a retainer and cover the legal work to defend against this lawsuit. This is unfortunately urgent so please, **[donate today](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=fe809003ae2e4a6b8b00d8c89bf75bdc&_e=3J-GVRexxgFQZIHFSgfal_W5HfHWGuzcJRH-CliT-O2SmWVZV_dx_UwFF7S9pArIvqwxYN44rDD9H4_r-c-5rIK1rzGmshc-ScnXWpV8rtECkf_bJ5PqaOR8n5CzdNeo2zNoD7NP6sQeZyHpoQFztk5fWrsQ8zZxWsQEKng0QKhlXg3BsWL82aj290HHxEzsObcSj2a9hXgxymZwthJecdb4RRtb36ZD4o2jyJnz8awmRmFy4y-m19lRgxxKgAzifo8_NS-RSPn_YlX4q_vup69mVeAZiJiDmB3XTMwGTq-IyA60_bTV_UwMF7r1yT_d9I8QEcWsc9XGMZTwtfLRxcS4IeKop3bRqCqj_wpcLL3Mc5uxobQ_zJlUcmNTMp36)**.

14 years ago, I founded an organization from my parent's home with the intent of using undercover investigative journalism to expose the corrupt.

| | | | [](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=cabeddcdaa9946a4bdeb8d2b89ab6dc5&_e=0zIC2S7DWRjxV8Eguw4FTq7_Oq-hwvBhZsFEBuQDsE-BMGWpqQuo6fmALVEN5ITf7voTdEr1NEzzgLdfH2bC1oujvOfqO5P7s_ST0lyXEf7yI1FC8vyRttMIzXimOYK7mFmWMqCiFOh4q0pOtHIKFWE18NVvOOKWqrTfcq6yTzqvbKZJdJt12m8r6w1cwiiwregA8PXp7RNfLiRddOw1BzmmCwSB2xCjFKMDPSOHUpDUQXDCPwdkP6lIToF_begz5j3QJcmVLRBkcpt0e1HJtbrCvD4BmMtyUfjwkNkYYy75mcsEl2pYfcuQ-GafdKRg4wOmnrPdvhFW3yHs-JEZogTrt_6xZLTcIdS1yGXaI1klBWW_vLSbnY2HJ6NBsD23)

Dear Friend,

Fourteen years ago, I founded an organization from my parent's home with the intent of using undercover investigative journalism to expose the corrupt.

You've seen my work. Most Americans have.

In February, after releasing a historic investigation on Pfizer, the Board of Directors of the organization I created from scratch, ousted me.

It was a blow, but things happen for a reason. Today, I'm unleashed to do my work through my new organization, OMG, without any obstruction and **no one to stop me.**

Since I was fired, I've chosen not to look back. I want to move forward with my work, with happiness and spirit. **And I move forward carrying with me the many lessons I learned.**

Those 14 years were formative.

When I started, my hands would tremble when I confronted a target of my investigations. It took time, but I overcame my fears of confrontation by grounding myself in principle.

I learned about trust, loyalty, and leadership.

Most importantly, I learned the hard way the true depth of Michael Jordan's quote on leadership: "Winning has a price. **And leadership has a price**."

I've been sued for exposing the truth more times than I can count. And, get this, **yesterday, I was sued in federal court by the very organization I founded.**

In my opinion, their intent is to shut me down now that they no longer have any control over me.

And this lawsuit is going to cost me a fortune! That's why I'm writing you today to **[ask for your support to my legal defense fund.](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=cabeddcdaa9946a4bdeb8d2b89ab6dc5&_e=0zIC2S7DWRjxV8Eguw4FTq7_Oq-hwvBhZsFEBuQDsE-BMGWpqQuo6fmALVEN5ITf7voTdEr1NEzzgLdfH2bC1oujvOfqO5P7s_ST0lyXEf7yI1FC8vyRttMIzXimOYK7mFmWMqCiFOh4q0pOtHIKFWE18NVvOOKWqrTfcq6yTzqvbKZJdJt12m8r6w1cwiiwregA8PXp7RNfLiRddOw1B4Zk223FD3S36rqydogtokVQ5w0rzK9UoCB1pdD4ba1G2GaEsTW6lWaoKKKPGfvu2yo-_PasVhuovjwUZSQ6ulwpwJhxqTZoW7A-_k8yk8-wA64H9-1I_BFCNVSsrFB7lMRwyR3hZVCZ2pnfQLJfjL1OTFEIkBdrEtgFdHbE-2Hp)**

My friends with the non-profit, Liberty Guard, have set up **[the fund to pay attorney costs](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=cabeddcdaa9946a4bdeb8d2b89ab6dc5&_e=0zIC2S7DWRjxV8Eguw4FTq7_Oq-hwvBhZsFEBuQDsE-BMGWpqQuo6fmALVEN5ITf7voTdEr1NEzzgLdfH2bC1oujvOfqO5P7s_ST0lyXEf7yI1FC8vyRttMIzXimOYK7mFmWMqCiFOh4q0pOtHIKFWE18NVvOOKWqrTfcq6yTzqvbKZJdJt12m8r6w1cwiiwregA8PXp7RNfLiRddOw1B5L2H8MFZROKus-kcymmrSh5AAs_YSeUkR5Q_l1J_E6WeS6jSaRDWvu51cWzC8Y9oTx4K4q6V7OKoP_voDBGHFkjBxC-jopmK0ogr9CRxxHdjuEX3yTslmH60t46ArNiH1U5p6o4SF1PvrXXzZcyL2-LE88iyw8rVZW4E4uiFpu2)** that will quickly pile up.

As I mentioned, this isn't my first rodeo so I know that **the cost will exceed $500,000**.

Good attorneys aren't cheap, and my pockets are not deep.

No one gets wealthy doing the work that I do. Trust me.

That's where you come in. **[Will you chip in and help me defend myself](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=cabeddcdaa9946a4bdeb8d2b89ab6dc5&_e=0zIC2S7DWRjxV8Eguw4FTq7_Oq-hwvBhZsFEBuQDsE-BMGWpqQuo6fmALVEN5ITf7voTdEr1NEzzgLdfH2bC1oujvOfqO5P7s_ST0lyXEf7yI1FC8vyRttMIzXimOYK7mFmWMqCiFOh4q0pOtHIKFWE18NVvOOKWqrTfcq6yTzqvbKZJdJt12m8r6w1cwiiwregA8PXp7RNfLiRddOw1B4WPcM_M0DKLSQLAIbLMN-QsTv2i66VQQu_XJHFmEHrsjnpdPkCBxbFx5PrLfFsXz4xOC0jx1DXA1BHVsgTKrqMDBZBBVf6gHUBzUSCUEE1-WRn52tfJUaq3W-Bbh__J_l5esDygFvbapm7DaFLzhvWsV9LQQuHlpZba9qt_M70K)?**

When you do, I'll be following up as the case progresses but I'll also keep you informed of the great work I'm doing at OMG . . . and it's exciting!

A fresh start, being forced to start over, I'll admit is thrilling. And I'm starting armed with all of the lessons I've learned to avoid the pitfalls I've experienced.

Me and my teams are more efficient, we're more productive, and our work hits like a sledgehammer.

But my work will be silenced if my former employer gets their way. Or the distractions of a court battle and its costs may become overwhelming.

**[I'm asking you to STAND UP FOR ME, so I can keep working](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=cabeddcdaa9946a4bdeb8d2b89ab6dc5&_e=0zIC2S7DWRjxV8Eguw4FTq7_Oq-hwvBhZsFEBuQDsE-BMGWpqQuo6fmALVEN5ITf7voTdEr1NEzzgLdfH2bC1oujvOfqO5P7s_ST0lyXEf7yI1FC8vyRttMIzXimOYK7mFmWMqCiFOh4q0pOtHIKFWE18NVvOOKWqrTfcq6yTzqvbKZJdJt12m8r6w1cwiiwregA8PXp7RNfLiRddOw1Bw07QmrWpuuKOQ9KYZ2XCAElq9OIqrLxAqSOH-u6Gg_KrD4-RJlVp8u7G8RQ12T1_ElJz0v7kkKTG-OzhbzsXIHXCN6Knd0McfzZn5SsybyOAyzKxEI9cGoyV9ddMwXLNkCBMZ8IS-sg6-5zJgDNPPfYR3WyxVupyA-RS2qgKmIA)**. And I'll commit to you that **I will NOT let you down**.

So please, **[make a donation to my legal defense fund through Liberty Guard](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=cabeddcdaa9946a4bdeb8d2b89ab6dc5&_e=0zIC2S7DWRjxV8Eguw4FTq7_Oq-hwvBhZsFEBuQDsE-BMGWpqQuo6fmALVEN5ITf7voTdEr1NEzzgLdfH2bC1oujvOfqO5P7s_ST0lyXEf7yI1FC8vyRttMIzXimOYK7mFmWMqCiFOh4q0pOtHIKFWE18NVvOOKWqrTfcq6yTzqvbKZJdJt12m8r6w1cwiiwregA8PXp7RNfLiRddOw1B183by5VLVeNCdygdq-8b7Z1IuZOZsKxh9LCBnVzQ-lSuuyxCnqqW0O2sekVdJaoFSzZo3F_pWmJx8TK7JMrhWWMPGKK4X7izx3p8TBbf9Ar8cw3sp5L1uGVakkCoPLBB1eGIBWrQrAofl0vyCp1cX_wHe6ESVs2MTDhy9fL8y60)**. We have a long way to do to hit our goal, so please, donate as much as you can.

Thank you for your direct or indirect support over the years. Your views, donations or simply talking about my work to friends and family has kept me going for 14 years . . . **and we cannot stop now!**

Respectfully,

James O'Keefe

P.S. I have 20 days to file my response to the lawsuit. I have to raise enough money to pay for a retainer and cover the legal work to defend against this lawsuit. This is unfortunately urgent so please, **[donate today](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=cabeddcdaa9946a4bdeb8d2b89ab6dc5&_e=0zIC2S7DWRjxV8Eguw4FTq7_Oq-hwvBhZsFEBuQDsE-BMGWpqQuo6fmALVEN5ITf7voTdEr1NEzzgLdfH2bC1oujvOfqO5P7s_ST0lyXEf7yI1FC8vyRttMIzXimOYK7mFmWMqCiFOh4q0pOtHIKFWE18NVvOOKWqrTfcq6yTzqvbKZJdJt12m8r6w1cwiiwregA8PXp7RNfLiRddOw1B7NSNTb6KJuy2T-RvpPStp2FRp17tKvq0_0S3xGru4XfwCcqihj8fL1e56VhgM8aow-ex0bWDb3uzPu4r_MLMlhgxHWq0-0uv9CvY8Dt62tQe6ZPfmADERuigZ1m1-0Uf0Vo5V2E4pFzbyvHUtn7FE0Fhc3G56tp2QFb2Srl5PWo)**.

name: Friends of the Earth
subject: This is the email we NEVER wanted to send.
body:
| | | | | [](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/e_s17_main_cobrandedemail_c3)
---|---|---

| | | **This could be a DISASTER, friend****. We were counting on hitting our goal by yesterday’s deadline,** but we fell seriously short. Now we urgently need your help to close the gap before it’s too late.
---
Here’s why your matched gift matters so much today: Vulnerable species are depending on Friends of the Earth to protect them from certain EXTINCTION and defend the habitats they call home and our planet from Big Polluters. Any gap in our budget means we have to scale back our fight while greedy corporations ramp up their planet-killing destruction for the sake of profits. We can’t let that happen.
With so much at stake, our generous donors agreed to **EXTEND this once-a-year match opportunity for ONE MORE DAY.** So we had to pull your supporter record while there’s still time to DOUBLE your impact for our planet.
| | [ ](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1857918?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
**EMAIL:** dpwillis67@gmail.com
**MATCH STATUS:** **EXPIRING at 11:59 p.m.**
**END-OF-FISCAL-YEAR DONATION:** STILL PENDING
**DONORS NEEDED FROM your area:** **5**
---
| | [DOUBLE MY GIFT NOW](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1857918?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
_Records reflect most recent available data. Match extension expires at 11:59 p.m._
---
To be honest, friend, we’re really worried. **We set our goal to hit $150,000 before our end-of-fiscal-year deadline because that’s the MINIMUM we need to stand up to Big Polluters.** There’s no fluff in our budget, just the dollars and cents it takes to show up and fight when ecosystems are under attack. ** If we fall short, that fight gets infinitely harder – and we feel the impact in poisoned waterways, toxic farmland, and the growing absence of endangered species. **
That’s not the world we want to live in. We can’t afford it, and neither can the precious species counting on us to do the right thing. **That’s why this match extension is such a critical opportunity to help protect the planet we all share. But we only have until 11:59 p.m. TONIGHT to make up our fundraising shortfall, and we’re relying on activists like you who know how much is at stake. **

name: Candace Owens, Co-founder of BLEXIT
subject: The most personal email I’ve ever sent you
body:
I must share my story and tell you why I created the BLEXIT Foundation.

[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zgsrc7v9odrmth9jq1d2m7eo62eormupnb78es4g_rp22sh2s8i66o70s9h60p72c3h2bs)

Friend,

This is the most personal and vulnerable email I have ever sent you... But I must share my story and tell you why I created the BLEXIT Foundation.

Before I share my story, allow me to introduce the BLEXIT Foundation.

**For too long, I have watched Black Americans force-fed a message of victimhood, fear, defeat, and dependence. And, this has to stop.** In 2019, with Brandon Tatum, we created BLEXIT Foundation - a nonprofit organization - dedicated to bringing traditional American principles and a message of empowerment to urban minority communities.

Our message to America's black and minority communities is that you are not a victim. We promote economic independence and individual freedom, strengthening the nuclear family, and fostering a deeper appreciation for patriotism in Black American culture.

[_**Please support the BLEXIT Foundation 's mission today by helping me reach our goal of raising $25,000 from new online donors. You can click here to donate.**_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zohmaik74a00r6abauh0buc7fcujeq7sjl5sg15o_rp22sh2s8i66o70s9h60p72c3h2bs)

**_Now I 'll share my story_... racism, death threats, and empowering black communities.**

Growing up as a black woman, I can recall learning how "helpless" I was told I was. And this message - which the media forces Black Americans to listen to - is heartbreaking.

We're taught to believe we're victims, that nothing will ever change, the police are our enemies, and racism prevents us from ever achieving our goals.

This is WRONG.

I've dealt with racism... _**I 've even received death threats**_. Racism is an ugly form of collectivism and is unacceptable.

But the solution is NOT to become a victim and give up.

I created the BLEXIT Foundation to empower black communities, minorities, and the people in my life whom I love. Since our start in 2019, BLEXIT has grown substantially with over 41 grassroots chapter programs in 41 states, over 14,000 volunteer members and local community leaders, and nearly 60,000 grassroots supporters.

[_**Friend, I am inviting you to support the BLEXIT Foundation and help us spread our winning message of entrepreneurship, school choice, faith, and family. My goal is to raise $25,000 from online supporters to fund our mission. Please click here to donate $10, $50, $100, $250, $500, $1,000 or any amount. **_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zbrbqebp8o59luvatv1gcrr8ftc33vnvfig7kcb0_rp22sh2s8i66o70s9h60p72c3h2bs)

I am breaking the rules.

It seems like every email I receive in my inbox engages in fear-mongering, makes big promises, and demands you and I make a donation without any of the details... _I 'm not doing that_.

You should know the details, believe in our mission, and understand how BLEXIT is changing the direction of our urban communities and our country.

So I am taking a risk by sending you a long email with all the details to empower YOU to choose to support the BLEXIT Foundation.**Please read to the end of this email (I have an important message at the end you don 't want to miss).**

When I founded BLEXIT, I wanted to make sure above all else we were NOT just a "think tank", but rather we pride ourselves on being a thoughtful and quick acting "DO-tank". We're doing things no other organization in the country is doing.

Here are the BLEXIT Foundation's values, what we're doing to reach Black communities, and what we're fighting for:

* **School Choice:** Often, the people allegedly "fighting for minorities" are doing everything in their power to keep Black and Hispanic students locked into awful schools.

The ugly truth is that these schools are simply brainwashing centers attacking the nuclear family, creating victims, and teaching their twisted values. BLEXIT is fighting for School Choice to empower young Black and Hispanic students to learn real skills, have more opportunities, and escape poverty. [_**You can support BLEXIT 's efforts to fight for School Choice here >>>**_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zkf30rs7k5a8btkj5jjc6ll04oqln5c8og48tg28_rp22sh2s8i66o70s9h60p72c3h2bs)

* **Criminal Justice Reform:** The mainstream media wants urban communities to hate our law enforcement officers. This ugly message is setting Black Americans back. The BLEXIT Foundation supports our men and women who serve as police officers and defend our communities.

Yes, we do need criminal justice reform. But we believe cooperating with our police officers and connecting as a community is critical to creating justice. BLEXIT Foundation is starting conversations with police officers and urban communities. The media wants you to believe cops are evil! This is wrong. But people never hear this message.

[_**Help the BLEXIT Foundation change the narrative by making a donation here >>>**_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zhbn9u6v7pki6fc19qhtqj44hpmjl1er666gbb58_rp22sh2s8i66o70s9h60p72c3h2bs)

* **Entrepreneurship:** I am passionate about empowering Black and Hispanic Americans. Free markets, responsibility, and advancing the careers of urban communities is the solution to poverty. The BLEXIT Foundation identifies young leaders in urban communities and helps them create resumes, practice interviews, and learn skills employers desire.

BLEXIT is not a book club or simply talking a big game... No, we're actually making an impact with real individuals committed to serving urban communities. [_**Please help the BLEXIT Foundation encourage entrepreneurship and empower Black and Hispanic communities by donating here >>>**_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z8v87vs3n079gndos4gcvjanbvrnl4j7joc2k8u8_rp22sh2s8i66o70s9h60p72c3h2bs)

* **Teaching History: **Critical Race Theory has nothing to do with solving race relations in our country. This is about division and spreading a victimhood message.

The BLEXIT Foundation believes in teaching real American history. It is critical for our urban communities to learn about our Founding Fathers and the Constitution to become productive and educated citizens. [_**Please help the BLEXIT Foundation teach real American history by donating here >>>**_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zai3faf6jhpei9pd8d2phci6g8fjipvv6gi8k3r0_rp22sh2s8i66o70s9h60p72c3h2bs)

* **Presenting Our Message: **We have failed to reach urban communities with our message and values. Instead, we've allowed the mainstream media to write the narrative. Not anymore.

The BLEXIT Foundation is going places where no one else goes. We're hosting events in Detroit, Baltimore, and Tampa and starting real conversations. We're not just preaching to the choir, and these aren't boring events. They have music, art, and real conversations, and they are fun! I am committed to reaching urban communities and spreading our message. [_**Please support BLEXIT 's events and help us spread our message by donating here >>>**_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zcgfnjfvvaskc6a5dbngbkgvg1e59heh9fbsvhpo_rp22sh2s8i66o70s9h60p72c3h2bs)

What does "BLEXIT" mean? BLEXIT is the Black exit from the culture of victimhood, fear, and dependence the media has forced on us. If you hold a permanent view of yourself as a victim you become your own oppressor.

This is personal to me.

I was once a slave to a culture of victimhood and became a proud Black patriot.

Friend, I am asking you to join the BLEXIT Foundation by making an investment in our organization. Please use one of the links I've copied below to donate today:

[_**Donate $10 >>>**_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z99orgvvno6gt1jbcubu8nse2ie5d3qf4o0fsc58_rp22sh2s8i66o70s9h60p72c3h2bs)
[_**Donate $35 >>>**_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z16rk4dsmb1rhelgs07k7c2ucehrlqbbag7p4vdo_rp22sh2s8i66o70s9h60p72c3h2bs)
[_**Donate $50 >>>**_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zmv2654n4a27ubiid2e871eq3tdjboc3vtuddeho_rp22sh2s8i66o70s9h60p72c3h2bs)
[_**Donate $100 >>>**_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z8h0faulptu97o5k07hsim192fv8gkadiph9k1mg_rp22sh2s8i66o70s9h60p72c3h2bs)
[_**Donate $250 >>>**_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z1529ppp4g8tgjrhcj59ctluffvllhjek5rt3gfo_rp22sh2s8i66o70s9h60p72c3h2bs)
[_**Donate $500 >>>**_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z1533t48515gmfh5v704moeg30c5ha52vo8ksia8_rp22sh2s8i66o70s9h60p72c3h2bs)
[_**Donate $1,000 >>>**_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z5sa95rqesqahpq00o8985iup91e5baqedelmsmo_rp22sh2s8i66o70s9h60p72c3h2bs)
[_**Donate $2,500 >>>**_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zo6cp5febt9o67qr4spfvhkq02hck4a10mmk9ta0_rp22sh2s8i66o70s9h60p72c3h2bs)
[_**Donate Any Amount >>>**_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zoofsakubt2etflvulk8p5nqlknm24pfui23alp8_rp22sh2s8i66o70s9h60p72c3h2bs)

This is my last message to you before you close this email.

The BLEXIT Foundation believes in faith, family, and freedom. At the end of the day, our message to urban communities is about love and empowerment.

My burning desire is to use my voice and change the direction of our urban communities and the country. The BLEXIT Foundation has a real impact, and I am inviting you to join our cause.

[_**Please consider making the most generous donation you can today by clicking here.**_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zlj212ii448ob0ln9804mhgjb8ridvd98fao69ro_rp22sh2s8i66o70s9h60p72c3h2bs)

Thank you, Friend.

Candace Owens
President
BLEXIT Foundation

1600 Daily
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zhq88gf9a98fshvfni1irfk3ohthvct8718fnrc0_rp22sh2s8i66o70s9h60p72c3h238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kuo72ttle5pq8or0c1gj8d5hmjpqcdtlmuin7djle8r7ccjkm8qjf9v56ngj0trkm6or9djjctg1eddk6ior79hnmmpi9df4chj60p35c5h2bs)_ | _[manage data preferences](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zbj53qbrjufsg108087dup390r2qmgamrudo3oc0_rp22sh2s8i66o70s9h60p72c3h2bs)_

subject: What do you know about C.S. Lewis?
body:
| | Please see a special message from our sponsor.
---
| | | | [](http://trk.libertyledger.)
---
Dear Friend, Time is running out to take our C.S. Lewis quiz!
---
[](http://trk.libertyledger.-eZg)
---
[**Take The C.S. Lewis Quiz NOW**](http://trk.libertyledger.-Pj-XVw)

The quiz closes at **MIDNIGHT TONIGHT** , so we wanted to make sure we reached out to you before it ends. C.S. Lewis was one of the 20th century's most celebrated apologists and theologians. name: Riley Gaines
subject: It happened to me, and it’s happening to women and girls everywhere.
body:
How long are we going to let this happen?

| |
---
| | | _It happened to me, and it 's happening to women and girls everywhere._

Now, it's trickling down into our youth sports. Recently, two California teens took TWO of the top three positions to qualify for the state track finals. Both teens were biological males. Both teens previously competed against other young men.

Worse yet, both teens took places at the podium over women but **FAILED** to show up for the preliminary finals.

I am absolutely disgusted. _**How long will we let the transgender mob destroy the rights women worked so hard for?**_

I am teaming up with Marsha Blackburn to SAVE women's sports, but Joe Biden and the Democrats are determined to shut us down and silence us.

Well, if you know one thing about me - there is no world where I will let that happen.

That's why I'm reaching out to you today. Joe Biden has vowed to veto any legislation that prevents biological men from competing in women's sports. We all know he won't be able to do that with voices as loud as ours. _**[So, Friend, I am unveiling a petition to SAVE women's sports, and I want you to be a part of it.](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=8a358cbbcb6e4ee6a70c5e5521e0ae0d&_e=IC5mpJWe0LucWm5_Ww7Aszn7eG_1e-Ifg7Ervt9c4yZfATDN0KABYu5vI7nYi2zFPvY5Yfwck10eczb4o9Cw8TtiG3Ta4grl2syBE9IX2rdV5G1h8vXyhcVDoq1_hJLLDyZVZObhCkaDpdHIPJBvL4mYFEcznONRBX-R7vLFR29zaCuja2JvLpgWRKf7yE2lZ6j9RpwHkaqCUuaMZMotIUSHnEfEHsEJSYAE-E8nlQ0L9rwI0wch_qd4Wy2RgwHN5bssngDSqDUaZkFlUNvxRENbCgpMsSiHM1YN1BOsZK7i4WHmwuxskZbecfDZL1BhAyMFhskwqyLfPNJUqCGLLmxfeyYivmzO6lCz-3BPESns6tPBakmg-FyS4U4vz5UZQyKrQRPgiuY4o37sgnTAKJBBwES3RDa2rwTwaeOf2vdVWCxbuukuko8b1jd9RSPg "So, Friend, I am unveiling a petition to SAVE women’s sports, and I want you to be a part of it.")**_

name: Friends of the Earth
subject: The Worst Case Scenario happened
body:
| | | | | [](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/e_s17_main_cobrandedemail_c3)
---|---|---

| | We didn't want to send this email, Friend, but we really don't have a choice. **Yesterday, we fell short of our Fiscal Year End fundraising goal \-- at the worst possible time for our planet and the countless lives that depend on it. ** The stakes are far too high to miss this goal: **Greedy chemical companies are driving a massive decline of our precious bees. Our oceans are filling with toxic garbage. And endangered species everywhere are struggling to survive as Big Oil wrecks their ecosystems for profits. That's why our generous donors agreed to EXTEND our rare 2X match -- but ONLY until midnight TONIGHT. We urgently need environmentalists like you to step up while this opportunity lasts. Here's where your record stands:** | | **Fiscal Year End Record**
---
**EMAIL:** dpwillis67@gmail.com
**MATCH STATUS: EXPIRING at 11:59 p.m.**
**FISCAL YEAR END DONATION: STILL PENDING. [GIVE NOW.](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1858100?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)** **PEOPLE NEEDED IN YOUR CITY TO GIVE: 5 MORE**
---
| | [DOUBLE MY GIFT NOW](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1858101?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
_Records reflect most recently available data. __Match extension expires 11:59 p.m._
---
[](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1858101?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
The end of the fiscal year isn't a game to us, Friend. There's no scoreboard -- just the ongoing fight to stop Big Polluters and ensure that our planet survives. We set our initial goal at $150,000 because that's the MINIMUM we need to power our efforts forward. **Every single dollar is accounted for in our battle to protect vital habitats for helpless animals, get toxic waste out of our food chain and waterways, and protect our planet from fossil fuel-driven destruction.** When we miss our goal, this battle gets even more difficult to fight.
Falling short means we have to scale back on our work to hold Big Polluters accountable, mobilizing organizers on the ground and keeping the pressure on lawmakers to pass the planet-saving policies we desperately need. **That's why this match extension is so critical. And we're counting on you -- our planet is counting on you -- to help make up this budget shortfall with your membership support today. **
[**So please: Rush your $27 donation now before our rare match EXTENSION expires at 11:59 p.m. tonight, and every dollar will be DOUBLED -- up to our $150,000 goal -- to fight for our only Earth.**](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1858102?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)

name: Riley Gaines
subject: It happened to me, and it’s happening to women and girls everywhere.
body:
How long are we going to let this happen?

| |
---
| | | _It happened to me, and it 's happening to women and girls everywhere._

Now, it's trickling down into our youth sports. Recently, two California teens took TWO of the top three positions to qualify for the state track finals. Both teens were biological males. Both teens previously competed against other young men.

Worse yet, both teens took places at the podium over women but **FAILED** to show up for the preliminary finals.

I am absolutely disgusted. _**How long will we let the transgender mob destroy the rights women worked so hard for?**_

I am teaming up with Marsha Blackburn to SAVE women's sports, but Joe Biden and the Democrats are determined to shut us down and silence us.

Well, if you know one thing about me - there is no world where I will let that happen.

That's why I'm reaching out to you today. Joe Biden has vowed to veto any legislation that prevents biological men from competing in women's sports. We all know he won't be able to do that with voices as loud as ours. _**[So, Friend, I am unveiling a petition to SAVE women's sports, and I want you to be a part of it.](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=610296f5b12f421a857d8bffa2dd6a77&_e=hnwuTLotohbIXxXfW0S3mHv6SItkA-0BniT6E_fg3mpfoamII2p0rG2etQBF7U4qreNryEeTCZ0sUxXRSmaJGaqmRS5orTzDtQ9MFli3EYrDTuFPREfklye3JSpJ0mkJrPJ8Bfr2RAcHEQyzprviYo6C_32yfGNlG5iENLtRPaNKSSv6pvftrCpbGTiKlS8WnZ3pzeAqNVXjxDvjxhdroiFSgGfSVUzQw-3uRKZQiA-HFLMIzBkaFCzVZgZ06gujz_HhNpmCQPh7tWvCcry56cqYtWKfw9Q-GLz87RW8cz-de17Ynd0POCYJbWvJsHJJ27ru-Y2ZsgCwtltvrS5LyznAY1FSD-ICz5e5AmyNPhlcXcB1BEBjyPg-t073yFZ9LxyhitvVNl3S9CwL-twdbsVhFMps5BM7khHgTI8RPXIkmo5Weixxl_dRvpB4oAs5KzzlcjStOxHRxXWoZcoJMQ%3D%3D "So, Friend, I am unveiling a petition to SAVE women’s sports, and I want you to be a part of it.")**_

This isn't the America I want young women to grow up in, and if you agree, _**[I humbly ask you to join me and Marsha Blackburn.](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=610296f5b12f421a857d8bffa2dd6a77&_e=hnwuTLotohbIXxXfW0S3mHv6SItkA-0BniT6E_fg3mpfoamII2p0rG2etQBF7U4qreNryEeTCZ0sUxXRSmaJGaqmRS5orTzDtQ9MFli3EYrDTuFPREfklye3JSpJ0mkJrPJ8Bfr2RAcHEQyzprviYo6C_32yfGNlG5iENLtRPaNKSSv6pvftrCpbGTiKlS8WnZ3pzeAqNVXjxDvjxhdroiFSgGfSVUzQw-3uRKZQiA-HFLMIzBkaFCzVZgZ06gujz_HhNpmCQPh7tWvCcry56cqYtWKfw9Q-GLz87RW8cz9V8XRiP4rRmbf8f9aTH4ZaGkEoi8O5UpDl8_H1qIiGQqou63jXqPrSX32ATt5t-drUqAeSWklnGLewOnPrXwR67Dxjrs7LGp822_zEZVwKMHW2m_GmTeeuDReCQGp8c90Y7GpdQQF6mimPrdhr8-uLlY6apjuiAmwaqZdvd67-Qg%3D%3D "I humbly ask you to join me and Marsha Blackburn.")**_

God Bless,

Riley Gaines

clean_body: How long are we going to let this happen? | | | | | It happened to me, and it 's happening to women and girls everywhere. Now, it's trickling down into our youth sports. Recently, two California teens took TWO of the top three positions to qualify for the state track finals. Both teens were biological males. Both teens previously competed against other young men. Worse yet, both teens took places at the podium over women but FAILED to show up for the preliminary finals. I am absolutely disgusted. How long will we let the transgender mob destroy the rights women worked so hard for? I am teaming up with Marsha Blackburn to SAVE women's sports, but Joe Biden and the Democrats are determined to shut us down and silence us. Well, if you know one thing about me - there is no world where I will let that happen. That's why I'm reaching out to you today. Joe Biden has vowed to veto any legislation that prevents biological men from competing in women's sports. We all know he won't be able to do that with voices as loud as ours. "So, Friend, I am unveiling a petition to SAVE women’s sports, and I want you to be a part of it." | | "ADD YOUR NAME" This isn't the America I want young women to grow up in, and if you agree, "I humbly ask you to join me and Marsha Blackburn." God Bless, Riley Gaines | "Riley Gaines" | | | | | | "Marsha Image Footer" | | A Note For You, from Marsha Blackburn: Protecting our Conservative values from the Left is not an easy task. With a radical agenda focused on rising inflation, opening our borders, and censoring free speech, it has never been more important to defeat the radical Left. That's why your continued support is so appreciated. Your help has never been needed more, so "please, click here to support my efforts if you can. "** Thank you for being a dedicated supporter, Marsha Blackburn | | "SUPPORT MY FIGHT" | Paid for by Blackburn Tennessee Victory Fund, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Marsha for Senate, MARSHA PAC, and Tennessee Republican Party Federal Election Account. You’ve been a key part of efforts to defend — and expand — Democrats’ Senate majority, so we’re thrilled to have you on board for our next mission: **Ensuring Ted Cruz loses in 2024.** A Ted Cruz-less Senate is possible: Last time he was on the ballot, he won by _just 2.6%,_ losing independent voters. Political experts agree that Texas has shifted towards Democrats in recent election cycles, and Cruz remains deeply unpopular in his own state. **It’s not going to be easy — but the evidence is clear: If we work together and build the strongest possible grassroots movement,_we can defeat Ted Cruz._** [**Ready to be a part of this fight? subject: Mandatory U.S. Dollar Recall to Begin on July 26?
body:
If you have any U.S. dollars in your bank account...

| Dear Reader, If you have any U.S. dollars in your bank account... You must see **[this shocking video exposing the government's new plan to recall the U.S. dollar.](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c27958%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=pe106wZ4usp4IVrdDUVxjw&sysid=1)** The official announcement could come as soon as July 26. As _Business Insider_ says, this dollar recall "could be imminent." That means if you don’t prepare now... You could end up holding a bunch of worthless U.S. dollars. **[Click here to see the three simple steps you must take now to protect your life savings.](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c27959%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=pI4bRo1moby2wlRMjFZoEg&sysid=1)** Regards, Kendall Castillo

name: =?utf-8?Q?Douglas=20Carswell?=
subject: Is this the end of ‘affirmative action’? Update from your favorite think tank
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/mspolicy/affirmativeaction?e=5703353baa)
---
| |
---
|
Dear Friend,
**What was the most significant thing Donald Trump did as President? **
**Love him or loathe him, Trump’s Supreme Court appointments look like they might have been the most consequential thing he did in office. **Of the nine Justices on the Court, one third of them - Neil Gorsuch, Brett Kavanaugh and Amy Coney Barrett - are Trump appointees.
**Trump’s trio have decisively changed the balance of opinion on the Court – and the implications of this seem to only grow.**
---
|
---
_“I have a dream that my four __little children will one day live in a nation_ _ __where they will not be judged by the color of their skin, but by the content of their character”_
| **On Thursday, the Supreme Court ruled that ‘affirmative action’ cannot be used as part of a university admissions process. **Or to be more precise, it ruled that the system used by Harvard University and the University of North Carolina, does not comply with the principles of the Equal Protection Clause of the 14th Amendment or the protections of Title VI of the Civil Rights Act.
**For decades, universities have used race-based preferencing to rig their selection systems in favor of some racial groups, and at the expense of others.** Often this has meant universities admitting more African American students, with lower grades, than they otherwise might have, and at the expense of Asian American students with higher grades.
**In the words of Justice Clarence Thomas, “****all forms of discrimination based on race — including so-called affirmative action — are prohibited under the Constitution”.**
**Progressive academics, hooked on ‘woke’ ideology as an addict is to meth, may deviously look to circumvent the ruling.** Regardless, an important victory has been won by those who believe that the way to end racial discrimination is to stop racially discriminating.
**So-called ‘affirmative action’ can now be challenged in the knowledge that the Supreme Court will likely rule against it should ‘woke’ bureaucrats be daft enough to let things go far. Let the litigation begin ....** Perhaps we will now see a flurry of cases aimed at overturning ‘affirmative action’ when it comes to awarding public procurement contracts and practices within local government?
A day later, the Supreme Court made another momentous decision, when it ruled that President Biden’s plan to cancel over $400 billion of student loan debt was also contrary to the Constitution. A few hours after that, the Court ruled that a Christian website designer could not be compelled by state law in Colorado to articulate views that they did not themselves endorse.
A year before, the Court famously overturned Roe Vs Wade, ruling that decisions about abortion should be left to each individual state.
**Maybe the Court’s most consequential ruling of all is one that has received the least attention.** Last summer, the Court ruled that the Environment Protection Agency did not have the power it presumed to have. For the first time since the New Deal, the legal assumptions that have allowed for the aggrandizement of the administrative state are being challenged.
**Responding to Thursday’s ruling, President Biden declared that ‘this is not a normal court’. **He’s right.
**The norm, since the Warren court of the 1950s, has been to have the Supreme Court adjudicate on the basis of what the judges would like the law to say. Today, we have a Supreme Court ruling on the basis of what the law actually says. **So accustomed have we become after decades of judicial activism that might not feel normal, but it is what the Founders intended.
**Back in the 1980s, Ronald Reagan attempted to change things, selecting the brilliant Robert Bork to sit on the Court** \- only to have him rejected by Congress after a bruising battle. Something similar almost happened when Bush the elder appointed Clarence Thomas. He had to endure a smear campaign similar to what Brett Kavanaugh experienced more recently.
Some characterize the change in the composition of the Court as a tilt towards conservatism after years of leaning liberal. I am not sure that is quite right. Recent Court rulings on election law in Alabama and Louisiana certainly weren’t welcomed by many conservatives in those states.
**What the Supreme Court seems to have done is move away from judicial activism in favor of originalism – the idea that they should stay true to the original intentions of the Founders when they drafted the Constitution. **
Maybe that’s one bias the Supreme Court ought to always have.
Have a wonderful weekend!
---
| [Forward this email to a friend!](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=d81d8db45a&e=5703353baa "Forward this email to a friend!")
---
| |
---
Warm regards,

Douglas Carswell
President & CEO

|
---

Responding to Thursday’s ruling, President Biden declared that ‘this is not a normal court’. He’s right. The norm, since the Warren court of the 1950s, has been to have the Supreme Court adjudicate on the basis of what the judges would like the law to say. Today, we have a Supreme Court ruling on the basis of what the law actually says. So accustomed have we become after decades of judicial activism that might not feel normal, but it is what the Founders intended. Back in the 1980s, Ronald Reagan attempted to change things, selecting the brilliant Robert Bork to sit on the Court \- only to have him rejected by Congress after a bruising battle. Something similar almost happened when Bush the elder appointed Clarence Thomas. He had to endure a smear campaign similar to what Brett Kavanaugh experienced more recently. Some characterize the change in the composition of the Court as a tilt towards conservatism after years of leaning liberal. I am not sure that is quite right. Recent Court rulings on election law in Alabama and Louisiana certainly weren’t welcomed by many conservatives in those states. What the Supreme Court seems to have done is move away from judicial activism in favor of originalism – the idea that they should stay true to the original intentions of the Founders when they drafted the Constitution. Maybe that’s one bias the Supreme Court ought to always have. Have a wonderful weekend! | "Forward this email to a friend!" | | Warm regards, Douglas Carswell President & CEO | | |

name: Candace Owens, Co-founder of BLEXIT
subject: The most personal email I’ve ever sent you
body:
I must share my story and tell you why I created the BLEXIT Foundation.

[](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a3f422c9afaa45819187aca835c20736&_e=aEZD89p0p4OplZunoj5_VwXUCBAK1Q3tzhhJRG5DT-DUCQE0zPoqGmBELtB2QC5jnqF7D00ww188lECQH_BkstGW04lSHvCFKfSOOrPnpctVI6loDF2AEpgpsbKfM1WpR8WZD4GjhTqfF_Op1a2ys4GpVZafvREHI9DzgvzhMeTUjSwoPaJ1x4Vh-sU8QvZ29MYix9bxLwQRU_RfqHgUB-G-lx68Rv19Uq9XGpzp-PxQxee9JavD9hj0sGw_QsHxuR7CADgpqMbydeeU1E2vpd3wLhdbMXaRrqHbk2PocTg%3D)

Friend,

This is the most personal and vulnerable email I have ever sent you... But I must share my story and tell you why I created the BLEXIT Foundation.

Before I share my story, allow me to introduce the BLEXIT Foundation.

**For too long, I have watched Black Americans force-fed a message of victimhood, fear, defeat, and dependence. And, this has to stop.** In 2019, with Brandon Tatum, we created BLEXIT Foundation - a nonprofit organization - dedicated to bringing traditional American principles and a message of empowerment to urban minority communities.

Our message to America's black and minority communities is that you are not a victim. We promote economic independence and individual freedom, strengthening the nuclear family, and fostering a deeper appreciation for patriotism in Black American culture.

[_**Please support the BLEXIT Foundation 's mission today by helping me reach our goal of raising $25,000 from new online donors. You can click here to donate.**_](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a3f422c9afaa45819187aca835c20736&_e=aEZD89p0p4OplZunoj5_VwXUCBAK1Q3tzhhJRG5DT-DUCQE0zPoqGmBELtB2QC5jnqF7D00ww188lECQH_BkstGW04lSHvCFKfSOOrPnpctVI6loDF2AEpgpsbKfM1WpR8WZD4GjhTqfF_Op1a2ys4Vgu6TlgCG9bnSJtm3ZFEXfjDIfnmRUxjtAttADE7cmyqwjwIvQPpsT-jxbTnaWTrOKs2PiPwDa1tXFdll3Pk_QO7UtzT8MUjznNc6-RgP8jcqDTGEW04-ejbmO205CRzEGlIxIAlImzktMzex7wH4%3D)

**_Now I 'll share my story_... racism, death threats, and empowering black communities.**

Growing up as a black woman, I can recall learning how "helpless" I was told I was. And this message - which the media forces Black Americans to listen to - is heartbreaking.

We're taught to believe we're victims, that nothing will ever change, the police are our enemies, and racism prevents us from ever achieving our goals.

This is WRONG.

I've dealt with racism... _**I 've even received death threats**_. Racism is an ugly form of collectivism and is unacceptable.

But the solution is NOT to become a victim and give up.

I created the BLEXIT Foundation to empower black communities, minorities, and the people in my life whom I love. Since our start in 2019, BLEXIT has grown substantially with over 41 grassroots chapter programs in 41 states, over 14,000 volunteer members and local community leaders, and nearly 60,000 grassroots supporters.

[_**Friend, I am inviting you to support the BLEXIT Foundation and help us spread our winning message of entrepreneurship, school choice, faith, and family. My goal is to raise $25,000 from online supporters to fund our mission. Please click here to donate $10, $50, $100, $250, $500, $1,000 or any amount. **_](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a3f422c9afaa45819187aca835c20736&_e=aEZD89p0p4OplZunoj5_VwXUCBAK1Q3tzhhJRG5DT-DUCQE0zPoqGmBELtB2QC5jnqF7D00ww188lECQH_BkstGW04lSHvCFKfSOOrPnpctVI6loDF2AEpgpsbKfM1WpR8WZD4GjhTqfF_Op1a2ys6EGI7VO_pinBDMfOLJy7PfOvbfilE7i79ml2wWc4OUU1qJz30Up3FP3kkL4ErppH_NaHe3t8q7cfRXvlRsQTUASP7TJhgJbcuRKDSsPK29MKHR95tDh1Ijbv4xdFKcNR-Mkftqhrmr4weY-3dxetLA%3D)

I am breaking the rules.

It seems like every email I receive in my inbox engages in fear-mongering, makes big promises, and demands you and I make a donation without any of the details... _I 'm not doing that_.

You should know the details, believe in our mission, and understand how BLEXIT is changing the direction of our urban communities and our country.

So I am taking a risk by sending you a long email with all the details to empower YOU to choose to support the BLEXIT Foundation.**Please read to the end of this email (I have an important message at the end you don 't want to miss).**

When I founded BLEXIT, I wanted to make sure above all else we were NOT just a "think tank", but rather we pride ourselves on being a thoughtful and quick acting "DO-tank". We're doing things no other organization in the country is doing.

Here are the BLEXIT Foundation's values, what we're doing to reach Black communities, and what we're fighting for:

* **School Choice:** Often, the people allegedly "fighting for minorities" are doing everything in their power to keep Black and Hispanic students locked into awful schools.

The ugly truth is that these schools are simply brainwashing centers attacking the nuclear family, creating victims, and teaching their twisted values. BLEXIT is fighting for School Choice to empower young Black and Hispanic students to learn real skills, have more opportunities, and escape poverty. [_**You can support BLEXIT 's efforts to fight for School Choice here >>>**_](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a3f422c9afaa45819187aca835c20736&_e=aEZD89p0p4OplZunoj5_VwXUCBAK1Q3tzhhJRG5DT-DUCQE0zPoqGmBELtB2QC5jnqF7D00ww188lECQH_BkstGW04lSHvCFKfSOOrPnpctVI6loDF2AEpgpsbKfM1WpR8WZD4GjhTqfF_Op1a2ys0HEVZ_G1-YXHvriNiTNycR4OH9nKMIuvrXoYU4wReHDQvXNOtyQMKam1F68auVhX4VsmX55ih8YZX1m-qm4XC9sKCoiCj7NFnEJXGmGz8M700wEd3_29dct66N8sIJTvEdq7Ba_1o9OiKXZ7D9NQ50%3D)

* **Criminal Justice Reform:** The mainstream media wants urban communities to hate our law enforcement officers. This ugly message is setting Black Americans back. The BLEXIT Foundation supports our men and women who serve as police officers and defend our communities.

Yes, we do need criminal justice reform. But we believe cooperating with our police officers and connecting as a community is critical to creating justice. BLEXIT Foundation is starting conversations with police officers and urban communities. The media wants you to believe cops are evil! This is wrong. But people never hear this message.

[_**Help the BLEXIT Foundation change the narrative by making a donation here >>>**_](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a3f422c9afaa45819187aca835c20736&_e=aEZD89p0p4OplZunoj5_VwXUCBAK1Q3tzhhJRG5DT-DUCQE0zPoqGmBELtB2QC5jnqF7D00ww188lECQH_BkstGW04lSHvCFKfSOOrPnpctVI6loDF2AEpgpsbKfM1WpR8WZD4GjhTqfF_Op1a2ys-QFeZjfOTUa6-SsyBjibdIexS4vI2hp0qnepJrgV0AI5R3Oc6Ohs0_U9RaBfuAyDMZA9viETdKVqNZYsLy4FBePSohSoIrAhCFXcS6F33FebKw_bc1btGp2TJZLPjoE8NfrLjrJTmjua81bchVGgiw%3D)

* **Entrepreneurship:** I am passionate about empowering Black and Hispanic Americans. Free markets, responsibility, and advancing the careers of urban communities is the solution to poverty. The BLEXIT Foundation identifies young leaders in urban communities and helps them create resumes, practice interviews, and learn skills employers desire.

BLEXIT is not a book club or simply talking a big game... No, we're actually making an impact with real individuals committed to serving urban communities. [_**Please help the BLEXIT Foundation encourage entrepreneurship and empower Black and Hispanic communities by donating here >>>**_](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a3f422c9afaa45819187aca835c20736&_e=aEZD89p0p4OplZunoj5_VwXUCBAK1Q3tzhhJRG5DT-DUCQE0zPoqGmBELtB2QC5jnqF7D00ww188lECQH_BkstGW04lSHvCFKfSOOrPnpctVI6loDF2AEpgpsbKfM1WpR8WZD4GjhTqfF_Op1a2ysyjhLgIAkaAOMW7KS1BckhvaDGo43_weDWGJfEvHz1i0yPiH0Mvpkbygq2uEkJ3Zc4hw8FQwZn5Bz95f5_gAnIPKCst0w3Vbx12f3pE4nmWFOqxTGY-km-uBVEIJgArUq-suwSQXoOil1GTPS_Uk8qc%3D)

* **Teaching History: **Critical Race Theory has nothing to do with solving race relations in our country. This is about division and spreading a victimhood message.

The BLEXIT Foundation believes in teaching real American history. It is critical for our urban communities to learn about our Founding Fathers and the Constitution to become productive and educated citizens. [_**Please help the BLEXIT Foundation teach real American history by donating here >>>**_](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a3f422c9afaa45819187aca835c20736&_e=aEZD89p0p4OplZunoj5_VwXUCBAK1Q3tzhhJRG5DT-DUCQE0zPoqGmBELtB2QC5jnqF7D00ww188lECQH_BkstGW04lSHvCFKfSOOrPnpctVI6loDF2AEpgpsbKfM1WpR8WZD4GjhTqfF_Op1a2yszb92L0SNJq7Qotxd4HKomxOyv7uBuUPygP_GnDDoh4KKbMIwuHk7LE7ab8gNg_wf9GcqoLq3JrEwxeBLqVo4eQkPc7BmwMBOaCpPHt3v9iiNZ0MPbG524hAmaDHOYF8B5WNWfHN-uGWF8Kbbi0DyvE%3D)

* **Presenting Our Message: **We have failed to reach urban communities with our message and values. Instead, we've allowed the mainstream media to write the narrative. Not anymore.

The BLEXIT Foundation is going places where no one else goes. We're hosting events in Detroit, Baltimore, and Tampa and starting real conversations. We're not just preaching to the choir, and these aren't boring events. They have music, art, and real conversations, and they are fun! I am committed to reaching urban communities and spreading our message. [_**Please support BLEXIT 's events and help us spread our message by donating here >>>**_](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a3f422c9afaa45819187aca835c20736&_e=aEZD89p0p4OplZunoj5_VwXUCBAK1Q3tzhhJRG5DT-DUCQE0zPoqGmBELtB2QC5jnqF7D00ww188lECQH_BkstGW04lSHvCFKfSOOrPnpctVI6loDF2AEpgpsbKfM1WpR8WZD4GjhTqfF_Op1a2ys9Av23EmRVJ0mDt48XIxJC5JEnVYqU68Fgj9Kg-vNizKhdpEknyl5jilnNdPWlWAV7sehW7gtk7YL0kbAi6qz8HhpfywVX7N7fZWRoARbT0uzqU-V-uJN6EJRCMyYMDN8lpC20DYD8IUlnL2pEbzF_g%3D)

What does "BLEXIT" mean? BLEXIT is the Black exit from the culture of victimhood, fear, and dependence the media has forced on us. If you hold a permanent view of yourself as a victim you become your own oppressor.

This is personal to me.

I was once a slave to a culture of victimhood and became a proud Black patriot.

Friend, I am asking you to join the BLEXIT Foundation by making an investment in our organization. Please use one of the links I've copied below to donate today:

[_**Donate $10 >>>**_](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a3f422c9afaa45819187aca835c20736&_e=aEZD89p0p4OplZunoj5_VwXUCBAK1Q3tzhhJRG5DT-DUCQE0zPoqGmBELtB2QC5jnqF7D00ww188lECQH_BkstGW04lSHvCFKfSOOrPnpctVI6loDF2AEpgpsbKfM1WpL3cH7zNgTGDP33Vgadtt1wWE-v-PW0HQazCPMJ7VYlxrlT90sUkd28PFUhLKleTtgPbPFQWXXVlduf4tXPm4wPaktMioAu6iRZUfbjveuySZkldXqSe-Al_t1mrhzj2C30uDatwcaV4gEaT2TeYE6TRK0CDltbfsGwRE2LrarpA%3D)
[_**Donate $35 >>>**_](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a3f422c9afaa45819187aca835c20736&_e=aEZD89p0p4OplZunoj5_VwXUCBAK1Q3tzhhJRG5DT-DUCQE0zPoqGmBELtB2QC5jnqF7D00ww188lECQH_BkstGW04lSHvCFKfSOOrPnpctVI6loDF2AEpgpsbKfM1Wpl_YjQmvPb8E3XTfm-uHBB6l8ZrH8aix_6mlPu9IMD4iZTDyX5Zyoh-VQYZKofw398yHkGMUdQrlTY3ghda61thV2_yHhaLleb25x19wbYD4Abc27knoZDNqPo_j-yNKngp-qtS4Ko8nm4sENYo8f12_O26GsWHd6re9u5eCuAFg%3D)

This is my last message to you before you close this email.

The BLEXIT Foundation believes in faith, family, and freedom. At the end of the day, our message to urban communities is about love and empowerment.

My burning desire is to use my voice and change the direction of our urban communities and the country. The BLEXIT Foundation has a real impact, and I am inviting you to join our cause.

[_**Please consider making the most generous donation you can today by clicking here.**_](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a3f422c9afaa45819187aca835c20736&_e=aEZD89p0p4OplZunoj5_VwXUCBAK1Q3tzhhJRG5DT-DUCQE0zPoqGmBELtB2QC5jnqF7D00ww188lECQH_BkstGW04lSHvCFKfSOOrPnpctVI6loDF2AEpgpsbKfM1WpR8WZD4GjhTqfF_Op1a2ysxRTuNVoMUvK4cYxYToBCxwl58i-dBALZNLoJqMQ9d_RFFVH1UmQ0_h2cmjMHIKooD0vaLSZTarzBx8U1bPd1AmqXqiOi6UW0QKtk-MkV1OBvOUfrlGKSHSAbTDc_jauqFFkm8p7p4jgD5tnayZNTsI%3D)

Thank you, Friend.

Candace Owens
President
BLEXIT Foundation

Defend the Constitution

clean_body: I must share my story and tell you why I created the BLEXIT Foundation. Friend, This is the most personal and vulnerable email I have ever sent you... But I must share my story and tell you why I created the BLEXIT Foundation. Before I share my story, allow me to introduce the BLEXIT Foundation. For too long, I have watched Black Americans force-fed a message of victimhood, fear, defeat, and dependence. And, this has to stop. In 2019, with Brandon Tatum, we created BLEXIT Foundation - a nonprofit organization - dedicated to bringing traditional American principles and a message of empowerment to urban minority communities. Our message to America's black and minority communities is that you are not a victim. We promote economic independence and individual freedom, strengthening the nuclear family, and fostering a deeper appreciation for patriotism in Black American culture. Now I 'll share my story... racism, death threats, and empowering black communities. Growing up as a black woman, I can recall learning how "helpless" I was told I was. And this message - which the media forces Black Americans to listen to - is heartbreaking. We're taught to believe we're victims, that nothing will ever change, the police are our enemies, and racism prevents us from ever achieving our goals. This is WRONG. I've dealt with racism... I 've even received death threats. Racism is an ugly form of collectivism and is unacceptable. But the solution is NOT to become a victim and give up. I created the BLEXIT Foundation to empower black communities, minorities, and the people in my life whom I love. Since our start in 2019, BLEXIT has grown substantially with over 41 grassroots chapter programs in 41 states, over 14,000 volunteer members and local community leaders, and nearly 60,000 grassroots supporters. I am breaking the rules. It seems like every email I receive in my inbox engages in fear-mongering, makes big promises, and demands you and I make a donation without any of the details... I 'm not doing that. You should know the details, believe in our mission, and understand how BLEXIT is changing the direction of our urban communities and our country. So I am taking a risk by sending you a long email with all the details to empower YOU to choose to support the BLEXIT Foundation.Please read to the end of this email (I have an important message at the end you don 't want to miss). When I founded BLEXIT, I wanted to make sure above all else we were NOT just a "think tank", but rather we pride ourselves on being a thoughtful and quick acting "DO-tank". We're doing things no other organization in the country is doing. Here are the BLEXIT Foundation's values, what we're doing to reach Black communities, and what we're fighting for: School Choice: Often, the people allegedly "fighting for minorities" are doing everything in their power to keep Black and Hispanic students locked into awful schools. The ugly truth is that these schools are simply brainwashing centers attacking the nuclear family, creating victims, and teaching their twisted values. BLEXIT is fighting for School Choice to empower young Black and Hispanic students to learn real skills, have more opportunities, and escape poverty. Criminal Justice Reform: The mainstream media wants urban communities to hate our law enforcement officers. This ugly message is setting Black Americans back. The BLEXIT Foundation supports our men and women who serve as police officers and defend our communities. Yes, we do need criminal justice reform. But we believe cooperating with our police officers and connecting as a community is critical to creating justice. BLEXIT Foundation is starting conversations with police officers and urban communities. The media wants you to believe cops are evil! This is wrong. But people never hear this message. Entrepreneurship: I am passionate about empowering Black and Hispanic Americans. Free markets, responsibility, and advancing the careers of urban communities is the solution to poverty. The BLEXIT Foundation identifies young leaders in urban communities and helps them create resumes, practice interviews, and learn skills employers desire. BLEXIT is not a book club or simply talking a big game... No, we're actually making an impact with real individuals committed to serving urban communities. Teaching History: Critical Race Theory has nothing to do with solving race relations in our country. This is about division and spreading a victimhood message. The BLEXIT Foundation believes in teaching real American history. It is critical for our urban communities to learn about our Founding Fathers and the Constitution to become productive and educated citizens. Presenting Our Message: **We have failed to reach urban communities with our message and values. Instead, we've allowed the mainstream media to write the narrative. Not anymore. The BLEXIT Foundation is going places where no one else goes. We're hosting events in Detroit, Baltimore, and Tampa and starting real conversations. We're not just preaching to the choir, and these aren't boring events. They have music, art, and real conversations, and they are fun! I am committed to reaching urban communities and spreading our message. What does "BLEXIT" mean? BLEXIT is the Black exit from the culture of victimhood, fear, and dependence the media has forced on us. If you hold a permanent view of yourself as a victim you become your own oppressor. This is personal to me. I was once a slave to a culture of victimhood and became a proud Black patriot. Friend, I am asking you to join the BLEXIT Foundation by making an investment in our organization. Please use one of the links I've copied below to donate today: This is my last message to you before you close this email. The BLEXIT Foundation believes in faith, family, and freedom. At the end of the day, our message to urban communities is about love and empowerment. My burning desire is to use my voice and change the direction of our urban communities and the country. The BLEXIT Foundation has a real impact, and I am inviting you to join our cause. Thank you, Friend. Candace Owens President BLEXIT Foundation Defend the Constitution 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 | _

body:

So, **we're extending our deadline** – but only by ONE day – to make sure you get the chance to give so we can fuel our woman-led movement for change!

Jasmine Smith

Peter, we have an update.

We just checked the numbers, and Emerge women WON at a whopping **91% win rate in the spring elections this year! And with a 75% win rate in the primaries** , over 100 Emerge alums will be on the ballot this November!
**The direction of our country is at stake and we can't afford to lose momentum now – we need your help to keep going! **
**[Please: Will you donate $5 or more to activate your Emerge Community Membership now, before the deadline at 11:59 p.m. TONIGHT, and help us empower Democratic women to run for office in every state?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/65763263/414430727/-1986725773?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1231-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkVNUi8xLzgxMzIxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjRiZWVmYjJlLTBmMTgtZWUxMS1hOWJiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=6LXDnaoyVQHoOHMuT7HTQkhkRfjhxRprr5jna45m6so=)**

The stakes are high, Peter: Republican lawmakers are hellbent on attacking our basic rights, from abortion access to the right to vote. They're not letting up for a minute, and neither can we. **That's why we MUST empower bold Democratic women to run, win, and replace GOP extremists at every level of our government. **
More Democratic women are stepping up to **defend access to lifesaving health care, lower everyday costs for working families, and turn our country around**. But they’re looking to Emerge for the training and support they need to win. **We need your help to have their backs in the fight ahead, but we haven’t heard from you yet:**

_**Supporter ID: dpwillis67@gmail.com**_

**Our communities win when we get strong new candidates on the ballot.** That's why Emerge's programs recruit and train women who reflect the communities they serve: Black, Brown, and Indigenous women, women of color, LGBTQ+ women, and young and unmarried women, who are all part of the New American Majority. And we don't just recruit and train – our programs are proven to _win, _too. **But it takes a whole movement – including you – to shatter glass ceilings in politics and empower leaders who put people first. **
**[Time is running out, and we need you with us, Peter! So please: Donate $5 or more now to activate your Emerge Community Membership and empower Democratic women to run and win in 2023 and beyond!](https://click.everyaction.com/k/65763266/414430731/-1986725773?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1231-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkVNUi8xLzgxMzIxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjRiZWVmYjJlLTBmMTgtZWUxMS1hOWJiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=6LXDnaoyVQHoOHMuT7HTQkhkRfjhxRprr5jna45m6so=)**

We need to hear from you!

|

Friend,

House Republicans have reached out multiple times, yet we still haven't heard from you!

We wanted to reach out **ONE LAST TIME** and invite you to renew your 2023 sustaining membership. After today, you will be **REMOVED** from our membership roster.
**You 've fought with us for three consecutive years, and we need you to stick by our side as we go into battle this year.**

Renewing your membership is of critical importance to the future of the Republican party.

**Here 's why renewing your membership for 2023 is so important:**
1. You will be supporting conservatives across the country as they go on offense and bring the fight to the Radical Democrats.
2. You will be supporting our efforts to hold Joe Biden and the Radical Left accountable for their corruption and failures.
3. You will be an essential part of defending our majority and fighting for conservative values.

**[We can't do it without you. Renew your membership before it's too late](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2z9ka88pgbrl5pj3idjsud3fhvk876d917e77455o_rp22sh2s8i66o70s9j60o72c1h2bs "We can’t do it without you. Renew your membership before it’s too late")**

name: Ryan Zinke - Navy SEAL
subject: Closing the curtains on my campaign
disclaimer_text: Paid for by ZINKE FOR CONGRESS
body:
This is serious.

| |
---
| | | I'm at my wits' end, Patriot.

Biden and the Democrats just have too much power, too many connections, and too much in their fundraising war chest. Now their sights are set on me.

At this point, if I don't do a total 180 on the fundraising front, not only will I lose my House seat, Republicans may never hold the majority in Congress again.
**This is Ryan Zinke. I served as President Trump 's Secretary of the Interior and I was the commander at SEAL Team 6.**
**I 'm also running for Congress in the most critical race in the nation.**
But if Biden can destroy me in this race, I can guarantee you no other Republican will have a chance.
**In 2022, I lead the team of Navy SEAL 's that retook the House Majority, and I have more battle experience than anyone else. Point is, I'm one of the toughest, most battle-tested Republicans in Washington D.C. If I can't beat the Democrats gunning for my seat - no one can.**

---
| [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62901532:JXANS2INV:m:1:3299561967:D754D5C81A2E4A3AC503C669CFC3AC7C:r)
---

So, I'm going to be blunt with you, Friend. **[If you chip in any amount right now,](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62901532:JXANS2INV:m:1:3299561967:D754D5C81A2E4A3AC503C669CFC3AC7C:r "If you
chip in just $5 right now,")** I can promise you that we will blow my fundraising goal out of the water and ruin Biden's plan to destroy our nation.

I'm humbly asking you, as a warrior who's fought for this nation for my entire life, will you help me out?

---
| | [DONATE TODAY](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62901532:JXANS2INV:m:1:3299561967:D754D5C81A2E4A3AC503C669CFC3AC7C:r)
---

You have my word, as a former Navy SEAL and commander at SEAL Team 6, if you help me out, I will continue to return the favor in Congress.

Thank you for your support,
Ryan Zinke

---
| | [DONATE TODAY](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62901532:JXANS2INV:m:1:3299561967:D754D5C81A2E4A3AC503C669CFC3AC7C:r)
---
| |
* * *
Ryan Zinke is a fifth generation Montanan who has dedicated his life to serving our great nation. Ryan is a decorated U.S. Navy SEAL officer who retired after 23 years of military service. After the military, Ryan served two terms as a State Senator, was twice elected as Montana's Congressman, and served two years as U.S. Secretary of the Interior under President Trump. Now after a couple quiet years spent with his family, he is serving again in Congress to help save America from threats we face both foreign and domestic.

**[SUPPORT HIS FIGHT TODAY](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62901533:JXANS2INV:m:1:3299561967:D754D5C81A2E4A3AC503C669CFC3AC7C:r "SUPPORT HIS FIGHT TODAY")**
---
| Paid for by ZINKE FOR CONGRESS
---
704C EAST 13TH ST
SUITE 260
WHITEFISH, MT 59937

name: Friends of the Earth
subject: Match Extended: It’s not too late yet
body:
| | | | | [](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/e_s17_main_cobrandedemail_c3)
---|---|---

| | We didn't want to send this email, Friend, but we really don't have a choice. **Yesterday, we fell short of our Fiscal Year End fundraising goal \-- at the worst possible time for our planet and the countless lives that depend on it. ** The stakes are far too high to miss this goal: **Greedy chemical companies are driving a massive decline of our precious bees. Our oceans are filling with toxic garbage. And endangered species everywhere are struggling to survive as Big Oil wrecks their ecosystems for profits. That's why our generous donors agreed to EXTEND our rare 2X match -- but ONLY until midnight TONIGHT. We urgently need environmentalists like you to step up while this opportunity lasts. Here's where your record stands:** | | **Fiscal Year End Record**
---
**EMAIL:** dpwillis67@gmail.com
**MATCH STATUS: EXPIRING at 11:59 p.m.**
**FISCAL YEAR END DONATION: STILL PENDING. [GIVE NOW.](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1858229?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)** **PEOPLE NEEDED IN YOUR CITY TO GIVE: 5 MORE**
---
_If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
| | [$30 donation + $30 match = $60 impact](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1858230?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
| | [$60 donation + $60 match = $120 impact](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1858231?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
| | [$120 donation + $120 match = $240 impact](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1858232?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
| | [Double another amount](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1858233?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
_Records reflect most recently available data. __Match extension expires 11:59 p.m._
---
[](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1858234?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
The end of the fiscal year isn't a game to us, Friend. There's no scoreboard -- just the ongoing fight to stop Big Polluters and ensure that our planet survives. We set our initial goal at $150,000 because that's the MINIMUM we need to power our efforts forward. **Every single dollar is accounted for in our battle to protect vital habitats for helpless animals, get toxic waste out of our food chain and waterways, and protect our planet from fossil fuel-driven destruction.** When we miss our goal, this battle gets even more difficult to fight.
Falling short means we have to scale back on our work to hold Big Polluters accountable, mobilizing organizers on the ground and keeping the pressure on lawmakers to pass the planet-saving policies we desperately need. **That's why this match extension is so critical. And we're counting on you -- our planet is counting on you -- to help make up this budget shortfall with your membership support today. **
[**So please: Rush your $30 donation now before our rare match EXTENSION expires at 11:59 p.m. tonight, and every dollar will be DOUBLED -- up to our $150,000 goal -- to fight for our only Earth.**](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1858235?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)

Erich Pica

subject: Fourth of July weekend
disclaimer_text: paid for by the Keith Ellison for Attorney General committee, PO Box 17224, Minneapolis, MN 55417 Keith Ellison for Attorney General
body:
Team, I really can’t thank you enough. Because of your support, we were once again able to meet our end-of-quarter fundraising goal and then some. | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65769846/414456069/-2071362928?refcode=header&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS85MDI1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1OWI1MWY4Zi0xNzE4LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Ask2ZA2ist3wMDwodalX8HqMjasDn754dyRrgSGKsA4=)

Team,
I really can’t thank you enough. Because of your support, we were once again able to meet our end-of-quarter fundraising goal and then some.
There is nothing more patriotic than standing up for what you believe in, rolling up your sleeves, and getting to work to make a difference. This Fourth, I want you to know it is the honor of my life to serve you and fight for your ability to live with safety, dignity, and respect.
It’s only with your continued support that I’m able to do the work I do every single day.
Thanks again for everything. Happy Fourth to you and your loved ones.
With gratitude,
Keith Ellison

| | Peter, we hit our FIRST-EVER End-of-Quarter goal late last night and ended up raising $1.7 million! name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: What are your thoughts?
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vsXVQ4BD0N

ACI - Religious Liberty Survey

I am fearful that legal persecution will intensify
against Americans holding to faith-based values

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/osXVQ4BD0N

Fellow
American,

There is
a very concerning trend occurring in our country that has me
worried for Americans who hold to biblical & faith-based values.

After the
Respect for Marriage Act was passed by a bi-partisan effort and
signed into law, I am fearful that legal persecution will only
intensify against Americans holding to faith-based values and who
wish to conduct their lives according to their faith.

Are you
concerned that America is abandoning a basic tenet of our
founding-Religious Liberty?

In
addition to the passing of the Respect for Marriage Act, numerous
examples over the past decade have concerned me: KENNEDY v.
BREMERTON SCHOOL DISTRICT, MASTERPIECE CAKESHOP v. COLORADO CIVIL
RIGHTS COMMISSION, and 303 CREATIVE v. ELENIS are just a few
examples of legal persecution against Americans holding to
faith-based values who wish to conduct their lives according to
their faith.

Furthermore, an amendment to the Respect for Marriage Act,
brought forth by Senator Mike Lee, prohibiting the Federal
Government from retaliating against schools, businesses, and
organizations because of their religious beliefs about same-sex
marriage failed.

This has
the potential to only intensify legal persecution against
individuals, businesses, churches, and nonprofits holding to
faith-based values.

The
American Cornerstone Institute is a non-profit that I founded to
preserve and promote the cornerstones that laid the foundation
for the greatest nation the world has ever seen: Faith, Liberty,
Community, and Life.

Whether
it is a football coach losing his job for praying at midfield
after a game, or a baker being sued for not wanting to bake a
cake that violates his religious values, are you concerned as I
am with the increase in legal persecution against Americans who
wish to conduct their lives according to their faith?

Please
share your thoughts in this quick 2-minute survey concerning
religious liberty in America.
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61975160:sXVQ4BD0N:m:3:2532013465:DF2EB0A3588D1F9C95FB28820309685F:r

Thank you
for your consideration.

Regards,

Dr. Ben
Carson
Founder &
Chairman American Cornerstone Institute

Your
donation to ACI helps us to focus on our mission of promoting and
preserving individual and religious liberty, helping our
country's most vulnerable find new hope, and developing methods
to decrease the federal government's role in society and to
improve efficiency to best serve ALL our nation's citizens.

Copyright
© 2023 American Cornerstone Institute, All rights reserved.

This message was intended for: dpwillis67@gmail.com
You were added to the system January 18, 2022.

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/isXVQ4BD0N
