It’s been a while since we’ve spoken, Friend, but I have something very important for you. Senate Republicans and our nation are facing the most consequential election of our lives in 2024. If we’re going to **save America** as we know it, it’s going to take a united effort among ALL of us. We**know** the radical Left and the Fake News media will pull out all the stops. _ _ _2024 is months away, but**KEY** America First Republicans have already **endorsed** our movement to **Make America Great Again.** Senator and Chairman of the NRSC, Steve Daines, the great Senator from Ohio, JD Vance, Senator Marsha Blackburn, AND more are already on board. _ I know you’re a dedicated Republican and supporter of the America First Movement, so I have an essential ask of you, Friend. Can you take the [**2023 Voter Verification Questionnaire today?**](http://links.right-gop.com/u/click?_t=2ba4f933732b46f5b6eae32741d1832c&_m=2e8dc48ca2324af2b07c200070bdef95&_e=k-hB82l-_M2S85xVBavKhyWmJSosm-6gGb0G0lNNlcO2ZExh7ZB92yG9X6FYkha3L1Z03wxrVCeA-O_Kc9fptHRYyxaS8whD6BwEyk5r7pOlEzDN9WdAnFb-smju69Ok2H81-DA1qI6SyqZ7ZpfujmCjcFafB9ZpPzn4I1QhgHmMPcJ3O2fcsxRShFxECTwnm9H-Y21BCKKdSlvVLZHD_YJa_UKI9tRejzNfzY4PV_OZWMGV8Ian38dZwlWRiCpFhuwhl03d5KgZb8y0gTfX6ypPoMGB-xoGHUq5p7BD3JbWKjd7i2BIQ_JIPQUbmX7XG0lAL0bZni1ha3jbfAb-TQUXMNaVUX2srFPkNOdiP01sbFRVh8PNKjX5RoJ1IfocWeRYCT9JXezWcKQKPCnp54Ig8PlImM3Bm_8DLUpyeDGYyLd5TPtAPHuLIfte4_SEpgmw3ccsHijMgbgi_38fjInTpxDOooEZG5F07i_8Xbw%3D) My team wants to update Senate Leadership about the results from your **Voter Verification Questionnaire** soon – please help our Party save America TODAY! name: Chuck Grassley
subject: You need to hear this from me.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Grassley Committee, Inc
body:
I have got to get this off my chest.

| [ ](http://links.grassleyworks.com/u/click?_t=65a7ce1d347445428d0d4f22dfbcf47b&_m=9187c0e307e743f5b9975c583b8b117a&_e=eg86DeKWZVUh2kCZb8YfOMUGgjT6I367F9XmT7t6-8_NJ3aYU-5pg2V6sMFqXucex1arPdDeTucRkhOfUBwDnkq3eEAbkm7TQ68UPV-N9hTxUf28HCv35s52ymxzJY4PVbNjBaSDk6jiFBXvLmlLQih3fvID1vVSDuNRFGDIXrX8XCeqRjjsOeREm0U8dENzAYQsIcvl3UmqrK5S5DuMVe_CeValIbJYkKZzftLmYv45-yD8sChvIEBYFTsyuyxTld2o0fzbBr3Z2qJwB5Z41fbi9Dv-x0RvHrzRGVByvfQ%3D)
---
Friend,

I hate to say this - but we missed our End of Quarter fundraising goal.

**This was one of the biggest pushes we 've had so far this year -- and it is troubling to tell you we missed it. We are SO CLOSE to being able to show the Democrats that we are READY for them in 2024.**

I wanted to let you know how close we are to reaching our goal. **In fact -- we are only $250 away...**

We can't leave the race so close to the finish line. [**If you and nine other patriots contributed $25, we could make up lost ground and finish this quarterly deadline in a winning position.**](http://links.grassleyworks.com/u/click?_t=65a7ce1d347445428d0d4f22dfbcf47b&_m=9187c0e307e743f5b9975c583b8b117a&_e=eg86DeKWZVUh2kCZb8YfOMUGgjT6I367F9XmT7t6-8_NJ3aYU-5pg2V6sMFqXucex1arPdDeTucRkhOfUBwDnkq3eEAbkm7TQ68UPV-N9hTQ6ZTjwlk7COec0rNyd8iYl0JN-hGscTLQzVifRiqUA5MeGuSZV8tNegWfW5z4vH3KI9_stHxy3dMohA4n8pDl0_k7Spm36eZrXxFDAoWVd9yCjbHZM1Oy0_cZ3tKPAgQrkHh1rDIyxUU8iLWqL3eMNNytZaye2MtjZe_ukhteWNUqLhN2M8b604Id8NNXRvY%3D) | [**RUSH $25 TO MAKE THE DEADLINE** ](http://links.grassleyworks.com/u/click?_t=65a7ce1d347445428d0d4f22dfbcf47b&_m=9187c0e307e743f5b9975c583b8b117a&_e=eg86DeKWZVUh2kCZb8YfOMUGgjT6I367F9XmT7t6-8_NJ3aYU-5pg2V6sMFqXucex1arPdDeTucRkhOfUBwDnkq3eEAbkm7TQ68UPV-N9hTQ6ZTjwlk7COec0rNyd8iYl0JN-hGscTLQzVifRiqUA4l0qQw17CXacIny5fl4IfsJwLEsZwqAWlosCYLCrv6yK-760pYfRBA4wDpwyCeHHa3pOsvDKny4sFI3xHyDeAnJDX7HBJd444BZkxqDJfYLTwCLryWhHaluh-3hlQQMDapCm3BY0oaPnYHY259AUx0%3D)
---

With your support, we can hold our heads high this month, knowing that when the Democrats come after us, they'll run straight into **a solid wall of PATRIOTS ready to stop them from increasing their stranglehold on this nation.**

[**If you could chip in ANYTHING, I would appreciate it sincerely.**](http://links.grassleyworks.com/u/click?_t=65a7ce1d347445428d0d4f22dfbcf47b&_m=9187c0e307e743f5b9975c583b8b117a&_e=eg86DeKWZVUh2kCZb8YfOMUGgjT6I367F9XmT7t6-8_NJ3aYU-5pg2V6sMFqXucex1arPdDeTucRkhOfUBwDnkq3eEAbkm7TQ68UPV-N9hTQ6ZTjwlk7COec0rNyd8iYl0JN-hGscTLQzVifRiqUA6JuunQFj_kGG2vW_b5CKbldeCHehS2EWe5mADP2houA6lbY8lVhp-3LV4XNqhkuCEcKBkl7tfnY0ucVF7pvEsa0s3LpxwEiwkRgcK-Hz9X1fWpDa-L2QX9AW_zPZi_Kizxc-5qAtnG_HezDAtEVhm0%3D)

Thank you and God Bless,

Chuck Grassley

clean_body: I have got to get this off my chest. | Friend, I hate to say this - but we missed our End of Quarter fundraising goal. This was one of the biggest pushes we 've had so far this year -- and it is troubling to tell you we missed it. We are SO CLOSE to being able to show the Democrats that we are READY for them in 2024. I wanted to let you know how close we are to reaching our goal. In fact -- we are only $250 away... We can't leave the race so close to the finish line. | With your support, we can hold our heads high this month, knowing that when the Democrats come after us, they'll run straight into a solid wall of PATRIOTS ready to stop them from increasing their stranglehold on this nation. Thank you and God Bless, Chuck Grassley Sent from my iPhone Paid for by The Grassley Committee, Inc. Copyright (C) 2023 The Grassley Committee, All rights reserved.

body:
McDow for you!
| | **Can't see this message?_[View in a browser](https://www.mcdowforcongress.com/so/8aOaHaZqO/c?w=5rknx0Huhud3bYut8PWwXbSSBahKP2qCW4eTbakorsA.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cubWNkb3dmb3Jjb25ncmVzcy5jb20vc28vOGFPYUhhWnFPP2xhbmd1YWdlVGFnPWVuIiwibSI6Im1haWwiLCJjIjoiODc3MjdiYzItNTJkMS00MDNjLWE1ZDUtNGEyNDQ1ZDg5NTU1In0)_**

| | |
---
| |
# Hello,
---
| | As an African American, I am concerned about the precedent established this week from our US Supreme Court. I am very concerned with the 3[03 CREATIVE LLC ET AL. v. ELENIS ET AL. case. ](https://www.mcdowforcongress.com/so/8aOaHaZqO/c?w=3-JJvX9cEfKJuFP_IBQzahP2gn_dd5CH7jPhTwf489A.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuc3VwcmVtZWNvdXJ0Lmdvdi9vcGluaW9ucy8yMnBkZi8yMS00NzZfYzE4NS5wZGYiLCJyIjoiZDEwYmJlMDYtZTRhMy00Y2EwLTgzYjEtZDgyOTdhY2NlMjU0IiwibSI6Im1haWwiLCJjIjoiODc3MjdiYzItNTJkMS00MDNjLWE1ZDUtNGEyNDQ1ZDg5NTU1In0)The legal precedent established in this case basically says, "I can't discriminate against a protected class; however, I can choose how I serve a protected class based on my personal convictions." In other words, a business can choose to serve me food; however, it can choose to serve me from a back window or a basement if the owner or his clients feel my presence offends their deeply held convictions. On the surface some may say, "Go to another business." TRUE! But where does it stop? And if I know human nature this could end in an ugly and perhaps, segregationist place where ALL protected classes could be descmininated against. I do believe in the First Admenment. However, in a democracy that is based on commerce, we can not tolerate this. We have to agree on a basic truths: You can live in any community you want; you can believe what you want; however, in business you cannot disrupt the free trade of commerce. If you agree please support me. I will fight for you and your loved ones. Best, Stephen
---

name: Emily's iPhone
subject: less than $1,000
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gillibrand for Senate
body:
| | |
---
Friend, it's Emily from Team Gillibrand. I'll give you the bad news first: Last night, we missed our $50,000 end-of-quarter goal by less than $1,000.
I know that this was an ambitious goal from the start. But these are the kinds of numbers we need to be putting up to compete with GOP megadonors and defend our narrow Senate majority. I know that less than $1,000 might not sound like much, but in an election year like this one, it can make all the difference.
**Thankfully, there's some good news too:_If everyone reading this email chips in even just $5, we could hit our goal today and start the third quarter on a strong foot._**
Because you're one of Kirsten's most reliable supporters, I need you with me on this. **Please, will you chip in $5 (or $10 or whatever you can spare today) to hit this goal and ensure that we can send Kirsten back to the Senate and defend our Democratic majority? Here's your own personal donation link:[secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/gfs_fr_defend-senate-2023](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65772380/414465134/-2054302023?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk4263-fr-nd-nat&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNzNiNzU3NC0xYzE4LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aVZf6IaWM3nqAertn8JgJ3YZ6Tqt74BkfesydHgCWxo=)**
GOP opponents will begin jumping into this race any day now. We've got to get back on track ASAP to show Kirsten's rivals that this seat isn't up for grabs. Can I count on you to help out tonight?

Thanks so much,

Emily (Kirsten's digital director)

Sent from iPhone
|
* * *
| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65772381/414465135/1575385346?refcode=jtk4263-fr-nd-nat&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNzNiNzU3NC0xYzE4LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aVZf6IaWM3nqAertn8JgJ3YZ6Tqt74BkfesydHgCWxo=) A note from Kirsten: Friend, I can’t thank you enough for standing by my side in the critical fights ahead of us. As Democrats face our toughest Senate map in decades, I need your help more than ever. While Republicans only have to defend 10 seats in 2024, Democrats have to defend 23 – and if the GOP flips just two of them, it will deliver Senate control back to Mitch McConnell. Now, Nate Silver’s FiveThirtyEight is saying that the GOP has a clear path to the majority. As right-wing special interests gear up to pour millions into flipping the Senate, we need to fight back right now. But I refuse to take a single cent from corporate PACs, which means I’m relying on your grassroots support. [**So please, chip in to help defend our narrow Democratic Senate majority.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65772382/414465136/1575385346?refcode=jtk4263-fr-nd-nat&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNzNiNzU3NC0xYzE4LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aVZf6IaWM3nqAertn8JgJ3YZ6Tqt74BkfesydHgCWxo=) And if you’d like to become a core member of my team and receive exclusive texts from my campaign, [**text JOIN to 60708.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65772383/414465137/1575385346?refcode=jtk4263-fr-nd-nat&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNzNiNzU3NC0xYzE4LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aVZf6IaWM3nqAertn8JgJ3YZ6Tqt74BkfesydHgCWxo=) Thank you, Kirsten Gillibrand

Radical Republicans are willing to lie about the outcomes of elections and steal power from the people. clean_body: Our work to elect Democrats up and down the ballot is more important than ever. | = Hi Peter, and first things first: Thank you for standing with me. Grassroots donors like you stepped up and united to make our major end-of-quarter fundraising push successful. It means so much to be able to count on you in the fight to elect Democrats. Peter, our next general election is just about a year and a half away. It might not seem that pressing to think about November 2024 now. But it is. 2024 is the best opportunity we’ve had since 2008 to flip North Carolina to blue for the Presidential election. But even more than that, it’s when we MUST keep the Governor’s Mansion blue, break the GOP supermajorities and elect Democratic candidates across the ballot. Radical Republicans are willing to lie about the outcomes of elections and steal power from the people. They are willing to go to any lengths to enact an extremist agenda that simply isn’t what most of us want. Banning abortion. Attacking LGBTQ+ North Carolinians. Undermining our public schools. Peter, it’s up to us to secure North Carolina’s future. = | = = = Thank you for joining me in this critical work. Roy Cooper = = = Send donations via check to: Cooper for North Carolina PO Box 1190 Raleigh, NC 27602 Thank you! mailto:info@roycooper.com | Cooper for North Carolina PO Box 1190 Raleigh, NC 27602 United States Paid for by Cooper for North Carolina Any donor history information in this email reflects what we have on file for this specific email address. Bad news, Peter: The Supreme Court blocked President Biden’s $400 billion student debt forgiveness plan.
For America’s students and their families, the student debt crisis has been _devastating_. **Predatory lenders and for-profit colleges have forced hundreds of thousands of Americans into crippling debt – just because they got an education.**
That’s why I’ve been working hard since day one to stop predatory, for-profit colleges from targeting low-income students with sham promises – and why I’ve stood up to the loan sharks who take advantage of vulnerable Black and Latinx communities. **But this looming disaster is just too big for us to take on alone. **
**SCOTUS has failed us – so I’m calling on Congress to step in and put an end to the student debt crisis and give everyone in this country a chance at a brighter future.**
**[_Will you add your name to my petition to call on Congress to take action to END the student debt crisis now?_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65774757/414474596/-1093389448?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&ask=250,100,50,25,5&code=jtk1130-su-nd&refcode=jtk1130-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NGY0ZDRhNS0yMDE4LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sDOYZf9S4pKuxtkcvUUSiv3d2zaXshK4G4OVbvY0BiA=&emci=57cda728-c516-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=74f4d4a5-2018-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=25369504)**
| | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65774758/414474599/-1093389448?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&ask=250,100,50,25,5&code=jtk1130-su-nd&refcode=jtk1130-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NGY0ZDRhNS0yMDE4LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sDOYZf9S4pKuxtkcvUUSiv3d2zaXshK4G4OVbvY0BiA=&emci=57cda728-c516-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=74f4d4a5-2018-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=25369504)
---
Everyone deserves an equal chance to succeed – but the predatory practices of lenders and for-profit colleges have left thousands of students struggling to keep their heads above water. And these same institutions have targeted Black and Latinx communities with higher loan rates – making student debt an issue of racial injustice.
I won’t stop fighting this systemic injustice here in New York – but it’s not enough. Now that SCOTUS has blocked Biden’s plan to alleviate the student debt crisis, we need congressional action _now_. **I need at least 10,000 fearless fighters to sign my petition and join me in telling Congress: We can’t let students suffer under crippling debt any longer. **
**[_Will you click here to add your name and join the fight against the student debt crisis? SCOTUS has ruled against us, so we need Congress’ help to stand up for students everywhere._](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65774759/414474600/-1093389448?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&ask=250,100,50,25,5&code=jtk1130-su-nd&refcode=jtk1130-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NGY0ZDRhNS0yMDE4LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sDOYZf9S4pKuxtkcvUUSiv3d2zaXshK4G4OVbvY0BiA=&emci=57cda728-c516-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=74f4d4a5-2018-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=25369504)**
I’m so grateful for your support as we fight for a better future for all,

Letitia James

I need at least 10,000 fearless fighters to sign my petition and join me in telling Congress: We can’t let students suffer under crippling debt any longer. I’m so grateful for your support as we fight for a better future for all, Letitia James | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. James for NY PO Box 476 New York, NY 10034 United States | | Paid for by James for NY 2026

name: Trump News HQ
subject: Can I get your thoughts on religious liberty in America?
body:
There is a very concerning trend occurring in our country that has me worried

|
---
| | | [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zs450h53cv7ggn30nca8a2viiipmpdm9gktbg9s8_rp22sh2s8i66o70s9j61o34cdh2bs)
---
| Fellow American,

There is a very concerning trend occurring in our country that has me worried for Americans who hold to biblical & faith-based values. [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z9a34g7c61vs4089a0ilo6pe2tdlfqum2png5n4g_rp22sh2s8i66o70s9j61o34cdh2bs) After the _Respect for Marriage Act_ was passed by a bi-partisan effort and signed into law, I am fearful that legal persecution will only intensify against Americans holding to faith-based values and who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith.

[**Are you concerned that America is abandoning a basic tenet of our founding -_Religious Liberty?_**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zreb8qc9l35l1npqkq70k3ij46mencm956cqkq4o_rp22sh2s8i66o70s9j61o34cdh2bs)

In addition to the passing of the _Respect for Marriage Act_ , numerous examples over the past decade have concerned me: KENNEDY v. BREMERTON SCHOOL DISTRICT, MASTERPIECE CAKESHOP v. COLORADO CIVIL RIGHTS COMMISSION, and 303 CREATIVE v. ELENIS are just a few examples of legal persecution against Americans holding to faith-based values who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith.

Furthermore, an amendment to the _Respect for Marriage Act_ , brought forth by Senator Mike Lee, prohibiting the Federal Government from retaliating against schools, businesses, and organizations because of their religious beliefs about same-sex marriage failed.

**This has the potential to only intensify legal persecution against individuals, businesses, churches, and nonprofits holding to faith-based values. **

The American Cornerstone Institute is a non-profit that I founded to preserve and promote the cornerstones that laid the foundation for the greatest nation the world has ever seen: Faith, Liberty, Community, and Life.

Whether it is a football coach losing his job for praying at midfield after a game, or a baker being sued for not wanting to bake a cake that violates his religious values, **are you concerned as I am with the increase in legal persecution against Americans who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith?**

Please share your thoughts in this quick 2-minute survey concerning religious liberty in America.

**[https://offers.americancornerstone.org/religious-liberty-survey/](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zr6aidge0fld794rg34hknpud8lp88vh86j82v60_rp22sh2s8i66o70s9j61o34cdh2bs)**

Thank you for your consideration.

Regards,

Dr. Ben Carson
Founder & Chairman American Cornerstone Institute
---
---
| |
---
---
Your donation to ACI helps us to focus on our mission of promoting and preserving individual and religious liberty, helping our country’s most vulnerable find new hope, and developing methods to decrease the federal government’s role in society and to improve efficiency to best serve ALL our nation’s citizens.
---

name: Rashida Tlaib
subject: Everyone deserves to breathe clean air and live in stable housing
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rashida Tlaib for Congress
body:
What we’ve been up to the past month in Congress: | | | [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/ZsYp6Jc2ATNP3MkVzvte6Pmk0F4jS6NOytihmYTOZ1f-yWw6Cj7G9e1dlkX4TL0NMWtZ9DST5cFtdsPS-4D2fKNVbxdzSbLD9T9x2URiTkAkvV0OpQQCoNHFnrXrpjTvGcgumLf_zrxXxz4G2ZYKvbhqDtXM8_9g5qba6kor6DUTUPsjwGbV-C_fxacuhTI_sTPy8UoitkBiy2tD0PIqkxgbOdTLBa_E099qkQ2QtHphCCM_u5Jhm531DUqxaWCN853Ov7aUGEYVGqhgDAsynP-EcS-MyjiJ4iOHMYofynGYFyiMhdnDREw-MONb87gTXCvEliBuj6ehh_tBsB7eZg/3xi/A50mfxEYSLiSTwiiNNOVWA/h0/nTPJORmNwNhG7PfSGf4-h7lpAV7WFhY9oMClPp-lU9E)
---
Friend, Over this past month, my team and I have been fighting for environmental justice and housing justice while taking on corporate greed and corruption. Below are some updates about our work serving you in Congress.
# Rashida Roundup:
## Environmental justice and the right to breathe clean air
This week, the air quality in my district and in Washington, D.C. was some of the worst in the world, due to Canadian wildfires made worse by climate change. Some residents in my district still hadn’t recovered from the awful wildfire smoke earlier in June. **This can't become our new normal. We cannot keep allowing corporate greed and political inaction, which is making us sick and killing us. We all have a right to breathe clean air.** **That’s why this month, I voted NO on a debt limit deal that gutted key environmental protections and greenlit dirty fossil fuel projects for corporate polluters who are poisoning our communities.** After President Biden struck this deal and Congress passed the bill, I joined activists protesting the sacrificing of communities for corporate profits. The children in my district are having asthma attacks right now, because corporations are paying for access to the White House and Congress. Instead of the fossil fuel industry drafting these bills, it should be the people of the United States. **I’m calling on the Biden administration to declare a climate emergency and phase out fossil fuels on public lands.** And I’m calling on Congress to pass the Green New Deal. I also recently re-introduced the **_Environmental Justice in Recreation Permitting Act_** to expand access to public lands for communities of color, low-income communities, and Tribal and Indigenous communities on the front lines of the climate crisis.
## Addressing gun violence
When we talk about protecting our children’s health, we must also talk about gun violence. **Firearms are now the leading cause of death for American children. Many of these tragic deaths involve the accidental discharge of a firearm, so I introduced the**** _Safe Storage Saves Lives Act_****to require every firearm seller to provide a gun lock or gun safety device every single time a firearm is sold in the United States.** It’s horrifying that 4.6 million children in our country live in homes with a loaded and unlocked firearm. Gun locks have already saved countless lives and requiring their use is key to combating America’s gun violence crisis. Unfortunately—as with so many industries profiting off our deaths—the gun lobby and the NRA have bankrolled many of my colleagues in Congress into silence and inaction on this issue. I will not stop fighting until Congress finally takes action to end gun violence.
## Holding banks accountable
Executives pocket millions of dollars while workers and communities keep paying the price for their greed and recklessness. This is unacceptable. **In response to recent bank failures, I joined my Democratic colleagues on the House Financial Services Committee to introduce and cosponsor a number of bills, including the**** _Fostering Accountability in Remuneration Fund Act_****, or**** _FAIR Fund Act_****.** Time and again, we have seen executives and senior employees at large financial institutions pursue short-term profits at any cost because their compensation packages encourage excessive risk-taking. The _FAIR Fund Act_ reverses these corrupt incentives for financial executives and senior employees, ensuring that they’re held accountable for the consequences of their actions.
## Ensuring housing as a human right
We must recognize the human dignity of our neighbors and dismantle the cycles of mass incarceration and housing discrimination. So I’m joining Congresswoman Ayanna Pressley in introducing the _Housing for Formerly Incarcerated Reentry and Stable Tenancy (Housing FIRST) Act_. **Every human being deserves access to safe, affordable housing, including people who were formerly incarcerated.** This legislation will help disrupt the prison-to-homelessness pipeline by removing unjust barriers to housing and limiting tenant screening criteria for criminal records in background checks.
## Ending the auto insurance industry’s modern-day redlining
Auto insurance discrimination continues to keep people in my community and across the country in the cycle of poverty. Someone with a perfect driving record and poor credit can pay hundreds of dollars more for auto insurance—sometimes twice as much. My neighbors in Detroit also regularly face higher auto insurance rates than folks in predominantly white zip codes. **Last month I re-introduced the**** _Prohibit Auto Insurance Discrimination Act_****, or**** _PAID Act_****, to stop these predatory and discriminatory practices by auto insurance companies.** If enacted, the legislation would prevent insurance companies from using non-driving factors (such as income, credit score, education level, zip code, and homeownership status) to raise rates for drivers.
## Honoring Rosa Parks
**Last month, I had the incredible honor of partnering with Rosa Parks’ family to rename the Grand River Post Office near her home in Detroit the “Rosa Louise McCauley Parks Post Office.”** After her defiant and courageous act led to the Montgomery Bus Boycott, white employers in Montgomery refused to employ Rosa Parks. So the mother of the civil rights movement moved to Detroit, where she lived for the rest of her life, serving our community tirelessly. Her legacy reminds us that we cannot remain silent when we encounter injustice, discrimination or racism. We must take a stand and speak out, even when our voice shakes. As Mother Parks wrote, “Freedom fighters never retire.” Our struggle against racism and white supremacy is a lifelong pursuit, and I’m grateful for the opportunity to honor Mother Parks and help keep her legacy alive.
## Holding charter schools accountable
**My colleague Rep. Jamaal Bowman and I introduced the**** _Charter Oversight, Accountability, and Transparency (COAT) Act_****so the same oversight and transparency standards required of public schools are applied to charters.** For-profit charter schools receive millions of taxpayer dollars each year but operate without accountability, undermining our public education system. Publicly funded but privately managed charter schools must be transparent and accountable in order to receive federal funds. Without the necessary oversight for charter schools, our children will continue to suffer while taxpayers foot the bill for charter school fraud, waste, and abuse. Our children deserve better. I’m going to keep fighting for all of our children, and for communities where we all can thrive. Thank you for your partnership in this ongoing work. Always serving you, Rashida

name: Tara McGowan, Courier Newsroom
subject: We came up short.
body:
I’m reaching out because we came up just short of our $15,000 end-of-quarter goal.
# [](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/go/83?t=1&akid=1185%2E120351%2EaZzHrk)
Hi Peter, Tara again — Founder and Publisher of Courier Newsroom.

I’m reaching out because we had a goal of raising $15,000 before last night’s end-of-quarter deadline, and **we came up just short.** While that does mean we’re starting the new quarter behind, it’s not too late to catch up.
Reaching these goals is a really important part of supporting our newsrooms in eight battleground states. If you’d like to know more, make sure to read my email from yesterday which I’ve included below.
[**But for now, will you chip in just $8 — or any amount you can — to get us back on track and support reliable local journalism?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-courier-20230701-2?refcode=em20230701-2&amount=8&refcode2=1185_120351_aZzHrk&akid=1185%2E120351%2EaZzHrk)
Thanks,
Tara
* * *
Hi Peter, Tara here — I have a packed day so I’ll keep this short.
I talked to Ben this morning (our new Finance Director) and he let me know that **we’re just shy** of our $15,000 end-of-quarter goal.
**[But if just 63 supports pitch in $8 each before midnight, we’ll reach our goal and end this quarter on a strong note. So can you pitch in $8 or any amount right now to help us get there?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-courier-20230701-2?refcode=em20230701-2&amount=8&refcode2=1185_120351_aZzHrk&akid=1185%2E120351%2EaZzHrk)**
Here’s a quick summary of why this is so important:
* **All of our stories are free to read.** Reaching this goal means no paywalls – ever.
* Our journalists pick up the mainstream media’s slack, and reaching this goal means we can **hire more of them.**
* We operate in ‘news deserts’ in 8 battleground states, and reaching this goal means we can open **more newsrooms in more states.**

There’s a lot of money behind misinformation, and we’re counting on grassroots donors like you to help us fund reliable, fact-based journalism in the communities that need it most.
[**So if you can, please pitch in before tonight’s midnight deadline and help us reach our $15,000 end-of-quarter goal. $8 can have a big impact!**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-courier-20230701-2?refcode=em20230701-2&amount=8&refcode2=1185_120351_aZzHrk&akid=1185%2E120351%2EaZzHrk)
**[Donate $8 Now »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-courier-20230701-2?refcode=em20230701-2&amount=8&refcode2=1185_120351_aZzHrk&akid=1185%2E120351%2EaZzHrk)**
Thanks so much,
Tara McGowan
Founder & Publisher
Courier Newsroom
**[DONATE »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-footer?refcode=em-footer&t=2&refcode2=1185_120351_aZzHrk&akid=1185%2E120351%2EaZzHrk)**
Email us: [**info@couriernewsroom.com**](mailto:info@couriernewsroom.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/signup/update-your-information)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=1185%2E120351%2EaZzHrk)

To give by check:
Courier Newsroom
Box 509
New York, NY 10032

name: Senator Amanda Chase
subject: Can you chip in to help us pay for legal counsel to challenge the shenanigans in SD12?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Amanda Chase
body:
We need to hold bad actors accountable
| | | | [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001kkIa6P_RKpHMqUz-dOg60_PSL4acTmTw4zfVbYc_BBymJk_zPyEcIVuAeaEhGe_Wf-ip0kJnJAz-bSsiaPP8M6m_P95aDiCwsy1gDriUwCtuJ3QaWG34Mwyusmc3r53sDW5sGAajmMT6-o9mLFVapxxOIqriTo6laBgV-J6MxeQ=&c=IEorjeu5KGfQI-nFLH5snJGT5essBN6Klq1w0H1rx3-PsuIRfE0r2g==&ch=Hv809pFn9tzXxXDJsD9jrhN9ecljU3RdLGwC9A-_pmdSsofLB3Hb8Q==)
---
---
| |
---
| | |
---|---

On this INDEPENDENCE DAY donate to preserve fair elections

As of 2:30pm we've had 31 people to donate online.

On May 5, I asked the right question of the Chesterfield Deputy Registrar.

Who was the Republican representative chosen to certify the voting computers that would be used during the in person 45 day early voting season? The answer? Lauren Fuller, later corrected correctly as Lauren Fulcher.

It was that answer that led to my discovery of what the newly elected and Sturtevant endorsed Chesterfield GOP Chair Leslie Haley had done.

She could chose one representative to represent the Republican Party and instead of choosing a neutral Republican, she chose the Sturtevant Campaign Manager and largest donor of the Sturtevant campaign, Lauren Fulcher. She was appointed as the sole Republican to oversee the certification of the early voting computers and then tried to cover it up by saying her name was Lauren Fuller instead of Lauren Fulcher. She got busted by the Chesterfield Registrar's office when I questioned the name of the observer who I knew well.

We went public with the appearance of collusion on May 15.
On Election Day we won by 2 percentage points.
Then the Absentee Votes were counted.
Remember. These are voting computers that Lauren Fulcher observed.
All of a sudden we come up 340 votes short.

The Virginia State Board of Elections Handbook requires that if one campaign is present, all campaigns shall be invited to the early voting certification. Why wasn't the Handbook followed?

My campaign was denied the opportunity to be present during the certification of the early voting machines and then until I got an attorney involved, was not allowed to observe the certification of the voting machines to be used during the general election.

Friend we must hold these bad actors accountable. It was a complete conflict of interest and a violation of the Virginia State Board of Elections Handbook. Instead of apologizing, Leslie Haley is doubling down saying she didn't violate the law. And she's an ethics attorney?

I need your help. In order to proceed we need your help to ensure this never happens again. We've raised enough money to pay the retainer. But that just gets us in the door. We need your help.

As of today at 2:30pm, we had 31 supporters to give a total of $2210 online. Thanks to each of you who gave. I see your names and appreciate you supporting me as I fight to preserve honest, fair, transparent elections.

If you haven't already donated, please do so now.

If everyone would give, we will have the money to pay our attorneys so we can stop the steal.

Everyone must do their part. I've done mine.
Give $100 or more today or your best donation.

We must file before July 5. So time is of the essence. Thanks in advance.

For God and Country,
|

clean_body: We need to hold bad actors accountable | | | | == | | | | | ---|--- On this INDEPENDENCE DAY donate to preserve fair elections As of 2:30pm we've had 31 people to donate online. On May 5, I asked the right question of the Chesterfield Deputy Registrar. Who was the Republican representative chosen to certify the voting computers that would be used during the in person 45 day early voting season? The answer? Lauren Fuller, later corrected correctly as Lauren Fulcher. It was that answer that led to my discovery of what the newly elected and Sturtevant endorsed Chesterfield GOP Chair Leslie Haley had done. She could chose one representative to represent the Republican Party and instead of choosing a neutral Republican, she chose the Sturtevant Campaign Manager and largest donor of the Sturtevant campaign, Lauren Fulcher. She was appointed as the sole Republican to oversee the certification of the early voting computers and then tried to cover it up by saying her name was Lauren Fuller instead of Lauren Fulcher. She got busted by the Chesterfield Registrar's office when I questioned the name of the observer who I knew well. We went public with the appearance of collusion on May 15. On Election Day we won by 2 percentage points. Then the Absentee Votes were counted. Remember. These are voting computers that Lauren Fulcher observed. All of a sudden we come up 340 votes short. The Virginia State Board of Elections Handbook requires that if one campaign is present, all campaigns shall be invited to the early voting certification. Why wasn't the Handbook followed? My campaign was denied the opportunity to be present during the certification of the early voting machines and then until I got an attorney involved, was not allowed to observe the certification of the voting machines to be used during the general election. Friend we must hold these bad actors accountable. It was a complete conflict of interest and a violation of the Virginia State Board of Elections Handbook. Instead of apologizing, Leslie Haley is doubling down saying she didn't violate the law. And she's an ethics attorney? I need your help. In order to proceed we need your help to ensure this never happens again. We've raised enough money to pay the retainer. But that just gets us in the door. We need your help. As of today at 2:30pm, we had 31 supporters to give a total of $2210 online. Thanks to each of you who gave. I see your names and appreciate you supporting me as I fight to preserve honest, fair, transparent elections. If you haven't already donated, please do so now. If everyone would give, we will have the money to pay our attorneys so we can stop the steal. Everyone must do their part. I've done mine. Give $100 or more today or your best donation. We must file before July 5. So time is of the essence. Thanks in advance. For God and Country, | | | | | | | | | | | == | == | | == | | | | | | | | | == | == ---|--- == | == ---|--- == | == ---|--- | Authorized and Paid for by Friends of Amanda Chase | | | | | | | Senator Amanda Chase | P.O. Box 5811, Midlothian, VA 23112 | | == Sent by mailto:amanda@chaseforva.com powered by == ==

# [](https://go.bobcasey.com/go/181?t=1&akid=240%2E552475%2EmETPxk)
Peter, because of supporters like you, we were able to reach our critical end-of-quarter goal — the first one of this campaign!
Thank you. Whether or not you were able to make a contribution last quarter, we appreciate you being a part of this team.
Bob Casey believes all public service is a trust, given in faith. This past quarter you showed that we have your trust and support in helping to ensure we can keep Bob serving Pennsylvania and fighting against Republican attacks on Social Security, Medicare, and Medicaid; against tax cuts for the ultra-rich; against countries like China that threaten our jobs with unfair trade practices; and against big health care companies raising costs for the middle class.
If you would like to help us kick off July on the right foot, **[you can do so here. Anything you give will help us prepare for the road ahead.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20230701-1?refcode=em20230701-1&refcode2=240_552475_mETPxk&akid=240%2E552475%2EmETPxk)**
We’ll share more soon, but for now, thank you again.
With gratitude,
Team Casey

Friend,

The worst thing that could have happened just happened. It's making me sick just writing this.

**[WE MISSED OUR END-OF-QUARTER FEC DEADLINE! I need you to _**RUSH A $10 DONATION**_ so we can get back on our feet and defeat this assault by the Radical Left. If you don't help **ASAP,** they will outraise and outspend us. This means they can continue pushing their anti-American agenda of open borders, expensive gas, and violent crime. If you don't _**RUSH A DONATION OF $10 NOW**_ , no one will stop them.

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

Friend,
President Trump is flying to the great state of South Carolina to hold his Independence Day Rally celebrating America’s birthday.
_Today, the President will pay homage to the red-blooded patriots who built the greatest country in history and outline his bold plan to MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN!_
Before the President takes the stage, we’d love to show him a list of all the patriots who stepped up by making a contribution to kick off the new month and ensure that we have the resources we need to save our nation.
We can assure you – nothing energizes President Trump more than to see all of our many grassroots donors giving $1, $5, $24 and so on.
_With your last-minute surprise support, you’re going to fill President Trump with a level of patriotism, the likes of which our nation has never seen!_

name: Kelly Hall, Executive Director
subject: Today, 40,000 South Dakotans gained access to affordable health care
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Fairness Project The Fairness Project
body:
Now, more than 1 million Americans have access to expanded Medicaid coverage. | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/65776189/414480308/765663662?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZjJhZmIzYy0yNTE4LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Mnr3wDO5x-UJwpbYbg7sOYNTeMV53OD_eABz9bQroFc=&emci=20b81873-a716-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=7f2afb3c-2518-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=561582) | Friend — since our founding, Medicaid expansion has been one of our landmark issues where we’ve championed campaigns and rallied voters to win the lifechanging health care they need. Last November, we fought alongside voters to make South Dakota the 39th state to roll out expanded Medicaid to their state’s residents. _**And today, more than 40,000 South Dakotans finally gained access to affordable health care!**_ [_**On this historic day, will you make a donation of $25 or whatever you can afford to help us run Medicaid ballot measure campaigns in the states that remain and close the Medicaid coverage gap _for good?_**_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/65776190/414480309/190380821?refcode=E21769-20230701-SDMedicaidRollout-SL-Other-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZjJhZmIzYy0yNTE4LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Mnr3wDO5x-UJwpbYbg7sOYNTeMV53OD_eABz9bQroFc=) | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation to the Fairness Project will go through immediately:_ | **[$15](https://click.everyaction.com/k/65776191/414480310/190380821?express_lane=true&refcode=E21769-20230701-SDMedicaidRollout-EG-Other-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZjJhZmIzYy0yNTE4LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Mnr3wDO5x-UJwpbYbg7sOYNTeMV53OD_eABz9bQroFc=)** | **[$25](https://click.everyaction.com/k/65776192/414480311/190380821?express_lane=true&refcode=E21769-20230701-SDMedicaidRollout-EG-Other-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZjJhZmIzYy0yNTE4LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Mnr3wDO5x-UJwpbYbg7sOYNTeMV53OD_eABz9bQroFc=)**

Since our founding in 2016, we’ve run campaigns in seven states to expand Medicaid when politicians refused to roll out coverage to their constituents stuck in the coverage gap — **and seven times, voters stood by our side and decisively secured their access to health care. **
With this latest rollout in South Dakota, our campaigns have brought affordable health care to _over 1 MILLION Americans_ who would otherwise not have access! A few years ago, almost half the country lacked Medicaid expansion. **Now, only 10 states remain.**
[_**We’re committed to giving _every_ voter _every_ chance to expand affordable health care access in their home state. If you’re with us, will you rush a donation to help us close the Medicaid coverage gap for good?**_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/65776197/414480316/190380821?refcode=E21769-20230701-SDMedicaidRollout-SL-Other-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZjJhZmIzYy0yNTE4LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Mnr3wDO5x-UJwpbYbg7sOYNTeMV53OD_eABz9bQroFc=)

clean_body: Now, more than 1 million Americans have access to expanded Medicaid coverage. | | Friend — since our founding, Medicaid expansion has been one of our landmark issues where we’ve championed campaigns and rallied voters to win the lifechanging health care they need. Last November, we fought alongside voters to make South Dakota the 39th state to roll out expanded Medicaid to their state’s residents. And today, more than 40,000 South Dakotans finally gained access to affordable health care! = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation to the Fairness Project will go through immediately: | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Since our founding in 2016, we’ve run campaigns in seven states to expand Medicaid when politicians refused to roll out coverage to their constituents stuck in the coverage gap — and seven times, voters stood by our side and decisively secured their access to health care. With this latest rollout in South Dakota, our campaigns have brought affordable health care to over 1 MILLION Americans who would otherwise not have access! A few years ago, almost half the country lacked Medicaid expansion. Now, only 10 states remain. = = Thank you for your continued support, friend. = Kelly Hall Executive Director Fairness Project Thanks to grassroots supporters like you, our team at the Fairness Project has won 31 people-powered ballot measure campaigns since 2016, changing over 18 million lives by expanding health care, raising wages, guaranteeing paid leave, and ending predatory lending directly at the ballot box when politicians refuse to act. Your support allows us to make this progress possible.** = = Contributions or gifts to the Fairness Project are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate
body:
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14558?t=1&akid=25737%2E3422442%2EGGavaI)
Derek, our Q2 fundraising came to a close last night at midnight. Thanks to this grassroots team, we met our end of quarter goal and are heading into July in a strong position. Your dollars will help us:
📺 Run TV and digital ads. And by being able to reserve sooner rather than later we’ll get better rates.
🗳️ Hire organizers to turnout voters across the state, boosting Democrats down the ballot.
📝 Outfit volunteers with clipboards, literature, and talking points as they hit the doors.
As my former professor Elizabeth Warren taught me, nobody gets elected alone.
Thanks for being in this fight!
Katie Porter

Katie is running for the U.S. Senate because Californians deserve a warrior fighting for them in Washington. Our campaign is people-powered, we don’t take a dime from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists, or executives from Big Oil or Big Pharma. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-footer?refcode=EMAJ_1_THX_20230701_V1_F&t=2&refcode2=25737_3422442_GGavaI&akid=25737%2E3422442%2EGGavaI)**

clean_body: | | | | Open within the next hour Peter, I’ll get straight to the point. This quarter my team and I set out to raise more funds than we have in any previous year. But we fell short of this goal. We’ve decided to extend the deadline one more day AND | | | | | | Our seat is in danger and this is the only way we are going to save it. Thank you, Lori Chavez-DeRemer Congresswoman OR-05 | | | | | | | | | Even as a Congresswoman, Lori’s most important title is mom. That’s how she knows the issues your family faces, and that’s why she fights everyday to make life better for every Oregon family, and every American. Aside from that, all you need to know are the issues she’s fighting for in Congress: If that sounds like the kind of agenda you can get behind, If you’d prefer to give by check, please use the below address: Lori Chavez-DeRemer for Congress 13203 SE 172nd Ave Suite 166 #399 Happy Valley, OR 97086 Forward This message to FIVE FRIENDS AND FAMILY to spread the word on how to achieve a better future for Oregon and America → ** Also text “LORI” to 71800 or click here to receive all of Lori’s messages | | | | Lori Chavez-DeRemer 13203 SE 172nd Ave, Suite 166 #399, Happy Valley, OR 97086 = \- ==

name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: What are your thoughts?
body:
There is a very concerning trend occurring in our country that has me worried

|
---
| | | [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zdb9eed9v9m98t98v8id7j1o77edncaha8lh3fgo_rp22sh2s8i66o70s9gm8or2c5h2bs)
---
| Fellow American,

There is a very concerning trend occurring in our country that has me worried for Americans who hold to biblical & faith-based values. [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zo7d1fk979t5o9klh7d3oprsm5rqg3nu2k7lk3jg_rp22sh2s8i66o70s9gm8or2c5h2bs) After the _Respect for Marriage Act_ was passed by a bi-partisan effort and signed into law, I am fearful that legal persecution will only intensify against Americans holding to faith-based values and who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith.

[**Are you concerned that America is abandoning a basic tenet of our founding -_Religious Liberty?_**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z3dakc17aganlit2r8hdd0iu3a2b121n795mk9cg_rp22sh2s8i66o70s9gm8or2c5h2bs)

In addition to the passing of the _Respect for Marriage Act_ , numerous examples over the past decade have concerned me: KENNEDY v. BREMERTON SCHOOL DISTRICT, MASTERPIECE CAKESHOP v. COLORADO CIVIL RIGHTS COMMISSION, and 303 CREATIVE v. ELENIS are just a few examples of legal persecution against Americans holding to faith-based values who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith.

Furthermore, an amendment to the _Respect for Marriage Act_ , brought forth by Senator Mike Lee, prohibiting the Federal Government from retaliating against schools, businesses, and organizations because of their religious beliefs about same-sex marriage failed.

**This has the potential to only intensify legal persecution against individuals, businesses, churches, and nonprofits holding to faith-based values. **

The American Cornerstone Institute is a non-profit that I founded to preserve and promote the cornerstones that laid the foundation for the greatest nation the world has ever seen: Faith, Liberty, Community, and Life.

Whether it is a football coach losing his job for praying at midfield after a game, or a baker being sued for not wanting to bake a cake that violates his religious values, **are you concerned as I am with the increase in legal persecution against Americans who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith?**

Please share your thoughts in this quick 2-minute survey concerning religious liberty in America.

**[https://offers.americancornerstone.org/religious-liberty-survey/](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zr47s3ds2ucser6l3dis6vs2hb841vsis52namdg_rp22sh2s8i66o70s9gm8or2c5h2bs)**

Thank you for your consideration.

Regards,

Dr. Ben Carson
Founder & Chairman American Cornerstone Institute
---
---
| |
---
---
Your donation to ACI helps us to focus on our mission of promoting and preserving individual and religious liberty, helping our country’s most vulnerable find new hope, and developing methods to decrease the federal government’s role in society and to improve efficiency to best serve ALL our nation’s citizens.
---
|
---

---

name: Dr. Brian Williams
subject: Thank you for showing up at such a crucial moment, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for By Dr. Brian Williams for Congress Dr
body:
This team’s support is truly humbling

Peter, we just finished our first fundraising push! All the way until midnight, you showed up to make sure we had the strongest fundraising numbers to report possible. I’m so grateful for your continued support and proud of everything we’ve already accomplished in this race.

From our launch just over a month ago to last night’s midnight deadline, you have helped me show that we have both the determination and grassroots support to win this election and make history by electing the first trauma surgeon to Congress.

I’m working every day to bring my years of frontline experience to Washington to create life-saving change. Thank you for standing with me in this effort.

– Brian

Dallas, TX 75218

You heard from two members of the Tennessee Three, Reps. Johnson and Pearson, about how the Tennessee GOP has used their supermajority in the legislature to enact their extreme agenda and work to ban abortion, protect the gun lobby, restrict voting rights, and so much more.
They know firsthand that it takes people power to fight back against Republican attacks on our democracy, and they called on you to fight the Republican agenda head-on by re-electing state Democrats like Reps. Jones and Pearson.
**In a few short weeks, Democrats can get it done. We can deal a huge blow to the GOP by officially re-electing Reps. Jones and Pearson of the Tennessee Three to the state House.**
It’s crucial we show the Republican Party that they can’t simply expel their colleagues for speaking out against their hate-fueled platform. **Special elections like these are key to defending Democratic power and chipping away at Republican strongholds, and we need all our grassroots supporters on our side.**
[Will you chip in a gift of $7 or more ahead of Tennessee’s vital special elections so we can defeat extreme Republicans and elect state Democrats nationwide? ](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yoKG8CTelWWDHki88pvURtxM-7M6lx0tBvbL0QK0PU4sgMZEclm-YtfVHrzLSPSmrDbNIJJ8R6M9O-rvkkTOlWZHe_r4oY8zIgD2jQ5KiBk7meEhL9CP_XaZEOR1-Ygl-ZZTjsM_tdTZmyfntHJ1k3DMvMYIxjp_U_8y1S4IZ8SU4H36pzGrRy44LA_DzVDtameeB2WDKsgpwIaRshtAtpeRjpg1A6dGw-EFU1H4yxUh2r3rkd72P-qXE9SoUbjChK5_2e1lBvkPUpYInftmlC7TnSvrCzNTccJUgxKC2zOr1YLqNQloCWsayJiG96C11J9fzztb9YmDiJN_F6d4Of64cslUDEsBJ56qWqmafUIqVKWawP8AP7y6lpXaAIc9-kepZhKRr3Fdw0Kc_VUdBb0Y6-91wkvox7Wq_0Fp9YJyvtWYotwWS4E5PgHc2gjsADpOBHrfIJu1pn-27cHhE9/3xi/yl_6gNvLRpGXEn3v5WP_Ag/h6/TtI3DtTO82OK8rdiFQhmhjzFLfRaVypTGOkLl9SnUSM)
It’s races like these where grassroots donations can make the most impact – re-electing Reps. Jones and Pearson will be a monumental step in our fight to build a better America. With these wins, we can keep two Democratic fighters standing up to Republicans’ anti-democratic actions and pushing for progress in Tennessee.
Together, we can face this fight directly and elect the Democratic leaders we need in states like Tennessee and beyond.
Team DLCC

name: Friends of the Earth
subject: We hate to say it, friend, but we missed our goal and we need your help to make it right
body:
| | | | | [](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/e_s17_main_cobrandedemail_c3)
---|---|---

| | | **This could be a DISASTER, friend****. We were counting on hitting our goal by yesterday’s deadline,** but we fell seriously short. Now we urgently need your help to close the gap before it’s too late.
---
Here’s why your matched gift matters so much today: Vulnerable species are depending on Friends of the Earth to protect them from certain EXTINCTION and defend the habitats they call home and our planet from Big Polluters. Any gap in our budget means we have to scale back our fight while greedy corporations ramp up their planet-killing destruction for the sake of profits. We can’t let that happen.
With so much at stake, our generous donors agreed to **EXTEND this once-a-year match opportunity for ONE MORE DAY.** So we had to pull your supporter record while there’s still time to DOUBLE your impact for our planet.
| | [ ](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1858279?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
**EMAIL:** dpwillis67@gmail.com
**MATCH STATUS:** **EXPIRING at 11:59 p.m.**
**END-OF-FISCAL-YEAR DONATION:** STILL PENDING
**DONORS NEEDED FROM your area:** **5**
---
| | [DOUBLE MY GIFT NOW](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1858279?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
_Records reflect most recent available data. Match extension expires at 11:59 p.m._
---
To be honest, friend, we’re really worried. **We set our goal to hit $150,000 before our end-of-fiscal-year deadline because that’s the MINIMUM we need to stand up to Big Polluters.** There’s no fluff in our budget, just the dollars and cents it takes to show up and fight when ecosystems are under attack. ** If we fall short, that fight gets infinitely harder – and we feel the impact in poisoned waterways, toxic farmland, and the growing absence of endangered species. **
That’s not the world we want to live in. We can’t afford it, and neither can the precious species counting on us to do the right thing. **That’s why this match extension is such a critical opportunity to help protect the planet we all share. But we only have until 11:59 p.m. TONIGHT to make up our fundraising shortfall, and we’re relying on activists like you who know how much is at stake. **
[**Please: Rush your $27 membership gift now before our rare match EXTENSION expires at midnight tonight, and every dollar will be doubled – up to $150,000 – to power the fight for our only Earth!**](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1858280?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
_If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [$27 donation + $27 match = $54 impact](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1858281?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
| | [$50 donation + $50 match = $100 impact](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1858282?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
| | [$100 donation + $100 match = $200 impact](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1858283?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
| | [Double another amount](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1858279?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
Thank you for your urgent support,

Erich Pica
President
Friends of the Earth
|

Friends of the Earth U.S. Washington, D.C. | Berkeley, CA 1-877-843-8687 [Contact us](http://foe.org/about-us/contact/)

name: Defend the Constitution
subject: Final stage before digital money
body:
| **Final stage before digital money** [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b29b142b0a294a16911712c19dcf31b6&_e=NJrl1bS3UD2mk4n_hRmbpUHWL6N7V46lIi7CfImCcKGDAtK22F6tSNj26caWPrwN5DGYcv_szB8zStflgUIvFFglr4DVKFrUPeWmtdPei_tMKCb-l3Qa2K7gKk8Ig9OO9TUZ2wolh1KC5B75_M8kQ_SukI4ODgQYSDGI5pG-qHkH7Q6g5C8CzAKx8lkXs2fa9veb-44QaNstktRC0cH7J1Z5g80SPuLpaZi9AhqADLQNCsxdMcNO_VYDyUmOhNJMQv7Pjb0HBoCg3cvIyyJ6e4p_ToYRAgyiIY60ZSgz5FA%3D) The end is near... Our financial system is about to be transformed in a way that would've been unthinkable just a few years ago. And almost nobody is prepared for the chaos that follows. According to Bank of America, this overhaul is imminent - And Dr. Nomi Prins says the final stage begins in July, with the rollout of the FedNow system. To show you everything you need to know about the FedNow system - and to help you prepare - Dr. Prins has recorded a free presentation with all the details. It's controversial, but Nomi's interview is a must-watch for anyone with more than $2,500 in an American bank or retirement fund. **[Click here to find out what you need to do to prepare for this historic transformation.](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b29b142b0a294a16911712c19dcf31b6&_e=NJrl1bS3UD2mk4n_hRmbpUHWL6N7V46lIi7CfImCcKGDAtK22F6tSNj26caWPrwN5DGYcv_szB8zStflgUIvFFglr4DVKFrUPeWmtdPei_tMKCb-l3Qa2K7gKk8Ig9OO9TUZ2wolh1KC5B75_M8kQ1gddlIgZ6e7OpmwFGouBQ9UQaCvJYVlJ64Dz8HMNoPEMwfdiH6kMzXj2w5dClf1Dn1lOSV0EKVOaZsp50ejZ2hPRHCVaNcacGnCrk7rVEgnHnDjvsMsEwTkqdnhve2uJCgErrR6xY1MXzaNbzF6Qqg%3D)**
---

subject: ¡Muchas Gracias!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Terán for Congress
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/raquelteran2024?refcode=X_070123_TeranEOQ7&amount=25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/raquelteran2024?refcode=X_070123_TeranEOQ7&amount=25]
Hi Peter,
Yesterday was our end-of-quarter fundraising deadline – and I wanted to say a big huge thank you for all the support you gave us!
From the beginning, this campaign was never about me or any one person. It was about all of us, all of our communities. >From immigrants, women, LGBTQ folks, to working families coming together to keep our movement going.
Like we’ve done before, when we all come together we can accomplish things that others say could never be possible. We can fight back against xenophobia and homophobia, we can fight back against corporate interests, we can fight back against threats to our democracy – and win.
We’ve got a long primary ahead of us that will be filled with challenges and curveballs. But I know that if we stick together and support one another, we can make it to Congress.
Thank you for your support,
Raquel

name: Team Schiff
subject: Join our team
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
| To elect Adam to the Senate, it’s going to take building the largest grassroots volunteering operation our great state has ever seen.
# [](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/61?t=1&akid=2820%2E5257348%2EHBYmnF)
Derek —
We have to start by simply saying: **thank you.** We’ve sent a lot of emails recently. And each and every grassroots donation added up makes a huge difference. We send these emails because they raise the funds that allow us to communicate online, organize, and speak to voters.
And because of you, we’re now officially able to kick off our organizing operation and speak to Californians across the state!
To elect Adam to the Senate, it’s going to take building the largest grassroots volunteer operation our great state has ever seen — **and we’d love for you to be a part of that team 🤝!**
Our first big volunteer event is a big Textbank Kickoff with Adam! You’ll get to hear from Adam himself about how he plans to make real progress in the Senate just as he has in the House for years. Afterward, we’ll all go through a brief training, and start texting voters across the Golden State.
**[RSVP for this great event here — you can join from anywhere!](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/2452?t=4&akid=2820%2E5257348%2EHBYmnF)**
[RSVP](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/2453?t=5&akid=2820%2E5257348%2EHBYmnF)
---
**To stay in the loop on all our events, we have a Slack community for you to join. Slack is an easy-to-use messaging platform that will be a helpful resource to read announcements from our staff, engage with other volunteers, and share all the reasons why you’re supporting Adam Schiff for Senate.**
[JOIN OUR VOLUNTEER HUB](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/2454?t=6&akid=2820%2E5257348%2EHBYmnF)
---
To find other events near you, or to sign up to host an event of your own (woohoo 🎉), **[visit our Volunteer homepage on Mobilize.](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/2455?t=7&akid=2820%2E5257348%2EHBYmnF)**
No matter how you join our team — whether it’s knocking on doors in your neighborhood, sending text messages to voters, or opening and sharing emails like this one with your friends and family — we’re lucky to have you with us as we work together to send Adam to the Senate!
Thanks for being a part of the best team 😀!
— Team Schiff
| | [DONATE MONTHLY](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1032?c0=july2023_abs_em.aS6u8E&refcode=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_GEN_AC90_20230701_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=8&akid=2820%2E5257348%2EHBYmnF)
---
135 E. Olive Ave., #750 Burbank CA, 91502
**[www.adamschiff.com](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/60?t=2&akid=2820%2E5257348%2EHBYmnF) | [contact@adamschiff.com](mailto:contact@adamschiff.com) | [Privacy Policy](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/64?t=3&akid=2820%2E5257348%2EHBYmnF)**
PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
---
If you wish to no longer receive these messages, please [unsubscribe.](https://act.adamschiff.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=9&akid=2820%2E5257348%2EHBYmnF)

name: =?utf-8?Q?Team=20WAGOP?=
subject: Call to Action: Add your Signature to Referendum 101
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Washington State Republican Party
body:
Support parental rights - sign Referendum 101 at a location near you!

http://wsrp.org
Ballots Are Out, Vote By November 2nd!

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=WeGlgXqOx-Y

With ballots out, now is the perfect time to get out there and volunteer on a conservative campaign. Every door you knock on in these local races matter a lot and the results of this election year will be used as a bellwether for the 2022 midterms.

We are also hosting another WSRP Statewide Day Of Action on Saturday, October 30th! Bring a friend or neighbor to volunteer for a few hours to help local conservatives win in November! Sign up here to join our Statewide Day Of Action! (https://form.jotform.com/212737084845058)
State Sen. Gildon On Vaccine Mandates
https://soundcloud.com/user-450836972/wagop-report-state-sen-chris-gildon-on-vaccine-mandates-and-democrat-anti-policing-laws
State Senator Chris Gildon (R - Puyallup) joins the podcast this week to discuss vaccine mandates, anti-policing laws, the Long-Term Care Tax, and how he got his start in politics. WAGOP is now on Apple Podcasts and Spotify, follow us and never miss an episode! Listen here. (https://soundcloud.com/user-450836972/wagop-report-state-sen-chris-gildon-on-vaccine-mandates-and-democrat-anti-policing-laws)
Republican Leaders Fight Inslee's Mandate
Thanks to our Republican leaders in the State House and Senate for fighting back and offering a strong rebuke of Inslee's harmful vaccine mandate. Below is an excerpt of their most recent statement to the press:

“We are already experiencing higher prices and empty shelves partially as a result of COVID's shutdowns and workforce shortages. Today's deadline, with its unnecessarily hardline consequences, will only make that worse when hundreds, if not thousands, lose their jobs and are denied unemployment benefits. It also threatens public safety by reducing our police forces at a time when crime is already rising. People feel unsafe. They are afraid of what criminals will do when there are even fewer law enforcement officers to respond. And they are worried about people's chances of survival if there aren't enough first responders to help in an emergency. The governor underestimates the potential impact of his actions.

“Coercion, intimidation, threats and public shaming are not tactics a leader should be using against the people. The governor's obvious disdain for those who are choosing to lose their jobs rather than compromise their right to make their own medical decisions is unhelpful. He is dividing the public – segregating us and turning people against each other. Yesterday, even unvaccinated health-care workers were heroes. Today, they become villains in the governor's narrative."

Read the full statement. (https://jtwilcox.houserepublicans.wa.gov/2021/10/18/republican-leaders-todays-vaccine-deadline-threatens-critical-services-public-safety/?fbclid=IwAR3WxI9H29hbbmfbZhdkDS9QjqdVd2TIRCdjNjUkUlLdeThtbUjK_WBWJuw)
Smiley Campaign Shows Grassroots Support In Latest Fundraising Quarter
Tiffany Smiley is fighting hard to retire Patty Murray and her latest fundraising numbers show not only has Tiffany raised more than $1.6 million but she also has unequivocal grassroots support, with over 10,000 donors from Washington State. Flipping a U.S. Senate seat is hard work but Tiffany has shown in the only 5 months since starting her campaign, that she is a force to be reckoned with. Learn more about how Tiffany stands on the issues here (https://www.smileyforwashington.com/issues) .
Contact:
Steve Johnson
Communications Director
Washington State Republican Party
(425) 460-0570
steve@wsrp.org (mailto:steve@wsrp.org)

or ** unsubscribe from this list (https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=4f90cbb438&e=6a281f566d&c=6a488bcec0)

name: Cori Bush
subject: Add your name to support the Abortion Justice Act
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cori Bush for Congress
body:
This legislation will ensure federally protected access to abortion: | |
---
Peter, Black women have led the push for reproductive justice in the United States. Even when _Roe v. Wade_ was in place, we faced systemic barriers to abortion care, including racism in healthcare. For example, the Hyde amendment has restricted coverage of abortions for people who rely on Medicaid and other federally provided healthcare -- harming LGBTQ+ people, Black and brown people, and other marginalized communities. To center marginalized people seeking abortions, **I joined my sister-in-service, Congresswoman Ayanna Pressley** , in introducing the _Abortion Justice Act_. This legislation will ensure federally protected access to safe and affordable abortion services and reproductive healthcare. It would require insurance to cover abortion care and remove systemic barriers to care, including for immigrant families. [**Please add your name now to support the _Abortion Justice Act_ and affirm our right to access abortion care without stigma, shame, or systemic clean_body: The Biden Border Crisis continues| | | Friend, you may have heard -- the disingenuous Biden Administration is actually out there trying to convince the American people that illegal crossings at our southern border with Mexico fell from April to May. That’s when Joe Biden let “Title 42” -- the Covid-19-combatting health protocol measure championed by President Donald Trump and Senate Republicans which had resulted in the speedy expulsion of almost three million illegals since March of 2020 \-- expire. But if the number of illegal migrants apprehended by our overburdened Border Patrol dropped by eight percent, from 183,000 in April to 170,000 in May, that’s still more than a 125% increase over January 2021 when Joe Biden canceled President Trump’s border wall and the Biden Border Crisis began. And even worse, a source at Customs and Border Patrol reveals that an estimated 50,000-plus illegal made the crossing without being caught, which raises the total to 220,000 for May , no improvement at all! Joe Biden’s administration can try to spin the numbers all they want, but as many as 6 million illegals have crossed since he entered the White House, Friend -- the Biden Border Crisis continues with no end in sight. That’s because the radical Biden-Schumer Democrats couldn’t care less about American border security -- only advancing their open-borders globalist agenda of never-ending illegal immigration. We cannot allow this self-induced catastrophe to continue -- bringing all the crime, gang violence, human trafficking, and deadly drugs like fentanyl into America -- and the National Republican Senatorial Committee (NRSC) Whoever ends up in the White House after 2024, we MUST have a strong new Republican Majority in the U.S. Senate to bring desperately needed oversight and resistance to the Democrats’ endless open borders betrayals. Friend, we’re doing all we can to prepare for this historic showdown \-- by supporting both embattled Republican senators facing tough re-election races AND working to unseat vulnerable Democrats -- That’s why we hope you will Will you Please respond immediately and with the resources they need to break through the Democrat and liberal media spin with our winning conservative message of strong border security! Thank you, Friend -- Senate Republicans | | | | Paid for by the NRSC | | Unsubscribe from future emails

name: Will Hurd
subject: I know who I'm supporting.
body:

| | Andrew here, Trying to decide who to support in the Republican Primary was a head-scratcher for me. Our country is headed in the wrong direction under Joe Biden – and I've had a difficult time putting my support, money, and confidence behind anyone else. When Will Hurd announced that he was running for President, I decided to take a look. I did my research, watched his interviews, and decided then and there that I was supporting Will because he is down to earth, open, and is offering real solutions to:
* Solve the border crisis
* Combat the growing threat of China & Russia
* Improve the quality of our children's education
* Bring high paying jobs and restore our economy
* Protect American values

I added my name and joined Will's team because I believe he is the candidate our country needs.** **[**Will you join me and thousands of Americans across our country by adding your name to his endorsement list?**](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=34d89e461aaa44c78b8907f4a4a14a11&_m=5fa9b2f07e9f4e81b68c436f7af20f27&_e=IftJ2dka648JvcY_WVpzZM5p1m07gExPUeFUo3EqK1f3MIVK581ltX98vpWxBsexJkuB3c3TMHTue_g6uc5h1Za9BqlmUwGn_YXUcRV8oFcwXsYNm5EyHOXZ-jek5ogKQOVnNjQu0M79KzS5GKiLW_xfi73FStdi1IWwFAw3y6Nj6O0WngymAkst7EWqIBtMVWAKrrOncazltuPurGp3xWftsTPGclatTnnkFo5BMbv7i0FiCzwDTnyf-amO87bS0XXxy3djOMinJ8PbM_UYsg%3D%3D)

Please, Fellow conservative, we can’t let socialism score another win. subject: This email is only two words

body:
https://www.engelforarizona.com/ [https://www.engelforarizona.com/]
THANK YOU.
Okay, two more:
SO. MUCH.
Okay, maybe a few more:
At midnight, my campaign wrapped up our first quarterly fundraiser. Because of the generosity of folks like you, we passed our original fundraising goal by a big margin. We’re now starting this race on a great foot.
It will be important to keep this momentum up over the next year, but for now, I wanted to show my appreciation for all your support.
I hope you and your loved ones have a beautiful holiday weekend celebrating Independence Day and everything that makes this country great.
Best,
Kirsten

Peter,

I wanted to take a moment to say THANK YOU.

Thanks to your unwavering commitment, we've not only reached our FEC end-of-quarter goal but surpassed it! As we gear up for the coming months, our fundraising numbers will soon be made public. Your contributions and the collective efforts of our team will demonstrate the strength of our people-powered movement as we continue to forge ahead.

Your generosity helps me advocate for the issues that matter most to our region, and I'm honored to be serving you in Congress every day. **Your belief in our cause inspires me to roll up my sleeves and fight tirelessly for our shared values and aspirations.**

Without supporters like you, none of our progress would be possible. _Together, we are making a real difference in our region and beyond!_

As always, it's an honor to represent you,

Derek

Derek Kilmer is leading the efforts to reform our democracy and break through the partisan gridlock so that Congress works for the people. Chip in today to support his grassroots campaign.

Fellow Conservative,

I’ve got a great life in Montana; four beautiful kids and a wife whom I adore. This week, I launched my campaign to be the next United States Senator for Montana, and I’ve got to tell you that the most common question that I’ve received since my announcement has been, _**“why are you doing this?”**_

**Here is what I tell them:** it’s all about service; I’ve always tried to put myself in positions where I can have the greatest impact. Sometimes, the greatest impact is defending our freedoms oversees; sometimes it’s piloting an aerial fire-fighting aircraft. I love my country - I’ve fought and bled for Old Glory. **I would put my life on the line defending the United States of America.**
**
When your country calls and needs you, you answer. Right now, our nation is facing some very serious challenges and we need serious people in Washington to get our nation back on track.

It’s been a busy week for us here in Montana, as I’m sure it has been for you as well. That’s why I took the liberty of putting together a few of the headlines news outlets around the country ran when I announced my campaign on Tuesday. **

Greta Kemp Martin was born, raised, and educated in Mississippi. She is an active member of the Mississippi Bar, and currently works as the Litigation Director for Disability Rights Mississippi, the protection and advocacy agency for the state. As Attorney General, Greta will fight for the rights of everyday Mississippians, and stand up for the working people of this state.

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

name: Dan Crenshaw
subject: This is my next mission
