body:
I know it's been a while since you've heard from me, but I wanted to share some top-secret intel with you.

| |

---
| | | Friend,

It's Dan Crenshaw, former Navy SEAL and congressman for TX-02.

I know it's been a while since you've heard from me, but I wanted to share some top-secret intel with you about my next mission...

Now that House Republicans have secured a Majority from the Radical Left, we must pivot our attention to **DEFENDING** and **EXPANDING** our Majority.

**That means we 're going on OFFENSE, Friend. **

House Republicans recently released a list of 37 top-target districts - 1 in my own state of Texas! These 37 races are going to be the most expensive and most important races to win for Republicans in the pursuit of **DEFENDING** our Majority.

If we LOSE the House Majority, we LOSE all the progress made in the few months since we took back the Majority.

There's a lot on the line, so I'm teaming up with Majority Leader Scalise to raise the funds necessary to complete House Republicans' offensive and come out **VICTORIOUS**! BUT...

I have some _**unfortunate news**_ to report on our efforts to defeat the Radical Left:
1. Democrats outraised Republicans by a massive **$12,000,000+** last quarter.
2. Democrats announced early investments in swing districts totaling **$80,000,000+** in CA and NY.
3. Republicans are pacing **15,000 donors** behind their goals for June.

Here's your mission, should you choose to accept it, Friend:
**Majority Leader Scalise and I need you to chip in a donation between $17 (our average donation for June) and $37 ($1 for each offensive district). **

clean_body: I know it's been a while since you've heard from me, but I wanted to share some top-secret intel with you. | | | | | Friend, It's Dan Crenshaw, former Navy SEAL and congressman for TX-02. I know it's been a while since you've heard from me, but I wanted to share some top-secret intel with you about my next mission... Now that House Republicans have secured a Majority from the Radical Left, we must pivot our attention to DEFENDING and EXPANDING our Majority. That means we 're going on OFFENSE, Friend. House Republicans recently released a list of 37 top-target districts - 1 in my own state of Texas! These 37 races are going to be the most expensive and most important races to win for Republicans in the pursuit of DEFENDING our Majority. If we LOSE the House Majority, we LOSE all the progress made in the few months since we took back the Majority. There's a lot on the line, so I'm teaming up with Majority Leader Scalise to raise the funds necessary to complete House Republicans' offensive and come out VICTORIOUS! BUT... I have some unfortunate news to report on our efforts to defeat the Radical Left: 1. Democrats outraised Republicans by a massive $12,000,000+ last quarter. 2. Democrats announced early investments in swing districts totaling $80,000,000+ in CA and NY. 3. Republicans are pacing 15,000 donors behind their goals for June. Here's your mission, should you choose to accept it, Friend: Majority Leader Scalise and I need you to chip in a donation between $17 (our average donation for June) and $37 ($1 for each offensive district). | | | "ACCEPT THE MISSION: SUPPORT REPUBLICANS’ OFFENSIVE >>" | | | "ACCEPT THE MISSION: SUPPORT REPUBLICANS’ OFFENSIVE >>" | | | "ACCEPT THE MISSION: SUPPORT REPUBLICANS’ OFFENSIVE >>" I am looking forward to seeing your name. body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65781512/414499762/1321783056?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzcxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MDBiZDFmYy0zNjE4LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=44i5BgVaWUwKfPlngg5sWssPmUhfenq9F-Q1n7t1P8w=)
Peter,

I want to take a moment and say **thank you** for your incredible support ahead of last night's FEC fundraising deadline. I’m proud to share that we not only met -- _but we exceeded_ \-- our fundraising goal.

We can’t share our numbers just yet, but do know that we’re heading into the summer in a strong position. That's credit to your generosity.

**Our work doesn’t stop now.** We’re running to unseat one of Washington’s most entrenched Republicans in Ken Calvert. This movement will depend on your voice and continued activism to carry us to victory.

I look forward to meeting new friends and neighbors across the 41st District in the weeks ahead. If we haven't yet, I look forward to meeting you too, Peter! name: Senator John N. Kennedy
subject: Can you handle the truth? I think you can.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
This might be a tough pill to swallow, but I'd rather drink weed killer than sugarcoat the truth.

| |
---
| | | Today, I want to talk to you about the truth.

The unadorned, unvarnished truth.

The truth is important.

_Without the truth, we cannot order society.
Without the truth, we cannot survive as human beings.
Without the truth, we cannot thrive as human beings. _

_**[Can you handle the truth? I think you can.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62901549:Jl3f52IbN:m:1:3299561967:A52464CA1E4BDB611947F190190034FF:r "Can you handle the
truth? I think you can.")**_

The truth is, I think it's important to speak your mind. So I do. Now, that makes some people mad, but I try not to worry too much about what anyone thinks of me.

This might be a tough pill to swallow, but I'd rather drink weed killer than sugarcoat the truth.

**So here 's the truth:** The Democrats are doing EVERYTHING in their power to destroy our country. Whether it's leaving our borders wide open for terrorists and illicit drugs to flow through, attacking parental rights, or outrageous government spending, they will do whatever it takes to undermine the foundations of America. It all goes back to the SPECTACULARLY awful job Joe Biden has done with America.

**Here 's the solution:** We must DEFEAT the Democrats at _**every level**_ of government. This will be the only way we can stop the Democrats' woke agenda and put America back on the path to prosperity.

**Here 's how we'll WIN: **This all starts with YOU. I am working alongside Majority Leader Scalise to personally ask you to put your money where your mouth is and help House Republicans beat the Democrats. They were outraised last quarter by $12M, so we cannot afford for a single patriot to sideline themselves.

_**[Can I personally ask you to make a secure online contribution to this fight for the truth? I am asking for any donation right here, right now.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62901550:Jl3f52IbN:m:1:3299561967:A52464CA1E4BDB611947F190190034FF:r "Can I personally
ask you to make a secure online contribution to this fight for the truth? I am only asking for $12 right here, right now.")**_
---
| | | [INVEST IN HOUSE REPUBLICANS: CHIP IN ANY AMOUNT](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62901550:Jl3f52IbN:m:1:3299561967:A52464CA1E4BDB611947F190190034FF:r "INVEST IN HOUSE REPUBLICANS: CHIP IN $12
>>")
---
Thanks for listening to me, I hope you take what I said to heart and take action right away.

**The future of our country is counting on you. **

Thanks,
John Kennedy
(R-Louisiana)

---
| [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62901549:Jl3f52IbN:m:1:3299561967:A52464CA1E4BDB611947F190190034FF:r "John Kennedy")

Now, that makes some people mad, but I try not to worry too much about what anyone thinks of me. This might be a tough pill to swallow, but I'd rather drink weed killer than sugarcoat the truth. So here 's the truth: The Democrats are doing EVERYTHING in their power to destroy our country. Whether it's leaving our borders wide open for terrorists and illicit drugs to flow through, attacking parental rights, or outrageous government spending, they will do whatever it takes to undermine the foundations of America. It all goes back to the SPECTACULARLY awful job Joe Biden has done with America. Here 's the solution: We must DEFEAT the Democrats at every level of government. This will be the only way we can stop the Democrats' woke agenda and put America back on the path to prosperity. Here 's how we'll WIN: This all starts with YOU. I am working alongside Majority Leader Scalise to personally ask you to put your money where your mouth is and help House Republicans beat the Democrats. They were outraised last quarter by $12M, so we cannot afford for a single patriot to sideline themselves. "Can I personally ask you to make a secure online contribution to this fight for the truth? I am only asking for $12 right here, right now." | | | "INVEST IN HOUSE REPUBLICANS: CHIP IN $12 >" Thanks for listening to me, I hope you take what I said to heart and take action right away. The future of our country is counting on you. body:
We did it! With your support! Peter, I'll keep this one short and sweet. Thanks to your support, I’ve had an incredible first end-of-quarter. Not only did we manage to hit our first end-of-quarter fundraising goal, but thanks to your support, we’ll be able to accelerate the pace of our campaign. Over the next couple of months, I’ll be attending events throughout Missouri in order to speak with and hear from the hard-working families that make Missouri great. I’ll share my plan and vision for a better Missouri. A Missouri that works for everyone, not just the few and most well-connected. A Missouri that is booming with good-paying jobs that will enable our hard-working families to build a better life. Your support makes that possible, and for that, Peter, I’m incredibly grateful. **[Peter, if you’re as excited as I am, help us jump-start our fundraising for the next quarter by chipping in $5 or anything you can so we have the resources to send Josh Hawley packing.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65782372/414502745/-1824387518?refcode=em23_230701_eoqty_fndd_gq_act___WB_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_230701_eoqty_fndd_gq_act___WB_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=74eb2bca-3918-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDYzODkiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNzRlYjJiY2EtMzkxOC1lZTExLWE5YmItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=CrjvsKz8La7nDKu6BvU05m5trzpbgG0mUWagV2c3Ad8=)** Thank you,

name: Laura Friedman
subject: Good news to share!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Laura Friedman for Congress
body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65782683/414503608/62647395?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM1MzYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMTE1OGUyODQtM2ExOC1lZTExLWE5YmItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=VBt3gSbJP6EI7J7GBjoVWB_Yc-aPKEN1_JIFHY3sLbg=) I have good news to share, friend!

This team stepped up, and because of that, we were able to reach our June goal ahead of the FEC filing deadline! I seriously can’t thank you enough.

Because of your support, we’re in a strong position heading into the summer. I’m looking forward to hitting the road and continuing to meet folks across our district. **Hearing about your stories teaches me so much – and motivates me to work as hard as I possibly can to win this seat.**

I’ve included some photos from the trail below and can’t wait to share more from the stops we have planned in July.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65782684/414503609/-1241314520?refcode=em-7.1.23-all&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM1MzYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMTE1OGUyODQtM2ExOC1lZTExLWE5YmItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=VBt3gSbJP6EI7J7GBjoVWB_Yc-aPKEN1_JIFHY3sLbg=) _So much fun serving SEIU Local 99 members at their annual Education Worker Recognition Lunch with my daughter, Rachel!_ [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65782685/414503610/-1241314520?refcode=em-7.1.23-all&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM1MzYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMTE1OGUyODQtM2ExOC1lZTExLWE5YmItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=VBt3gSbJP6EI7J7GBjoVWB_Yc-aPKEN1_JIFHY3sLbg=) _One of my favorite parts of running for Congress is getting constituents involved in the issues that matter -- at events like this one._ [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65782686/414503611/-1241314520?refcode=em-7.1.23-all&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM1MzYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMTE1OGUyODQtM2ExOC1lZTExLWE5YmItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=VBt3gSbJP6EI7J7GBjoVWB_Yc-aPKEN1_JIFHY3sLbg=) _Here I am at the California Democratic Convention -- a hectic, inspiring, and exciting event. The passion and dedication of grassroots volunteers is great to see, and it's an honor supporting working Californians._ I’m so proud of what we’re building here – and am thrilled that you’re part of it. Thank you, thank you, thank you.

Have a fun and safe holiday weekend.

Onward,

clean_body: | = I have good news to share, friend! This team stepped up, and because of that, we were able to reach our June goal ahead of the FEC filing deadline! I seriously can’t thank you enough. Because of your support, we’re in a strong position heading into the summer. I’m looking forward to hitting the road and continuing to meet folks across our district. Hearing about your stories teaches me so much – and motivates me to work as hard as I possibly can to win this seat. I’ve included some photos from the trail below and can’t wait to share more from the stops we have planned in July. = So much fun serving SEIU Local 99 members at their annual Education Worker Recognition Lunch with my daughter, Rachel! = One of my favorite parts of running for Congress is getting constituents involved in the issues that matter -- at events like this one. = Here I am at the California Democratic Convention -- a hectic, inspiring, and exciting event. The passion and dedication of grassroots volunteers is great to see, and it's an honor supporting working Californians. I’m so proud of what we’re building here – and am thrilled that you’re part of it. Thank you, thank you, thank you. Have a fun and safe holiday weekend. Onward, Laura | | Paid for by Laura Friedman for Congress Laura's campaign doesn't take a dime from corporate PACs and completely relies on grassroots supporters like you! To chip in to Laura's campaign = To learn more about Laura's progressive record of supporting our working families, please visit: We'd hate to see you go, but you can click here if you'd like to . Laura Friedman for Congress PO Box 27296 Los Angeles, CA 90027 United States

body:
The truth is flipping Ohio blue is not only possible, but it's also within our reach.
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65782820/414504111/-438463598?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZjYyMjUzMC0zYjE4LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mhxBCoQdxScF8bJL2Gc7QFMmR9MnhIZ-GXV4NlivIl4=) | Team,

We wanted to take a moment to say thank you. Thanks to a surge in support over the last few days, we reached our steep end-of-quarter fundraising goal!

Right now, Ohio Democrats are fighting an uphill battle against extremist Republicans who want to stifle the voices of Ohio voters. **Every time we hit goals like this one, we move one step closer to defending the citizen-led ballot initiative petition process on August 8 and protecting reproductive rights in Ohio.**

Ohio is a state full of potential, and Republican politicians have been holding us back for too long. Hitting our fundraising goals fuels our fight to put our state back on the right track, and we couldn't do what we do without YOU, team!

Thanks for your continued support,

Ohio Democratic Party

**P.S.** If you're in the Columbus area, please join us at the Ohio Democrats' Family Reunion on July 15, featuring special guest Senator Sherrod Brown! name: Battleground Alert (via the NDRC)
subject: Could Glenn Youngkin be the next Ron DeSantis?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, John Bisognano, President
body:
|
---

Team,

**FIRST,** despite Florida being the nation’s largest swing state, gerrymandering helped Republicans seize a supermajority in the legislature.

**THEN,** Governor Ron DeSantis used that unearned power to pass some of the most extreme anti-choice, anti-voting, anti-immigrant, and anti-LGBTQ legislation we’ve seen – and he’s using that record to fuel his presidential ambitions.

**NOW, new reporting from _POLITICO_ indicates that Governor Glenn Youngkin wants to replicate the same strategy in Virginia.** | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/65782835/414504120/866594094?amount=30&refcode=EM_RTI_20230701_FR_7A_redlight922_527&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjBlNjIyNTMwLTNiMTgtZWUxMS1hOWJiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=0puBg3lwJQRYhTqD3zjTJOuJLxeKQ18637gs2QzqRDQ=)
---
[**_Help fight for fairness nationwide: Donate to the NDRC >>_**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/65782836/414504121/866594094?amount=30&refcode=EM_RTI_20230701_FR_7A_redlight922_527&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjBlNjIyNTMwLTNiMTgtZWUxMS1hOWJiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=0puBg3lwJQRYhTqD3zjTJOuJLxeKQ18637gs2QzqRDQ=)
When our grassroots movement helped Democrats take full control of Virginia for the first time in decades, we saw significant progress on issues like reproductive freedom, fair redistricting reform, voting rights, and more. **But if Glenn Youngkin and his MAGA allies get their way, they’ll turn back the clock on all of our gains.**

_And it’s not just in Virginia._ At this very moment, Republicans in states like Michigan, New Hampshire, North Carolina, and Pennsylvania are also working to overturn the victories we’ve won for voting rights and fair maps.

With Republicans across the country engaging in an unprecedented effort to undermine free and fair elections, our options are to **(1)** _Give up_ and let the GOP get away with it, or **(2)** _Get fired up_ and continue doing whatever it takes to defend our democracy.
**Don’t forget: President Obama has already warned us that “the gains we’ve made . . . are fragile.” _That means our only real choice is to continue fighting._**

[**_The NDRC will never give up on this fight, team. If you’re with us, will you donate now?_**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/65782837/414504122/866594094?amount=30&refcode=EM_RTI_20230701_FR_7A_redlight922_527&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjBlNjIyNTMwLTNiMTgtZWUxMS1hOWJiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=0puBg3lwJQRYhTqD3zjTJOuJLxeKQ18637gs2QzqRDQ=)

clean_body: | Team, FIRST, despite Florida being the nation’s largest swing state, gerrymandering helped Republicans seize a supermajority in the legislature. THEN, Governor Ron DeSantis used that unearned power to pass some of the most extreme anti-choice, anti-voting, anti-immigrant, and anti-LGBTQ legislation we’ve seen – and he’s using that record to fuel his presidential ambitions. NOW, new reporting from POLITICO indicates that Governor Glenn Youngkin wants to replicate the same strategy in Virginia. | = = When our grassroots movement helped Democrats take full control of Virginia for the first time in decades, we saw significant progress on issues like reproductive freedom, fair redistricting reform, voting rights, and more. But if Glenn Youngkin and his MAGA allies get their way, they’ll turn back the clock on all of our gains. And it’s not just in Virginia. At this very moment, Republicans in states like Michigan, New Hampshire, North Carolina, and Pennsylvania are also working to overturn the victories we’ve won for voting rights and fair maps. With Republicans across the country engaging in an unprecedented effort to undermine free and fair elections, our options are to (1) Give up and let the GOP get away with it, or (2) Get fired up and continue doing whatever it takes to defend our democracy. Don’t forget: President Obama has already warned us that “the gains we’ve made . . . are fragile.” That means our only real choice is to continue fighting. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = – The NDRC = = Since 2017, the NDRC has executed a comprehensive redistricting strategy that shifts the redistricting power, creating fair districts where Democrats can compete. | | We didn't want to send this email, Friend, but we really don't have a choice. **Yesterday, we fell short of our Fiscal Year End fundraising goal \-- at the worst possible time for our planet and the countless lives that depend on it. ** The stakes are far too high to miss this goal: **Greedy chemical companies are driving a massive decline of our precious bees. Our oceans are filling with toxic garbage. And endangered species everywhere are struggling to survive as Big Oil wrecks their ecosystems for profits. That's why our generous donors agreed to EXTEND our rare 2X match -- but ONLY until midnight TONIGHT. We urgently need environmentalists like you to step up while this opportunity lasts. Here's where your record stands:** | | **Fiscal Year End Record**
---
**EMAIL:** dpwillis67@gmail.com
**MATCH STATUS: EXPIRING at 11:59 p.m.**
**FISCAL YEAR END DONATION: STILL PENDING. [GIVE NOW.](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1858305?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)** **PEOPLE NEEDED IN YOUR CITY TO GIVE: 6 MORE**

The end of the fiscal year isn't a game to us, Friend. There's no scoreboard -- just the ongoing fight to stop Big Polluters and ensure that our planet survives. We set our initial goal at $150,000 because that's the MINIMUM we need to power our efforts forward. **Every single dollar is accounted for in our battle to protect vital habitats for helpless animals, get toxic waste out of our food chain and waterways, and protect our planet from fossil fuel-driven destruction.** When we miss our goal, this battle gets even more difficult to fight.
Falling short means we have to scale back on our work to hold Big Polluters accountable, mobilizing organizers on the ground and keeping the pressure on lawmakers to pass the planet-saving policies we desperately need. **That's why this match extension is so critical. And we're counting on you -- our planet is counting on you -- to help make up this budget shortfall with your membership support today. **
[**So please: Rush your $27 donation now before our rare match EXTENSION expires at 11:59 p.m. tonight, and every dollar will be DOUBLED -- up to our $150,000 goal -- to fight for our only Earth.**](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1858307?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)

Fellow Conservative,

I’ve got a great life in Montana; four beautiful kids and a wife whom I adore. This week, I launched my campaign to be the next United States Senator for Montana, and I’ve got to tell you that the most common question that I’ve received since my announcement has been, _**“why are you doing this?”**_

**Here is what I tell them:** it’s all about service; I’ve always tried to put myself in positions where I can have the greatest impact. Sometimes, the greatest impact is defending our freedoms oversees; sometimes it’s piloting an aerial fire-fighting aircraft. I love my country - I’ve fought and bled for Old Glory. **I would put my life on the line defending the United States of America.**
**
When your country calls and needs you, you answer. Right now, our nation is facing some very serious challenges and we need serious people in Washington to get our nation back on track.

It’s been a busy week for us here in Montana, as I’m sure it has been for you as well. That’s why I took the liberty of putting together a few of the headlines news outlets around the country ran when I announced my campaign on Tuesday. **

[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=33019676639846f0a144b9b6040d10d6&_e=c4xgQlSvIMYZw854KOQ-2Hhtaf-fXZujGB2yzQWt5pol62msC2m9sDDfVi5-nhIC8q-IPJXyZJwyTFcBqC8SFVAFRcQMK9e4ceP5W_cwtsETuaR1OW0IqCPwTU6Mbcbn5DzECffPI6ptLNDg_vnRvO07ZP5HbUIMcLgPpjJivE54eeAHtYuEBciFg7pyYLAzBBbtKzVJbkYwRrIZTws9mMlHq-yZKHk9l_fMbhb8w2fCRrsDJNWE4LM9yP33DTiRjyBwSWs_7oLbdf3pIEnb26N9r9wowhvLVWW37orvt02BlDYEBG_-yZtCjYK737rUghmxH4y_3xu6UqD4b-FCsV5NJ29yzm6yR721bROZAwD4069u6zy_ljnIwKUR__5Vsc4p15sMt0EHolv6CDW-WFkgQKdCkfNmx7WDdb1ZQFw%3D)

[**FOR GOD AND COUNTRY
CHIP IN TODAY
**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=33019676639846f0a144b9b6040d10d6&_e=c4xgQlSvIMYZw854KOQ-2Hhtaf-fXZujGB2yzQWt5pol62msC2m9sDDfVi5-nhIC8q-IPJXyZJwyTFcBqC8SFVAFRcQMK9e4ceP5W_cwtsETuaR1OW0IqCPwTU6Mbcbn5DzECffPI6ptLNDg_vnRvO07ZP5HbUIMcLgPpjJivE54eeAHtYuEBciFg7pyYLAzBBbtKzVJbkYwRrIZTws9mMlHq-yZKHk9l_fMbhb8w2fCRrsDJNWE4LM9yP33DTiRjyBwSWs_7oLbdf3pIEnb28azCXpH1JMZ19RtpnrBYssqjRP1aHL93WwJ5kuix3d3isAhDmklVtiNaD3rThpeV-63GF4nFeSmMMBHgPLiW2re38Fy_xZoDDsJa1Vof2cxEzdfLBjAKHShBr5U1jLuVqrTpeWPirBn9-h5VduRvro%3D)
I’m not sending you this to toot my own horn; I’m sending you this today because I need you to understand how important this race is going to be. My Democrat opponent has been in Washington since he was first elected back in 2006, meaning he is going to have a well-funded campaign. **[If you’re able to chip in a few dollars](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=33019676639846f0a144b9b6040d10d6&_e=c4xgQlSvIMYZw854KOQ-2Hhtaf-fXZujGB2yzQWt5pol62msC2m9sDDfVi5-nhIC8q-IPJXyZJwyTFcBqC8SFVAFRcQMK9e4ceP5W_cwtsETuaR1OW0IqCPwTU6Mbcbn5DzECffPI6ptLNDg_vnRvO07ZP5HbUIMcLgPpjJivE54eeAHtYuEBciFg7pyYLAzBBbtKzVJbkYwRrIZTws9mMlHq-yZKHk9l_fMbhb8w2fCRrsDJNWE4LM9yP33DTiRjyBwSWs_7oLbdf3pIEnb212rhvbJ8CSJx7X_LNQYrmfPT3Ykt_frAYS1OzH-ksbthLDKeQpU_d-UCfUtGx-4dO9Qrrv3KyFXlyG2vfhsaKn7DEOvCSptRaL2V7ngHc5yNCiKhuNcugRRyf3OVooUqxqBLdnIeqEvzFtSMczOJkY%3D)** before closing out of this window today, you’d be doing me a huge favor as me and my team work to get this campaign off the ground.

I want to create a brighter future for my kids and your children and grandchildren. Our campaign is about service, God, and country, not politics as usual.

Hooyah,

[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=33019676639846f0a144b9b6040d10d6&_e=c4xgQlSvIMYZw854KOQ-2Hhtaf-fXZujGB2yzQWt5pol62msC2m9sDDfVi5-nhIC8q-IPJXyZJwyTFcBqC8SFVAFRcQMK9e4ceP5W_cwtsETuaR1OW0IqCPwTU6Mbcbn5DzECffPI6ptLNDg_vnRvO07ZP5HbUIMcLgPpjJivE54eeAHtYuEBciFg7pyYLAzBBbtKzVJbkYwRrIZTws9mMlHq-yZKHk9l_fMbhb8w2fCRrsDJNWE4LM9yP33DTiRjyBwSWs_7oLbdf3pIEnb2_dtgpJGPREbMT4Nlb8ftK6yEx4lY_XbB_YkulX67xYWvP5pePUAzDgUn57gJOkDbGuG3WbtyLMXI_hy0doGN6lVg0Q1o3ePs_24niHteWoTODANBCf6MS1qC1vEiXuOjCVG9mDeBMeenhTi-0QebYk%3D)
Tim Sheehy
Former Navy SEAL
Republican for U.S. Senate

"
"I SERVED AS A NAVY SEAL, BUILT ONE OF THE LARGEST AERIAL FIREFIGHTING COMPANIES IN AMERICA CREATING OVER 200 MONTANA JOBS, AND STARTED A VETERAN-LED CATTLE RANCHING AND FEEDING OPERATION. WHETHER IT WAS IN WAR OR BUSINESS, I SEE PROBLEMS AND SOLVE THEM. AMERICA NEEDS CONSERVATIVE LEADERS WHO LOVE OUR COUNTRY. I'M RUNNING FOR THE U.S. SENATE BECAUSE OUR CAMPAIGN IS ABOUT SERVICE, DUTY, AND COUNTRY -- NOT POLITICS AS USUAL."

name: Adam Frisch
subject: expressing my gratitude
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Adam for Colorado
body:
Yesterday, we were facing our most important FEC fundraising deadline of the campaign so far. My team is still counting all of the donations and depositing the checks that folks mailed in, but one thing is clear: We didn’t just hit our grassroots fundraising goal – we crushed it! It’s all thanks to people like you. Thank you.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65784309/414508729/872526041?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjIxNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhY2FlM2UyNS00MjE4LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Ks9SWntxfWWY5LNPRBZ8HlItfA86DDASsx16pyTavDc=&emci=fdfbc694-4118-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=acae3e25-4218-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=19445147)
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65784310/414508730/872526041?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjIxNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhY2FlM2UyNS00MjE4LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Ks9SWntxfWWY5LNPRBZ8HlItfA86DDASsx16pyTavDc=&emci=fdfbc694-4118-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=acae3e25-4218-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=19445147)
Hello,
Yesterday, we were facing our most important FEC fundraising deadline of the campaign so far.
My team is still counting all of the donations and depositing the checks that folks mailed in, but one thing is clear: **We didn’t just hit our grassroots fundraising goal – we _crushed_ it!**
It’s all thanks to people like you. **Thank you.**
When I decided to run against Lauren Boebert, I knew I wasn’t going to take money from corporate PACs like she does. There’s already too much money in our elections; we don’t need even more from corporate special interests.
I wish political campaigns weren’t so much about fundraising. I take no pride in saying that our race is going to be one of the most expensive in the entire country – possibly ever.
But last year, we got out-spent by Boebert and her Super PAC allies by millions and millions of dollars. And ultimately, after the recount was done, we lost by just 546 votes. I try not to think about what might have happened if we had just had a little bit more money...
Now, I’m running against Lauren Boebert again, and I am so incredibly honored to have you alongside me on this journey.
I’m already hitting the road, meeting with thousands of voters across the district – from Durango and Pueblo, to Grand Junction, Meeker, Craig, and everywhere in between – and the people of Western and Southern Colorado are ready to give Boebert the boot.
We’re going to win this race and defeat Lauren Boebert next year. And we’re going to do it _together_.
I am deeply thankful for all you do.
Thanks again,
With gratitude -
Adam

| **[Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65784311/414508731/1610638071?refcode=em20230701pm-nd&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C35%2C50%2C100%2C250&refcode2=acae3e25-4218-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjIxNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhY2FlM2UyNS00MjE4LWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Ks9SWntxfWWY5LNPRBZ8HlItfA86DDASsx16pyTavDc=)**

body:

I've always been a big reader, Peter. Growing up, my world was
pretty small. I used to treat our local bookstore like a library, sitting
there for hours, reading books cover to cover because I didn't have the
money to buy them.

Reading opened my eyes to new perspectives, far-off places, and different
career opportunities – it helped me dream big. Our kids deserve the same
opportunity to learn and grow through books, but Ted Cruz and the GOP are
fighting to ban books about anything that doesn't align with their
far-right agenda.

That's part of why I'm running to defeat Ted Cruz – to stop the
Republicans' outrageous censorship and attacks on our kids' education. But
I have to raise $50,000 every single day to power this campaign against
Ted Cruz. [ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=tbe-em-allred.3G-TY7&refcode=AU_STB_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20230701_PM1_V1_S1&t=1006&akid=490%2E35263%2EuUuDqd ]Will you please split a donation of $10 today between our
campaign and Tammy Baldwin's to help send me to the Senate?

subject: I just got off the stage

body:
Are you feeling patriotic now? I hope so!
| | | [ ](https://email.win.donaldjtrump.com/c/eJw8kUGL2zAQhX-NfHOQRrJkHXzYVPiSdqGF0tJLENI4ma0lG1vekP31xdvsXr_3GN7H-DSPNNw7Zo4M4EpxZQBMPjGAkzr-ftanXydX_-XpWDvdqNuewhcGUO4zflYfVw6YPI07Na6KHYQWQqiwE7ptQQkOsrp20TYBuUAjdTMMvgE9KDADguatjGKoqAMOkhsuhG04t4dgjbBGhciV1mKwTPEb5UOcsh_jS1m2NB_ClKqxu5Yyr--Tegb9imFb8HCjvGDcGzvzr1j7hAsFX79MlEs9bDkunlbKlzpMKVEpiAx6QK9iwNBGKRXfVfutpHPCSFti0j1k9Q7XaVsCMukCnf2DBZ9mT5fMpPsQ-kimXDAXJp1V1jDQ5zxSZNL9wOfXPz_f3Nt_-P4O6ZT9Kvqn-7fv1dLF-UbjSKs2TPHLvmAX-xcAAP__6maLig)
---
Friend,
I hope you enjoyed my Independence Day Rally.
Most importantly, I hope it filled your veins with patriotism.
I chose to hold my rally in Pickens, South Carolina – named for one of the great heroes of the War for Independence, _the legendary General Andrew Pickens._
Several years into the American Revolution, the cause of the patriots was looking bleak.
**But despite long odds of victory, this great American General urged his fellow Patriots to stand strong in the face of the enemy’s advance.**
At the historic Battle of Cow-pens just 60 miles from where I held our rally, Pickens executed a daring maneuver to trick the British into believing the Americans were fleeing — but Pickens would NEVER retreat. The enemy was caught in his trap.
The British forces were decimated, and the patriots won a stunning victory that set the stage for the ultimate triumph at Yorktown.
Today, our current situation may look bleak. Today, we are sadly a nation in decline.
**But just like Pickens – Friend, my fellow patriot – we must NEVER retreat.**
Despite a Deep State out to get us, despite RINOs spending $300 MILLION to stop us, despite a weaponized Department of Justice trying to throw me in jail, despite a fake news media machine that spews lies and propaganda 24 hours a day, despite the Soros Money Machine trying to buy the White House, and despite rabid prosecutors trying to “get” me, I have no doubt in my mind that our America First movement will prevail on November 5, 2024.
Our story will go down in history books as yet another classic American underdog tale that has captured the spirit of our nation since 1776.
**Together, we will MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN!**

clean_body: Are you feeling patriotic now? I hope so! | | | Friend, I hope you enjoyed my Independence Day Rally. Most importantly, I hope it filled your veins with patriotism. I chose to hold my rally in Pickens, South Carolina – named for one of the great heroes of the War for Independence, the legendary General Andrew Pickens. Several years into the American Revolution, the cause of the patriots was looking bleak. But despite long odds of victory, this great American General urged his fellow Patriots to stand strong in the face of the enemy’s advance. At the historic Battle of Cow-pens just 60 miles from where I held our rally, Pickens executed a daring maneuver to trick the British into believing the Americans were fleeing — but Pickens would NEVER retreat. The enemy was caught in his trap. The British forces were decimated, and the patriots won a stunning victory that set the stage for the ultimate triumph at Yorktown. Today, our current situation may look bleak. Today, we are sadly a nation in decline. But just like Pickens – Friend, my fellow patriot – we must NEVER retreat. Despite a Deep State out to get us, despite RINOs spending $300 MILLION to stop us, despite a weaponized Department of Justice trying to throw me in jail, despite a fake news media machine that spews lies and propaganda 24 hours a day, despite the Soros Money Machine trying to buy the White House, and despite rabid prosecutors trying to “get” me, I have no doubt in my mind that our America First movement will prevail on November 5, 2024. Our story will go down in history books as yet another classic American underdog tale that has captured the spirit of our nation since 1776. Together, we will MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN! | | Thank you, | Donald J. | | Friend,

---
In a 6-3 decision, the Supreme Court ruled against affirmative action programs to set our country back on a MERIT BASED system of education.

---
In other words, if a student has worked hard and gotten fantastic marks, then somebody who hasn’t done nearly as well and who perhaps has not worked as hard, will not take their place on a school, college or university roster.

---
To rigorously enforce yesterday’s Supreme Court ruling, I will eliminate all “Diversity, Equity, and Inclusion” programs across the entire federal government. And I will direct the DOJ to pursue Civil Rights claims against any school, corporation, or university that engages in unlawful racial discrimination.

---
We will restore a society based on Equality, Liberty, and MERIT.

---
**This landmark decision was ONLY possible because of the _THREE_ appointments I made to the Supreme Court.**

---
_But, of course, the Biden-Harris Administration – which is built entirely off of affirmative action – HATES this ruling._

They’re now even questioning the legitimacy and authority of the Supreme Court.

subject: Sign Anytime, Office Now Open!!! Help Us Repeal RCV!!!
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Alaskans For Honest Elections, 2521 E Mtn Village Dr #904 Wasilla, AK 99654 Phillip Izon, Director Approved This Message
body:
Please share this with as many people as you can. Share with 5-10 people. | | | [](https://mgcp03.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=64a085435ce07b24a5c3be28&u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.alaskansforhonestelections.com%2F%3Fss_source%3Dsscampaigns%26ss_campaign_id%3D64a083dfd198de7de993a556%26ss_email_id%3D64a085435ce07b24a5c3be28%26ss_campaign_name%3DSign%2BAnytime%252C%2BOffice%2BNow%2BOpen%2521%2521%2521%2BHelp%2BUs%2BRepeal%2BRCV%2521%2521%2521%26ss_campaign_sent_date%3D2023-07-01T19%253A58%253A29Z&w=636d98a80d1d302f275cb244&c=b_64a083dfd198de7de993a556&l=en-US&s=X16h2D66FoNHnpgzAJz7k9d-Vwk%3D)
---
|
### **Important**
---
### **Our Office is Now Open, Soon We will be Open 7 Days a Week. At this time, please call before you head this way to make sure we have someone here to get your signature.**
**Address: 4201 E Dimond Way Wasilla, AK 99654****It is on the same road as Ken’s Garden Supply (**_**4121 Dimond Way, Wasilla, AK 99654). Once you turn on Dimond, drive straight up the hill. Do not turn, go straight up the hill, there are White Yard Signs with our logo on them. We will have bigger signs coming soon. If you are disabled, please let us know when you call and we will come to the car for you to sign.**__**Phone Number:**[**907-802-8116**](tel:+19078028116)_ _**Email:**[**Admin@AlaskansForHonestElections.com**](mailto:Admin@AlaskansForHonestElections.com?subject=Office%20)_
---
#### **You Must Sign The Petition In Person, Online Signatures Do Not Count.**
---
---
|
---
---
|
---
---
|
---
### **Signing Locations**
---
---
|
---
---
|
---
---
|
---
---
|
---
#### **Kodiak Please Contact To Sign the Petition!!!
Dan Powell 907-942-1312
Thank You Dan!!!**
---
---
|
---
#### **DC Draino pictured below wearing one of our buttons while doing a presentation here in Alaska.**
---
---
|
---
**Signature Gathering Update:** Alaskans would like to update Alaska on where we are at in our signature drive. We have collected more than half of the required 26,000 signatures so far with more petition books being returned every day. We have 880 Petition Books in circulation if all filled out is 132,000 signatures. We have had such incredible success; we have asked all our Alaskan Volunteers to return their books 6 months early. Join today to help us Repeal Ranked Choice Voting, help us get our signatures finished as soon as possible. **Supreme Court Decision – Al Gross Should have stayed on the US House Ballot** Very concerning development at the Supreme Court regarding Al Gross dropping out of Special Primary in 2022, it appears that the division of elections violated State Law when they removed Al Gross from the ballot. If he was not removed it would have be Begich, Palin, Gross, Peltola on the ballot, which may have had a very different result. We are very troubled by this development and hope all Alaskans take the time to learn more about this Supreme Court ruling.
#### “Al Gross should have stayed on U.S. House ballot, Alaska Supreme Court says Justices concluded that the Alaska Division of Elections mishandled the withdrawal of the independent who sought to replace Don Young”
“The Alaska Division of Elections improperly removed Al Gross, an independent candidate for U.S. House, from last year’s special election ballot, the Alaska Supreme Court said in a ruling published Friday.”BY: [JAMES BROOKS](https://mgcp03.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=64a085435ce07b24a5c3be28&u=https%3A%2F%2Falaskabeacon.com%2Fauthor%2Fjames-brooks%2F&w=636d98a80d1d302f275cb244&c=b_64a083dfd198de7de993a556&l=en-US&s=J-jwBdObHMANyZoRdFvRPSUKKNU%3D "Posts by James Brooks") \- APRIL 28, 2023 5:48 PM Alaska Beacon [https://alaskabeacon.com/2023/04/28/al-gross-should-have-stayed-on-u-s-house-ballot-alaska-supreme-court-says/](https://mgcp03.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=64a085435ce07b24a5c3be28&u=https%3A%2F%2Falaskabeacon.com%2F2023%2F04%2F28%2Fal-gross-should-have-stayed-on-u-s-house-ballot-alaska-supreme-court-says%2F&w=636d98a80d1d302f275cb244&c=b_64a083dfd198de7de993a556&l=en-US&s=UOrVS8YiTjAVF5iZkOGapfrGYUY%3D) **Our work used to ban Ranked Choice Voting** We have been working hard with other States to help them learn about Ranked Choice Voting, why it is not a good system and how it does not achieve the goals it sets out to accomplish. Our work is being credited by multiple State Legislatures. We are proud to be a part of the work throughout the country to ban Ranked Choice Voting. More States have banned Rank Choice Voting, than use it (5-2)**Florida, Tennessee, Idaho, South Dakota, and Montana have banned ranked Choice Voting, more states are looking at banning ranked choice Voting.**
---
**We will have more signing opportunities all year, we are hoping to have all of the petition books turned in by August 31st, the signature verification process will take time and we want to make sure to we the correct amount of signatures in every district.**
---
---
|
---
---
|
---
#### [**Click Here to See Our Store and Show Your Support**](https://mgcp03.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=64a085435ce07b24a5c3be28&u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.alaskansforhonestelections.com%2Fstore%3Fss_source%3Dsscampaigns%26ss_campaign_id%3D64a083dfd198de7de993a556%26ss_email_id%3D64a085435ce07b24a5c3be28%26ss_campaign_name%3DSign%2BAnytime%252C%2BOffice%2BNow%2BOpen%2521%2521%2521%2BHelp%2BUs%2BRepeal%2BRCV%2521%2521%2521%26ss_campaign_sent_date%3D2023-07-01T19%253A58%253A29Z&w=636d98a80d1d302f275cb244&c=b_64a083dfd198de7de993a556&l=en-US&s=jQh4Eabyf6quXCV1sAx8PQRvhRk%3D)
---
#### **Help Us Gather Signatures Today, Sign Up On Our Website or Send Us an Email!!!**
---
---
|
---
**admin@alaskansforhonestelections.com or call 907-802-8116****We only need 26,000 signatures, which is the lowest amount in history since we had the lowest turnout by percentage in history. Rank Choice Voting has made our job even easier. Let’s Do This Alaska.****If you would like to help us collect signatures, please sign up here** https://www.alaskansforhonestelections.com/petition-signatures**The Pro Rank Choice Voting group paid $300k and used mostly out of state signature gatherers, we want this done “By Alaskans, For Alaskans”**
---
#### **An Alaska Senator has said that our Bill is the Most Important Bill for the 2024 Election. We need you to get there. Help us Today!!!**
---
### **Sign In Person Today**
#### **Want To Sign The Petition To Get Repeal Rank Choice Voting!!!**

There are 40 House Districts, we need at least 35 or 75% of the districts. Attached is a breakdown of how many signatures we need per district. We will need signature gatherers in each district. The sign up link is the only way we can keep track of all of the people who are getting petition books. The group that passed Ranked Choice Voting in 2020 spent over $300,000 just on the signature gathering process, they paid an out of state firm to gather signatures here in Alaska. We want to have Alaskans in charge this time around. They collected 40,000 signatures, we want to collect 75,000.
Link to sign up for a Petition Book
[https://www.alaskansforhonestelections.com/petition-signatures](https://mgcp03.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=64a085435ce07b24a5c3be28&u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.alaskansforhonestelections.com%2Fpetition-signatures%3Fss_source%3Dsscampaigns%26ss_campaign_id%3D64a083dfd198de7de993a556%26ss_email_id%3D64a085435ce07b24a5c3be28%26ss_campaign_name%3DSign%2BAnytime%252C%2BOffice%2BNow%2BOpen%2521%2521%2521%2BHelp%2BUs%2BRepeal%2BRCV%2521%2521%2521%26ss_campaign_sent_date%3D2023-07-01T19%253A58%253A29Z&w=636d98a80d1d302f275cb244&c=b_64a083dfd198de7de993a556&l=en-US&s=km5zQGfy_JGbACp3o5SasSe8Nzk%3D)Please use the link below to find your house district or include your address if you do not know your house district. Scroll to the bottom and it has a search by address, which should tell you Your House and Senate Representatives.
[https://akleg.gov/Districts.php](https://mgcp03.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=64a085435ce07b24a5c3be28&u=https%3A%2F%2Fakleg.gov%2FDistricts.php&w=636d98a80d1d302f275cb244&c=b_64a083dfd198de7de993a556&l=en-US&s=Ds1oLMwrVn--Hh6d4y-28W54cps%3D)**To get involved please email**[**Admin@AlaskansForHonestElections.com**](mailto:admin@alaskansforhonestelections.com?subject=Newsletter%20Contact)
---
### Please Share with Friends, Family, and Co-Workers!
---
[_ _ Call Us or Text Us Here _ _](tel:+19078028116)
---
[_ _ Email Us Today _ _](mailto:info@alaskansforhonestgovernment.org?subject=Newsletter)
---

There are 40 House Districts, we need at least 35 or 75% of the districts. Attached is a breakdown of how many signatures we need per district. We will need signature gatherers in each district. The sign up link is the only way we can keep track of all of the people who are getting petition books. The group that passed Ranked Choice Voting in 2020 spent over $300,000 just on the signature gathering process, they paid an out of state firm to gather signatures here in Alaska. We want to have Alaskans in charge this time around. They collected 40,000 signatures, we want to collect 75,000. Link to sign up for a Petition Book use the link below to find your house district or include your address if you do not know your house district. Scroll to the bottom and it has a search by address, which should tell you Your House and Senate Representatives. get involved please emailmailto:admin@alaskansforhonestelections.com?subject=Newsletter%20Contact Please Share with Friends, Family, and Co-Workers! tel:+19078028116 mailto:info@alaskansforhonestgovernment.org?subject=Newsletter | | This Communication Was Paid For By Alaskans For Honest Elections, 2521 E Mtn Village Dr #904 Wasilla, AK 99654 Phillip Izon, Director Approved This Message. The Top 3 Contributors Are Phillip Izon, Wasilla, AK, Ranked Choice Education Association, Anchorage, AK, ; And Carolyn Overstreet, Anchorage, AK | | | | | | | | | | | ---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|--- Alaskans For Honest Elections 2521 E. Mtn Village Dr Ste B #904 Wasilla, AK USA

| | |
---
| Folks, A quick apology for any confusion over the recent email that appeared to come from my former congressional campaign account. I ran for congress in Minnesota’s 7th district in 2022. I am not planning on running for congress again in 2024, as we will be doing all we can to grow the CRP party. We are putting controls in place to ensure we do not make this mistake again. In the Constitutional Republic Party we believe in acknowledging our mistakes, owning them, and fixing them. Thank you very much for your understanding. We are attaching the original email below for those who may not have read it, due to the appearance of it coming from something other than the CRP. Bull Johnson
---
---
| | | [ ](https://click.mlsend2.com/link/c/YT0yMjQ5NTIyMjkzNDY4MzA1NDI3JmM9cDF3NSZlPTAmYj0xMTY2NjcyNjUzJmQ9bzNuOHcycA==.i_74ttdtHzLWTco9itkkl-KleoqpuNjhubKIIty8hVw)
---
| CRP Newletter / June 30, 2023
---
Grassroots Membership
The last few days have been a whirlwind around here. We had a [TikTok video](https://click.mlsend2.com/link/c/YT0yMjQ5NTIyMjkzNDY4MzA1NDI3JmM9cDF3NSZlPTAmYj0xMTY2NjcyNjU0JmQ9dDd1NGUzbw==.5yRsSH8k6pBcxG7wbaWD6DO_yO8HkkL17iqZtKkf1FA) do very well, reaching almost 50,000 people, and interest in the party continues to skyrocket! We are in the process of organizing chapters in Indiana, Texas, and Colorado. If you are in any of those states, and are interested in helping to get those off the ground, let us know.

---
| |
---
| |
---
**GRASSROOTS MEMBERSHIP NOW AVAILABLE** ****For those of you who missed it, the Grassroots Membership is a non-paying membership without voting rights. The membership may be converted to a regular membership at any time by volunteering or paying annual dues. This is a way for you to get involved without having to “pay to play,” so to speak. This will allow us better to track our support, and allow us to share those numbers and our growing impact with the world. To become a grassroots member all you have to do is agree to our statement and provide your name and email.

---
| |
---
| | [Join As a Grassroots Member Today!](https://click.mlsend2.com/link/c/YT0yMjQ5NTIyMjkzNDY4MzA1NDI3JmM9cDF3NSZlPTAmYj0xMTY2NjcyNjU2JmQ9cDVvNnE2ag==.0wSmtJhOlqoQZf1ytbq4fK_lrVqWlPmVs73vimr75n8)
---
---
| |
---
| In the next few weeks you'll likely hear about our petition drive in Minnesota to gain ballot access. This will be a tough road to hoe, as we need to gather approximately **30,000 signatures before the end of May 2024**. We will be looking for volunteers and donations to help make it happen!
**→ If you're interested in becoming involved with the CRP, please reach out to us!** We need leaders, and those who are willing to spread the word. Thanks again for your support. We appreciate you! Travis “Bull” Johnson

---
---
| |
---

clean_body: If Trump loyalists get into positions of power, they could pave his path back to the White House with voter suppression laws, endless election audits, and anti-democratic power schemes. | | | | | Donald Trump’s hate-fueled rally in South Carolina had everything you’d expect – lies, anti-democratic rhetoric, and personal attacks at his opponents. But now it’s up to this team to turn this rally into a NET LOSS for Trump and state-level Republicans. And Democrats across the country are rising to the challenge,flooding in grassroots donations to counteract any momentum Trump is building in the states. Just take a look: | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | | | | | Trump’s latest rally was about one thing: Leveraging his lies and unhinged conspiracy theories to send his MAGA donors into a fundraising frenzy. Trump is building out his war chest to power his campaign and elect his far-right allies at every level of the ballot. If Trump succeeds in getting his supporters into positions of power heading into 2024, they could pave his path back to the White House with voter suppression laws, endless election audits, and anti-democratic power schemes. But if Democrats mobilize NOW – just moments after Trump stepped off stage – we can deal a huge blow to his efforts and continue fighting to protect our democracy. Let’s do this. Peter,

I’ve got a great life in Montana; four beautiful kids and a wife whom I adore. This week, I launched my campaign to be the next United States Senator for Montana, and I’ve got to tell you that the most common question that I’ve received since my announcement has been, _**“why are you doing this?”**_

**Here is what I tell them:** it’s all about service; I’ve always tried to put myself in positions where I can have the greatest impact. Sometimes, the greatest impact is defending our freedoms oversees; sometimes it’s piloting an aerial fire-fighting aircraft. I love my country - I’ve fought and bled for Old Glory. **I would put my life on the line defending the United States of America.**
**
When your country calls and needs you, you answer. Right now, our nation is facing some very serious challenges and we need serious people in Washington to get our nation back on track.

It’s been a busy week for us here in Montana, as I’m sure it has been for you as well. That’s why I took the liberty of putting together a few of the headlines news outlets around the country ran when I announced my campaign on Tuesday. **

[](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=686ae5dadfb04d8489c158227007cd4d&_e=eGvC9z0txky6p3vJjO7DcTRcqnUZC-LX4Sl7MBUJQSuphPIS6kNCsKy02Ni6cpf6PthVhF3kuG0Y61kWYbKBRjZ61w1AEoYTNP1vababezpFnUZmxk6MFhg-XJnnD9_uHXIuOJTHCnidhCZYs9Kzx21mLvE0cXKXzA1P6WOFpl8B65XizYgu2XWKE6LGtohvU0C4OXoElWjuRKzEHJKImqCc3xjZFSP2HVGqiiEV_FFJf6BFz_lkMG5wuu6SfX_ORLY2kNfHTpL8M0QZ2yQ91RsmjEBV5u_6W8Jw6lM-RbJl9I2L6Ue9FC2eMbAii8pH-Q2koDZCHGbtL2AI2hZEwIiODfXz4r50QAGa8P_cVUjEjFfDLVdHch1zB75TUFSbeiB5bf4TTTyLWk9rHrMy1FlgdAGoXUpMZmQbjozXGoM%3D)

[**FOR GOD AND COUNTRY
CHIP IN TODAY
**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=686ae5dadfb04d8489c158227007cd4d&_e=eGvC9z0txky6p3vJjO7DcTRcqnUZC-LX4Sl7MBUJQSuphPIS6kNCsKy02Ni6cpf6PthVhF3kuG0Y61kWYbKBRjZ61w1AEoYTNP1vababezpFnUZmxk6MFhg-XJnnD9_uHXIuOJTHCnidhCZYs9Kzx21mLvE0cXKXzA1P6WOFpl8B65XizYgu2XWKE6LGtohvU0C4OXoElWjuRKzEHJKImqCc3xjZFSP2HVGqiiEV_FFJf6BFz_lkMG5wuu6SfX_ORLY2kNfHTpL8M0QZ2yQ91ZY0IGS_H0jpfwnwnxF1vgb6i-YRdN2cr0t0nPKaPPGBivFICH5kN9YyaO9gDVBpXUzGTn-k26SHVVrbo-nh4p9u6OZgcLJ7YONyC3gDy22RizagXvUYH9pm0GMqNDB9vfRxdHuvSuTxWyN1Z_kEnqE%3D)
I’m not sending you this to toot my own horn; I’m sending you this today because I need you to understand how important this race is going to be. My Democrat opponent has been in Washington since he was first elected back in 2006, meaning he is going to have a well-funded campaign. **[If you’re able to chip in a few dollars](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=686ae5dadfb04d8489c158227007cd4d&_e=eGvC9z0txky6p3vJjO7DcTRcqnUZC-LX4Sl7MBUJQSuphPIS6kNCsKy02Ni6cpf6PthVhF3kuG0Y61kWYbKBRjZ61w1AEoYTNP1vababezpFnUZmxk6MFhg-XJnnD9_uHXIuOJTHCnidhCZYs9Kzx21mLvE0cXKXzA1P6WOFpl8B65XizYgu2XWKE6LGtohvU0C4OXoElWjuRKzEHJKImqCc3xjZFSP2HVGqiiEV_FFJf6BFz_lkMG5wuu6SfX_ORLY2kNfHTpL8M0QZ2yQ91UJfGnjdOWG40yeebWWdvsizrTqUl_slfVkbZtK969SQ_pV3IfAF9oQ5Mw6BXfCT1GliJrJ9xO57xB5jtMyAsCYpi1lUg1kbHe3cGpC0E_Ohi45EwSasYdl5aiCmo7xlVJ_650NqV5kDW5kMz3FlSBg%3D)** before closing out of this window today, you’d be doing me a huge favor as me and my team work to get this campaign off the ground.

I want to create a brighter future for my kids and your children and grandchildren. Our campaign is about service, God, and country, not politics as usual.

Hooyah,

name: Friends of the Earth
subject: We can’t afford to fall short in the fight for our planet’s future. But we need your help, friend
body:
| | | | | [](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/e_s17_main_cobrandedemail_c3)
---|---|---

| | | **This could be a DISASTER, friend****. We were counting on hitting our goal by yesterday’s deadline,** but we fell seriously short. Now we urgently need your help to close the gap before it’s too late.
---
Here’s why your matched gift matters so much today: Vulnerable species are depending on Friends of the Earth to protect them from certain EXTINCTION and defend the habitats they call home and our planet from Big Polluters. Any gap in our budget means we have to scale back our fight while greedy corporations ramp up their planet-killing destruction for the sake of profits. We can’t let that happen.
With so much at stake, our generous donors agreed to **EXTEND this once-a-year match opportunity for ONE MORE DAY.** So we had to pull your supporter record while there’s still time to DOUBLE your impact for our planet.
| | [ ](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1858335?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
**EMAIL:** dpwillis67@gmail.com
**MATCH STATUS:** **EXPIRING at 11:59 p.m.**
**END-OF-FISCAL-YEAR DONATION:** STILL PENDING
**DONORS NEEDED FROM your area:** **4**
---
| | [DOUBLE MY GIFT NOW](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1858335?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
_Records reflect most recent available data. Match extension expires at 11:59 p.m._
---
To be honest, friend, we’re really worried. **We set our goal to hit $150,000 before our end-of-fiscal-year deadline because that’s the MINIMUM we need to stand up to Big Polluters.** There’s no fluff in our budget, just the dollars and cents it takes to show up and fight when ecosystems are under attack. ** If we fall short, that fight gets infinitely harder – and we feel the impact in poisoned waterways, toxic farmland, and the growing absence of endangered species. **
That’s not the world we want to live in. We can’t afford it, and neither can the precious species counting on us to do the right thing. **That’s why this match extension is such a critical opportunity to help protect the planet we all share. But we only have until 11:59 p.m. TONIGHT to make up our fundraising shortfall, and we’re relying on activists like you who know how much is at stake. **
[**Please: Rush your $27 membership gift now before our rare match EXTENSION expires at midnight tonight, and every dollar will be doubled – up to $150,000 – to power the fight for our only Earth!**](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1858336?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)

clean_body: | | | | | ---|---|--- | | | This could be a DISASTER, friend. We were counting on hitting our goal by yesterday’s deadline, but we fell seriously short. Now we urgently need your help to close the gap before it’s too late. Here’s why your matched gift matters so much today: Vulnerable species are depending on Friends of the Earth to protect them from certain EXTINCTION and defend the habitats they call home and our planet from Big Polluters. Any gap in our budget means we have to scale back our fight while greedy corporations ramp up their planet-killing destruction for the sake of profits. We can’t let that happen. With so much at stake, our generous donors agreed to EXTEND this once-a-year match opportunity for ONE MORE DAY. So we had to pull your supporter record while there’s still time to DOUBLE your impact for our planet. | | == EMAIL: dpwillis67@gmail.com MATCH STATUS: EXPIRING at 11:59 p.m. END-OF-FISCAL-YEAR DONATION: STILL PENDING DONORS NEEDED FROM your area: 4 | | == Records reflect most recent available data. Match extension expires at 11:59 p.m. To be honest, friend, we’re really worried. We set our goal to hit $150,000 before our end-of-fiscal-year deadline because that’s the MINIMUM we need to stand up to Big Polluters. There’s no fluff in our budget, just the dollars and cents it takes to show up and fight when ecosystems are under attack. If we fall short, that fight gets infinitely harder – and we feel the impact in poisoned waterways, toxic farmland, and the growing absence of endangered species. That’s not the world we want to live in. We can’t afford it, and neither can the precious species counting on us to do the right thing. That’s why this match extension is such a critical opportunity to help protect the planet we all share. But we only have until 11:59 p.m. TONIGHT to make up our fundraising shortfall, and we’re relying on activists like you who know how much is at stake. == If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | == | | == | | == | | == Thank you for your urgent support, Erich Pica President Friends of the Earth | Contact Us: Friends of the Earth U.S. Washington, D.C. | Berkeley, CA 1-877-843-8687

subject: Support our nominated Candidates!
body:
** Call to Action - Support our Nominated Candidates!
------------------------------------------------------------

** Congratulations to our chapter members who won Green Party nomination at the June 28 State Central Committee Meeting:
------------------------------------------------------------

** DAVID AGOSTA
-for Mayor of New Haven
PAUL GARLINGHOUSE
-for Alder Ward 13, New Haven
JORDAN WERME
-for Town Council, East Hampton
JUSTIN PAGLINO
------------------------------------------------------------
-for board of selectmen, Guilford

** THESE CANDIDATES NEED YOUR SUPPORT!
PARTICULARLY FOR DAVID AND JORDAN'S CAMPAIGNS WE VERY MUCH NEED TREASURERS.

WE ARE ALSO SEEKING INDIVIDUALS TO CIRCULATE DAVID'S BALLOT ACCESS PETITION, AND INDIVIDUALS WILLING TO FILL POSITIONS IN THE CAMPAIGN INCLUDING EVENTS COORDINATOR, OUTREACH COORDINATOR, FUNDRAISING COORDINATOR, AND RESEARCH ASSISTANT.

IF YOUR ARE WILLING AND ABLE TO HELP, EVEN IF IT'S JUST A LITTLE, PLEASE RESPOND TO THIS EMAIL AND WE'LL DISCUSS - OR CALL ME AT 860-227-2258 (JUSTIN)
------------------------------------------------------------

** UPCOMING EVENTS
------------------------------------------------------------

** SUNDAY JULY 2 - 10AM-1PM.
We'll be tabling as a chapter at Sunday's City Seed Farmer's Market in Edgewood Park, New Haven. Come join us as we advertise our presence as a chapter and collect signatures for our New Haven Mayoral Candidate!
------------------------------------------------------------

** WEDS JULY 12 -7PM
MONTHLY CHAPTER MEETING
------------------------------------------------------------

** -WE'LL BE DISCUSSING OUR CANDIDATES' CAMPAIGNS, APPROVING OUR BYLAWS, ELECTING OFFICERS, AND MORE - MARK YOUR CALENDAR!
------------------------------------------------------------

** We are the Party of People, Planet, and Peace!
------------------------------------------------------------

** The need for an independent left party is clear. We are an ecosocialist peace party who fight for social, economic, electoral, and environmental justice. Come to our meetings and events to meet us and get involved!
------------------------------------------------------------
The Greater New Haven Green Party is a chapter
of the Green Party of Connecticut!
Find our chapter Bylaws HERE (https://drive.google.com/drive/folders/1RdZ-DjmwN76_XrktMoS83csmQ4zukzDZ?usp=share_link) .
Read minutes of our past meetings HERE (https://drive.google.com/drive/folders/1QeCwDL4ybnWA2GIhE2ka7_6s2PFjsYo-?usp=sharing) .
Follow us on Facebook HERE (https://www.facebook.com/GreaterNewHavenGreenParty) .
Follow us on Twitter HERE (https://twitter.com/nhvGreens) .

============================================================
Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can ** update your preferences (https://justin4all.us10.list-manage.com/profile?u=9d3bf03d4d24177d79cb656ca&id=18b5d036be&e=91a3f04de5&c=ed844f9fd1)
or ** unsubscribe from this list (https://justin4all.us10.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=9d3bf03d4d24177d79cb656ca&id=18b5d036be&e=91a3f04de5&c=ed844f9fd1)
.

| | **The Battle of Gettysburg, one of the most important battles of the American Civil War, began.
**
---
| | [](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=345d41f638054391a1b1862d96116c36&_e=O1bvyfNSjTHHbgRdwFm3B1TCsniCFmq2L0K6EB7f7ZaYCT3CNCOfJAJ198xlU8rnMYJVRUUROwSrkiGr-OmU2gM6Gu1VzLuiFBWvPYWizFm6YkE0gylWpZ_Lfsf1_K9AkL2_xmO7BE-LGG7OIG-4rXAuStmlS4pq3wA5PSHkYCjkZE_KTic5BHGJjJpX8ZAm2aC-zxwtGBm8NyfWrvxAyu23VCgEEzuRZ1uHvJB8dDbACLYT3WorCjzfDoragYytxG8CTPp3glYZwcxVFvVWN9yzsReIvQB3S4_ZWtxETXeHbL0r5kRjf5XNZ1uVu-uElVeFLlC15G8uicwhaLgu1A%3D%3D)

Image Source [britannica.com](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=345d41f638054391a1b1862d96116c36&_e=O1bvyfNSjTHHbgRdwFm3B8DZmNct7-QnEp0JsRurfeJRwIqh95SnVkps1GePSS-sXcPyuUE189BOlEcktuFf8fnVz0gCDDQZkVXoG7-qV65nO4fZQT85k9UnsMg1wjZokOEoHiKt4QeuBc8IofVSJ153lD_Lx7sSVon2RsWqSzp7ibJPinyRc3Ou7D0rtjizKWGKhPumzWokf37SWwTKHGma9onzZX5rkv8tmxURa6A%3D)

[**July 1, 1863:** The battle marked a turning point in the Civil War, as the Union successfully defended its position and forced the Confederates to retreat. The Battle of Gettysburg is remembered as a critical moment in American history, where the tide of the Civil War began to shift in favor of the Union forces.](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=345d41f638054391a1b1862d96116c36&_e=O1bvyfNSjTHHbgRdwFm3B1TCsniCFmq2L0K6EB7f7ZaYCT3CNCOfJAJ198xlU8rnMYJVRUUROwSrkiGr-OmU2gM6Gu1VzLuiFBWvPYWizFm6YkE0gylWpZ_Lfsf1_K9AkL2_xmO7BE-LGG7OIG-4rXAuStmlS4pq3wA5PSHkYCjBwROwLtzb-FsaVHUI7T1tgXY-CYzoTnMPuk0iTyeZjjGSeDq39OYln9pPGJhokvN053RFRN0wOXBZ9Fyi6nqlcnGpsB6DnZtLmQSd6ksqG-rJt-lFYdE-pMgZif5vnv_SeXDjCzXTfiRh4qNv4sHTmaVU6sX37bSfYiMec_M5ww%3D%3D) **Source -[history.com](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=345d41f638054391a1b1862d96116c36&_e=O1bvyfNSjTHHbgRdwFm3B1TCsniCFmq2L0K6EB7f7ZaYCT3CNCOfJAJ198xlU8rnMYJVRUUROwSrkiGr-OmU2gM6Gu1VzLuiFBWvPYWizFm6YkE0gylWpZ_Lfsf1_K9AkL2_xmO7BE-LGG7OIG-4rXAuStmlS4pq3wA5PSHkYCgzoQNRtFnUhMAXMN0pcx-wXepEtTLY8_MeMKpX8A1wbOTZfVXcjP_xNBQ1Vk8nOpe3FC3FBjUVm4UwNG9Brsfh61_0bvpA5bJOfdszn7SnU20W1_8WxKg4QucdnZO0oSR7OW7LuSyO521GRTs7lIEwFT4C8_nS0gMtVrZO2JV6Xg%3D%3D)**

| | **The U.S. Postal Service instituted the Zone Improvement Plan Code (Zip Code)
**

| | [](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=345d41f638054391a1b1862d96116c36&_e=O1bvyfNSjTHHbgRdwFm3B1TCsniCFmq2L0K6EB7f7ZZCEBPwIap5wY8n04Zoj4s1CQh05GqEuZAEd0mgSjNAbMXEJD-6pGnvIrVVCWvmOlE2Km8IxJ68rCInrDN_2YMVwdPWyEcDSQIvepIljk7Mu870u7UGXzUnk3TobHGogwnnG2QqhwpDldQ2eoWOSk0i9OF0eGYetBnm_641S9vFcQgs2W_C0lm8HTRVFFEL7jrQAWDiUfOIyspQr2eGtLLlZnGDAPourbp5QYohxao5kYwbCgvIOtuZItu2qs13QaZPW69Ie8cLuMZWI9hE-9Zu)

[**July 1, 1963:** By categorizing mail based on these codes, the postal service could streamline its operations and improve accuracy and speed in mail delivery. The introduction of ZIP codes revolutionized the postal industry and had a profound impact on businesses and individuals across the nation, ensuring more reliable and timely communication and contributing to the overall growth and development of the economy.](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=345d41f638054391a1b1862d96116c36&_e=O1bvyfNSjTHHbgRdwFm3B1TCsniCFmq2L0K6EB7f7ZZCEBPwIap5wY8n04Zoj4s1CQh05GqEuZAEd0mgSjNAbMXEJD-6pGnvIrVVCWvmOlE2Km8IxJ68rCInrDN_2YMVwdPWyEcDSQIvepIljk7Mu83s1NfS-syRsTWOpklBou8QP0T2Ow6KMH1ubEcFHhZanG1huT0aui9qMS__fnYYFdyFAT2-talX5EgczYekZwFsnnUOMSgIxqbBZrnTmDAt8_1N_rP8SJaY5pIBfH-v9EeGuVuOQevEebckD_vYUx1i7LIfkH9kz6W0ORk8A9cz) **Source -[loc.gov](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=345d41f638054391a1b1862d96116c36&_e=O1bvyfNSjTHHbgRdwFm3B1TCsniCFmq2L0K6EB7f7ZZCEBPwIap5wY8n04Zoj4s1CQh05GqEuZAEd0mgSjNAbMXEJD-6pGnvIrVVCWvmOlE2Km8IxJ68rCInrDN_2YMVwdPWyEcDSQIvepIljk7Mu9hjiPQtXJdH3dWkqFB4ZON5TBqVlovHP6TJpV6X7GTBs_o_z45d75i3UsMVojk24aDXahc8I2YgEWWNnN5Gx_D6dvRFO4xdkPhL3kQvS36V87mX2clMCpOh3Gsk9Ou8h-ooicV0WO3Mf1LPunU9GktgGtFR1QKXyCmi3Jc-3tQM)**

---|---|---
Most of us are drowning in information, news, and commentary. Few of us can keep up. And in the midst of this flood of data, I'm launching a newsletter?! Which leads to a simple question:
_**Why add to the noise that is bombarding us everyday?**_****
The short answer is that I believe **I have a different way of interpreting the world** that is helpful when navigating today's overwhelming uncertainty. I am different than most writers, analysts, academics, journalists, and commentators in that I take a different approach to analyzing developments that might disrupt our lives.
1. I am a **generalist** and utilize a wide-angle lens that emphasizes breadth of perspective over depth of expertise--an approach that crosses industries, functions, and topics;
2. I adopt a **global perspective** that values understanding the world and international dynamics--an approach that incorporates geopolitical and other cross-border considerations; and
3. I embrace a **long term view** and believe that doing so increases the probability of identifying signals amidst the short-term noise--an approach that emphasizes structural trends.

This approach has helped me navigate uncertainty in my personal and professional life and I'm hoping it will help you as well.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..y5akvcJbeScI5yyMjZIwBPlykIC641hr565wGSdy8k4?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=128399512)
For those who have followed me, you'll know that I am interested in a wide range of subjects. In the past, I've written about the world's insatiable appetite for animal protein, the rise of cryptocurrencies, China's ambitions in space, how to manage experts, the epidemic of grade inflation, the future of energy, and how the weather can impact elections, among other topics. I've always written for a general audience.
Going forward, I'll be commenting on economics, geopolitics, technology, energy, culture, education, and politics. I'll also dive into specific countries, policies, companies, and people. And I'll definitely be writing about inflation, the Fed, and financial markets. Regardless of topic, I'll focus on identifying opportunities within the risks while demonstrating how seemingly irrelevant developments in disparate domains can connect in surprising ways to impact our lives.
**Navigating Uncertainty is a reader-supported publication. To receive new posts and support my work, consider becoming a free or paid subscriber.**
[ Upgrade to paid](https://substack..y5akvcJbeScI5yyMjZIwBPlykIC641hr565wGSdy8k4?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=128399512)
I expect to post a comment roughly once a week. Some weeks will be about one particular topic, others may be a reflection on several developments. Most of my material will be available to all subscribers for free. Paid subscribers will also have access to the full archive of my work, exclusive access to paid-subscriber-only content, and the ability to post comments and interact with the community I'm building.
I hope you'll help me spread the news of **NAVIGATING UNCERTAINTY** to anyone who might enjoy reading this newsletter.
[Share Navigating Uncertainty](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/3c713d0e-be88-452d-b4b6-230066ca51d5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

name: Sepi Shyne
subject: I couldn’t do it without you
body:
Hi team,

I’ll make this short and sweet because I know you’ve gotten a ton of emails lately.

I just got off the phone with my finance team, and I am overjoyed to let you know our **end-of-quarter fundraising numbers were _phenomenal._** A deep and heartfelt thank you to everyone who stepped up, whether through a donation or simply by being a supporter — it really means the world.

I’m running to be a new voice in Congress and to speak up for the voices who have long been ignored by our political establishment. It's not going to be an easy road, but your showing of support gives me the hope and strength to keep fighting every single day.

I couldn’t do it without you.

With gratitude,

— Sepi Shyne
#WomanLifeFreedom

_Mayor Sepi Shyne has taken on WeHo's biggest issues and delivered results. From raising the minimum wage to the highest in the nation to significantly reducing homelessness – she's running for Congress to fight for all of us. As the first out Iranian LGBTQ+ woman elected anywhere in the world, Sepi is committed to making the American dream a reality for everyone: For immigrants, the LGBTQ+ community, women, and anyone trying to make ends meet. It's our time to Shyne, make a donation today._

**[Help AOTL protect reproductive freedom and end gerrymandering!>>](https://click.everyaction.com/k/65809060/414522201/-1963388583?refcode=20230701_AOTL_F_ReproRights_RedLite&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjQwZThkZDlhLTVhMTgtZWUxMS1hOWJiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=gDsA34H-6aStirhf8YIPxpOuZX0Gwgh-SYehZ7xd_OE=)**

**Check out some recent headlines that illustrate the ongoing battles surrounding abortion restrictions across the country:** **_These state Supreme Courts are weighing abortion bans_
\-- Washington Post** **_Abortion providers in North Carolina file federal lawsuit challenging state’s new restrictions_
\-- AP News** **_Clinic, physicians challenge revised North Dakota abortion laws in ongoing lawsuit_
\-- AP News**
---
* * *
**South Carolina**
In January, the SC Supreme Court struck down restrictions on abortion early in pregnancy, asserting that these measures violated the right to privacy enshrined in the state constitution. [**However, only months later, extreme lawmakers passed a new law imposing a ban on abortion. A judge has temporarily halted the implementation of this law, another showdown before the state Supreme Court looms on the horizon.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/65809062/414522203/-1963388583?refcode=20230701_AOTL_F_ReproRights_RedLite&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjQwZThkZDlhLTVhMTgtZWUxMS1hOWJiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=gDsA34H-6aStirhf8YIPxpOuZX0Gwgh-SYehZ7xd_OE=)
* * *
**North Carolina**
Reproductive rights groups are suing their state legislature to overturn various abortion restrictions. [**The lawsuit centers on North Carolina's 20-week abortion ban, with limited exceptions for maternal health or life. The lawsuit asserts these restrictions burden an individual's freedoms and violates reproductive autonomy and the doctor-patient relationship.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/65809063/414522204/-1963388583?refcode=20230701_AOTL_F_ReproRights_RedLite&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjQwZThkZDlhLTVhMTgtZWUxMS1hOWJiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=gDsA34H-6aStirhf8YIPxpOuZX0Gwgh-SYehZ7xd_OE=)
* * *
**North Dakota**
A lawsuit has been filed challenging the legality of the near-total abortion ban established by the state's Republican-led legislature. [**The statute has no exceptions for rape, incest, or severe fetal defects. According to the lawsuit, the ban blatantly opposes the fundamental freedom to abortion.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/65809065/414522205/-1963388583?refcode=20230701_AOTL_F_ReproRights_RedLite&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjQwZThkZDlhLTVhMTgtZWUxMS1hOWJiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=gDsA34H-6aStirhf8YIPxpOuZX0Gwgh-SYehZ7xd_OE=)
* * *
It is imperative that we strengthen our efforts to challenge gerrymanderers across the country and hold extreme lawmakers accountable. This accountability is especially critical when they feel they can disregard their commitment to uphold the principles of bodily autonomy and the right to make personal healthcare decisions. **[Rush a donation to All On The Line today.>>](https://click.everyaction.com/k/65809066/414522206/-1963388583?refcode=20230701_AOTL_F_ReproRights_RedLite&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjQwZThkZDlhLTVhMTgtZWUxMS1hOWJiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=gDsA34H-6aStirhf8YIPxpOuZX0Gwgh-SYehZ7xd_OE=)**

clean_body: | Team -- Have you heard? There is an alarming trend of abortion bans being orchestrated by extreme lawmakers, some emboldened by their gerrymandered and protected seats, across the nation. = = Check out some recent headlines that illustrate the ongoing battles surrounding abortion restrictions across the country: These state Supreme Courts are weighing abortion bans \-- Washington Post Abortion providers in North Carolina file federal lawsuit challenging state’s new restrictions \-- AP News Clinic, physicians challenge revised North Dakota abortion laws in ongoing lawsuit \-- AP News South Carolina In January, the SC Supreme Court struck down restrictions on abortion early in pregnancy, asserting that these measures violated the right to privacy enshrined in the state constitution. = North Carolina Reproductive rights groups are suing their state legislature to overturn various abortion restrictions. = North Dakota A lawsuit has been filed challenging the legality of the near-total abortion ban established by the state's Republican-led legislature. = It is imperative that we strengthen our efforts to challenge gerrymanderers across the country and hold extreme lawmakers accountable. This accountability is especially critical when they feel they can disregard their commitment to uphold the principles of bodily autonomy and the right to make personal healthcare decisions. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = These state-by-state attacks on our bodies go unchallenged, there will be no end to the continuous map manipulation by unaccountable extreme lawmakers and gerrymanders. name: Virginia Election Alert (via DLCC.org)
subject: re: November’s elections...
body:
We have a real chance to block Glenn Youngkin and his Republican allies by electing state Democrats in November, but it all depends on the support we get today and through Election Day. | | |
---
| | **Virginia’s Republican Governor Glenn Youngkin:**
Restricted access to the ballot box.
Proposed a budget that gives the ultra-wealthy massive tax handouts.
Pushed an _extreme_ abortion ban that threatens doctors with jail time.
Raised a record-breaking nearly **2.7 million dollars** in the year’s first quarter from right-wing donors.
**This is the Governor of battleground Virginia.**
* * *
You’ve heard about this year’s competitive elections in Virginia, but we can’t stress enough how important they really are. The people of the commonwealth have lived under Gov. Youngkin’s extreme agenda for far too long, but this November, we finally have a chance to turn things around. **The truth is:** Glenn Youngkin’s despicable agenda will be the reality for the next two years if we don’t reclaim the House and defend our Senate majority _this November._ We’re only _five seats_ away from flipping the state House – it’s within arms reach! [Losing in Virginia means handing Republicans even more power to pass anti-democratic legislation. We need you to step up and make a donation of $7 or whatever you can ahead of crucial races in states like Virginia → ](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yoKG8CTelWWDHki88pvURtxM-7M6lx0tBvbL0QK0PU4uQNk6tN8TLOVPDI_sGea6MmNhss7T4aB3GQlE9jdHL2Jrq3JJnDp6fHLShE9q9oCqLl0XmQbJcNPXPjvd5AWr7uo0VPxmzN7JNJC0SbhPmWwuXo5K7h3oiY_hgvq4Wr2NJKpjm9a0xGdcAcXr1idm1NR3KUv4nRl1U0WhSf_orjmmRfsi7Er0hZTu2bO9eO1IcVTJu6FqY1NqSTMbgiSA8eyAaigYwH0ieAwAYrXJGJ21kky8OgXwIoDiSbe2ifvntYJ33_i3lGmhq4YdnZmW-VHdP5Jw8fU6GVKmoic7oS58_Ngjkr34nBzWjkkd55Q0Tg929zSsSoN3qRSPMMNCY/3xi/qewfe7vjSQylUgyudVtOdQ/h0/b_1W3iKq577YMfabS0WshGy7Imiiicu4scgI0M_5T6c) | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately.
