With the help of grassroots donations last year, we were able to flip four chambers and expand Democratic power in ultra-competitive states. Now we have a chance to flip the Virginia House, but it all relies on the support we build right now.
[Are you up to the challenge? You’ve heard about this year’s competitive elections in Virginia, but we can’t stress enough how important they really are. The people of the commonwealth have lived under Gov. name: James Carville
subject: I've selected you to represent Pennsylvania:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC | PO Box 96047, Washington, DC 20090 | **[dscc
body:
| | | Hey, it's James Carville and I’m real excited to hear from you.

I'm conducting a series of strategy interviews with the very best, most engaged Democrats, and I've selected _you_ to represent Pennsylvania -- **[so please, click here to get started right now:](https://go.dscc.org/go/14408?ask=5&t=6&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20230701-JamesCarville-Carville3Survey-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20230701-JamesCarville-Carville3Survey-Pros-sl1&akid=11204%2E9716520%2EbKQqml)**

| | [Start your interview](https://go.dscc.org/go/14408?ask=5&t=7&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20230701-JamesCarville-Carville3Survey-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20230701-JamesCarville-Carville3Survey-Pros-sl1&akid=11204%2E9716520%2EbKQqml)
---

I’ve been in politics a LONG time, and I’ll be honest, **I don’t think I’ve ever seen an election with more at stake than this one.** If we win, we’ll continue to enact President Biden's agenda and work for ALL Americans. If we lose, **Mitch McConnell and his flat-out wacko candidates will grind all progress to a halt -- and that will only be the beginning.**

All across the country, Republicans are taking away a woman’s right to choose, trying to cut health care, restricting the right to vote, and burying their heads in the sand on climate change. **And if Democrats don’t get fired the hell up, those same crazy Republicans will take control of the Senate next year.**

That's why I want to talk to you. I need to hear from _real voters like you_ \-- not more political types -- so I can help our best and brightest defend the Senate.

**I selected you specifically, so please, will you click here to begin your interview?** **[www.dscc.org/DemocraticInterviewJuly/](https://go.dscc.org/go/14408?ask=5&t=8&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20230701-JamesCarville-Carville3Survey-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20230701-JamesCarville-Carville3Survey-Pros-sl1&akid=11204%2E9716520%2EbKQqml)**

| [Start your interview](https://go.dscc.org/go/14408?ask=5&t=9&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20230701-JamesCarville-Carville3Survey-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20230701-JamesCarville-Carville3Survey-Pros-sl1&akid=11204%2E9716520%2EbKQqml)
---

Thank you

\- James

[](https://go.dscc.org/go/14408?ask=5&t=10&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20230701-JamesCarville-Carville3Survey-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20230701-JamesCarville-Carville3Survey-Pros-sl1&akid=11204%2E9716520%2EbKQqml)

* If you've recently responded or done so with a different email address, thank you! Online records may not be up to date, but don't worry -- your responses have been recorded.

Derivative of [photo](https://go.dscc.org/go/6153?t=1&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20230701-JamesCarville-Carville3Survey-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20230701-JamesCarville-Carville3Survey-Pros-sl1&akid=11204%2E9716520%2EbKQqml) by JD Lasica. [CC BY-SA 2.0](https://go.dscc.org/go/1271?t=2&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20230701-JamesCarville-Carville3Survey-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20230701-JamesCarville-Carville3Survey-Pros-sl1&akid=11204%2E9716520%2EbKQqml).

The DSCC is the only committee solely dedicated to supporting Democrats in the U.S. Senate, and our work relies on grassroots supporters like you. Dear Friend,

Fourteen years ago, I founded an organization from my parent’s home with the intent of using undercover investigative journalism to expose the corrupt.

You’ve seen my work. Most Americans have.

In February, after releasing a historic investigation on Pfizer, the Board of Directors of the organization I created from scratch, ousted me.

It was a blow, but things happen for a reason. Today, I’m unleashed to do my work through my new organization, OMG, without any obstruction and **no one to stop me.**

Since I was fired, I’ve chosen not to look back. I want to move forward with my work, with happiness and spirit. **And I move forward carrying with me the many lessons I learned.**

Those 14 years were formative.

When I started, my hands would tremble when I confronted a target of my investigations. It took time, but I overcame my fears of confrontation by grounding myself in principle.

I learned about trust, loyalty, and leadership.

Most importantly, I learned the hard way the true depth of Michael Jordan’s quote on leadership: “Winning has a price. **And leadership has a price**.”

I’ve been sued for exposing the truth more times than I can count. And, get this, **yesterday, I was sued in federal court by the very organization I founded.**

In my opinion, their intent is to shut me down now that they no longer have any control over me.

And this lawsuit is going to cost me a fortune! That’s why I’m writing you today to **[ask for your support to my legal defense fund.](http://email.email.a1warroom.com/c/eJxskcGOnDAMhp_G3BgFhwQ4cOiW0kOlqlJPPa1MYmYySwgTgqb06SvQtoeq18-f_Vs2-WVy495C9QKIN2dXQAT5ARAfP54-bnf_5XMeQsgf-qtXRxE_AmLaF_5rvg-5sCc3HbTqMtuSppFtxm2h6xoVqqbMbm0laiulqIVWjRYCK02KsSnEQI1tqMpciwKlqESBUhQKL2QEFmWJ0qhSiVpCKc6gCxVPijEEfzHBZ1N7S2lZz416wH5ls0W-0Mw2pMMA7Cc3cEx7ft0oWsD-Tp7XPLwxj5xTSmTecj_kwYPst-Rf17BFwyC7_4iA-lA8W7d5kN0RcBJDfiF3nUF2fnhniePhPKMC1OTDNieQHao_LWFOfKLZTPl-__n9Pn56_NoB9es8OQuy-ween5IdD8P4jV5sFlu7PN00uVVXUIrreSAT_O8AAAD__6XPmOw)**

My friends with the non-profit, Liberty Guard, have set up **[the fund to pay attorney costs](http://email.email.a1warroom.com/c/eJxskcGOmzAQhp9muIHMGJPkwKFbxB4qrXrtaTXYQ-Isg1ljitKnr0BppUq9fv9n_6MZknn0w6OB0wsg3rxbABH0F0D8_LFJXO_y7TUPIeSf9ZuYPcSvgJgeM_81n58ULOTHnZ7azDVU08Au46asz2c0aC5VdmsMG4VaKXVRPFxUb_uqHnpXIjl059JkvsFdOKkStSoNFmQVllWF2prKqLOGSh1FBZUbxRiCFDZINja3lOblmKgD7Ba2a-SCJnYh7QZgN_qeY3rk15WiA-zuJLzk4YN54JxSIvuRS58HAd2tSd6XsEbLoNv_iID1rgg7vwrodi84iCWZyV8n0K30T5Y47s4WDWBNEtYpgW7R_HkSpsQHmuyYT_qX-XmXt9c7YP0-jd7twb_wuJRuue-H7_Tisti4efPj6Jf6BJW6HguyQX4HAAD__46emK4)** that will quickly pile up.

As I mentioned, this isn’t my first rodeo so I know that **the cost will exceed $500,000**.

Good attorneys aren’t cheap, and my pockets are not deep.

No one gets wealthy doing the work that I do. Trust me.

That’s where you come in. **[Will you chip in and help me defend myself](http://email.email.a1warroom.com/c/eJxskT2PnEAMhn-N6UCDh-GjoMgGcUWkKEWaVKf58O7OLWa4YRDafx-BNimitI8f-7Vszcvkr88emgsg3r1bARHkF0D8_LVz3D7421seQsg_6--sjiJ-BcT0XOiv-RpSEGs_HbQZMtfrWl_JZdSXdduiQtVV2b0XrjaW2q5yKBrjDJkWVUdt21HXdKQz36NAKRpRohSlwkJbgWVVobSqUqKVUIkzqNDlrmMMgQsbOJv6e0rLem40Ao4r2S1SoWdyIR0G4Dh5QzE989umowMcPzTTmocH0ZVynZK2j5xNHhjkuCV-X8MWLYEc_iMC1ofC5PzGIIcj4CRW86L9bQY5sHmxRPFw9qgAa81hmxPIAdWfljAnOtFsp9xeLg8nf5q3BrB-nyfvQA7_wPNTciBjrj_0xWWxd8vup8mvdQOVuJ0HsoF_BwAA__8mfphF)?**

When you do, I’ll be following up as the case progresses but I’ll also keep you informed of the great work I’m doing at OMG . . . and it’s exciting!

A fresh start, being forced to start over, I’ll admit is thrilling. And I’m starting armed with all of the lessons I’ve learned to avoid the pitfalls I’ve experienced.

Me and my teams are more efficient, we’re more productive, and our work hits like a sledgehammer.

But my work will be silenced if my former employer gets their way. Or the distractions of a court battle and its costs may become overwhelming.

Friend, **[I’m asking you to STAND UP FOR ME, so I can keep working](http://email.email.a1warroom.com/c/eJxskb-OnEAMh5_GdCDw8GcpKO6CSBEpShUp1cnMmGV2xww3DFltnj4CXVJEaT9_9s-ySVZnp2cHzSsgztZsgAjqBRDffzwk7Df58jn13qfv9VepjiJ-AsT4XPmv-TEkYyHrDtr0iemopolNwl1RXy5YYdWWydw1RKodyWBbjGokorpVusBWmbaYjDaJ7TBHlTd5gSovKsxI51iUJSpdlVV-UVDmZ1BGxYNC8F4y7SVx3Rzjup0bDYDDxnoPnNHCxsfDABycHTnEZ3rdKRjA4UbCW-rvzBOnFCPpeypj6gXUsEd52_weNIPq_yMC1ocibOwuoPoj4CSaZCV7XUD1Mn6wyOFwHqECrEn8vkRQPVZ_WvwS-USLdun2Pbzcf97m-Rdg_bY4a0D1_8DzU6rncZy-0atJQmfWh3XObnUDZX49D6S9_A4AAP__4GGaYw)**. And I’ll commit to you that **I will NOT let you down**.

So please, **[make a donation to my legal defense fund through Liberty Guard](http://email.email.a1warroom.com/c/eJxskcGOnDAMhp_G3EDBITBz4NApolIrVe2pai8r45iZ7BLChqDpvH0F2vZQ7fXzZ_-WTX6Z3PhoobkA4s3ZFRBBfwDE1593H7dn_-VTHkLIX-uv3uxF_AiI6bHIP_NtSCGe3LTTpstsSzWNYjNpy_p0QoPmXGW31pRnxoHPQ6VOLNwI88g1oa0aUiNXmWtRoVaNKlGr0mBBrLCsKtRsKqNOGip1BBVU3inGEHzBwWdTe0tpWY-NesB-Fd6iFDSLDWk3APvJDRLTI79uFC1g_0xe1jy8iIySU0rEL7kf8uBB91vyT2vYIgvo7h0RsN4VL9ZtHnS3BxyEyS_krjPozg9vLEncnXs0gDX5sM0JdIfmb0uYkxxo5in_Nfzg_vfny_cFsH6aJ2dBd__B41O6k2EYv9HFZrG1y91Nk1vrBip1PQ7Ewf8JAAD__-ZxmXo)**. We have a long way to do to hit our goal, so please, donate as much as you can.

Friend, thank you for your direct or indirect support over the years. Your views, donations or simply talking about my work to friends and family has kept me going for 14 years . . . **and we cannot stop now!**

Respectfully,

James O’Keefe

P.S. I have 20 days to file my response to the lawsuit. I have to raise enough money to pay for a retainer and cover the legal work to defend against this lawsuit. This is unfortunately urgent so please, **[donate today](http://email.email.a1warroom.com/c/eJxskcGOnDAMhp_G3EDBIYE9cOgU0cNKVS-t1NPKJM5MdglhQ9Bo3r4CbXuo9vr5s3_LprDO3j16aC-AePN2A0SQXwDx_fc9pP01PH8rY4zlu_4e1FHEr4CYHyv_Mz-GVBzIzwdth8L2pMmxLbivddehQvXUFLfe1UKxownRaSOUlcZN1CiST0ZzJ1zhexQoRStqlKJWWJERWDcNSqMaJToJjTiDKqrvlFKMoTIxFHN_y3ndzo1GwHFjsyeuaGEb82EAjrOfOOVHed0pWcDxlQJvZXxjdlxSzmTeyjCVMYAc9xxetrgnwyCHT0RAfSiBrd8DyOEIOImhsJK_LiCHMH2wzOlw7kkBagpxXzLIAdXflrhkPtFi5rK7_LJL-9MMz4D6ZZm9BTn8B89PyYGnyf2giy1Sb9e7n2e_6RYacT0PZGL4EwAA__9y05iD)**.

---

Alexandria, VA 22314

name: CaucusRoom
subject: ☀️ CaucusRoom Weekend Edition
body:
What a great week to be an American! No images? [Click here](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-e-axidit-trhiujldw-yh/) [](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-axidit-trhiujldw-r/)
### ** Welcome to the Weekend Wrap Up! **

### ** Here are the top articles that CaucusRoom members shared:**
* There was a **[coup in Russia](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-axidit-trhiujldw-y/)**.
* Hunter's audio **[messages are real](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-axidit-trhiujldw-j/)**.
* Fox has announced **[Tucker's replacement](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-axidit-trhiujldw-t/).**
* NYC says**[pizza is bad](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-axidit-trhiujldw-i/) **for the environment.
* **[Mass layoffs](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-axidit-trhiujldw-d/)** at Ford.
* The White House says everyone is **[better off financially](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-axidit-trhiujldw-h/)**.
* Buckle up! **[A recession is coming](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-axidit-trhiujldw-k/)**.
* Do you think Trump will **r[eturn to Twitter](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-axidit-trhiujldw-u/)?**
* Bidenomics is wildly popular.**[We just don't know who](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-axidit-trhiujldw-o/)?**
* SCOTUS**[strikes down](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-axidit-trhiujldw-x/) **affirmative action.
* D.C. liberals are **[MAD at Biden](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-axidit-trhiujldw-m/)**.
* You won't believe what **[Hunter wrote off](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-axidit-trhiujldw-c/)** on his taxes.
* USPS says **[don't send checks in the mail](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-axidit-trhiujldw-q/)**. It's not secure.

### **Unconstitutional**
The Supreme Court ruled Friday that the Biden administration**[cannot go forward with their student loan debt handout program.](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-axidit-trhiujldw-a/)**
### **First Amendment Freedom**
SCOTUS ruled a Colorado graphic designer who wants to**[make wedding websites does not have to create them for same-sex marriages](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-axidit-trhiujldw-f/), **in a landmark decision. **This Has Gone Too Far**
## Michigan residents could be **[charged with a felony, face up to five years in prison and get a $10,000 fine](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-axidit-trhiujldw-z/)** for using the wrong pronouns under an 'unconstitutional' new bill.
[**Here For The Laughs**](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-axidit-trhiujldw-v/) [](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-axidit-trhiujldw-e/) [](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-axidit-trhiujldw-s/)[](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-axidit-trhiujldw-g/)[](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-axidit-trhiujldw-w/) [](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-axidit-trhiujldw-yd/) | CaucusRoom, LLC
1100 Johnson Rd #18546Golden, CO 80402 You are receiving this email because you are a member of CaucusRoom [Preferences](https://caucusroom.updatemyprofile.com/i-axidit-6F882DBF-trhiujldw-yk) | [Unsubscribe](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-u-axidit-trhiujldw-yu/)

body:

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

subject: 1 hour left: Double your impact before midnight
body:
| | | | | [](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/e_s17_main_cobrandedemail_c3)
---|---|---

| | We didn't want to send this email, Friend, but we really don't have a choice. **Yesterday, we fell short of our Fiscal Year End fundraising goal \-- at the worst possible time for our planet and the countless lives that depend on it. ** The stakes are far too high to miss this goal: **Greedy chemical companies are driving a massive decline of our precious bees. Our oceans are filling with toxic garbage. And endangered species everywhere are struggling to survive as Big Oil wrecks their ecosystems for profits. That's why our generous donors agreed to EXTEND our rare 2X match -- but ONLY until midnight TONIGHT. We urgently need environmentalists like you to step up while this opportunity lasts. Here's where your record stands:** | | **Fiscal Year End Record**
---
**EMAIL:** dpwillis67@gmail.com
**MATCH STATUS: EXPIRING at 11:59 p.m.**
**FISCAL YEAR END DONATION: STILL PENDING. [GIVE NOW.](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1858424?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)** **PEOPLE NEEDED IN YOUR CITY TO GIVE: 2 MORE**
---
| | [DOUBLE MY GIFT NOW](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1858425?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---

---
[](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1858425?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
The end of the fiscal year isn't a game to us, Friend. There's no scoreboard -- just the ongoing fight to stop Big Polluters and ensure that our planet survives. We set our initial goal at $150,000 because that's the MINIMUM we need to power our efforts forward. **Every single dollar is accounted for in our battle to protect vital habitats for helpless animals, get toxic waste out of our food chain and waterways, and protect our planet from fossil fuel-driven destruction.** When we miss our goal, this battle gets even more difficult to fight.
Falling short means we have to scale back on our work to hold Big Polluters accountable, mobilizing organizers on the ground and keeping the pressure on lawmakers to pass the planet-saving policies we desperately need. **That's why this match extension is so critical. And we're counting on you -- our planet is counting on you -- to help make up this budget shortfall with your membership support today. **
[**So please: Rush your $27 donation now before our rare match EXTENSION expires at 11:59 p.m. tonight, and every dollar will be DOUBLED -- up to our $150,000 goal -- to fight for our only Earth.**](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1858426?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)

## Why Chris Christie:

Chris Christie is a proven leader who fearlessly tells it like it is. As a successful governor in a blue state with a track record of real accomplishments, Christie has consistently confronted challenging issues head-on, making difficult decisions without hesitation. To ensure a conservative Republican victory in the 2024 presidential election, we deserve an open, honest debate that focuses on critical issues. Governor Christie's voice at the debates will ensure our party engages in the robust, direct, truth-telling conversation we need to start winning again. Join us in supporting Chris Christie's candidacy for president and ensuring his direct, no-nonsense agenda at the RNC-sponsored presidential debates. Your participation is vital in making this happen. Sign up today to "Tell It Like It Is" and help our party and country select a president we can all be proud of. Together, we can shape a brighter future for America.
